# DataWarehouse Production Audit -- Consolidated Findings (Single Source of Truth)

**Date**: 2026-03-05
**Scope**: Full solution (~3,789 .cs files, 52+ plugins, 1.1M+ LOC)
**Sources consolidated**:
- Agent scans: 21 plugin-group deep scans + 4 semantic batch analyses
- Semantic search: 31 category searches (25 raw + 7 structured)
- JetBrains InspectCode: 95,502 SARIF results filtered to production-relevant
- SDK comprehensive audit: 153 chunks covering 2,298 files
- Previous audits: Feb 22-25 findings (non-fixed only)

**Deduplication method**: Findings matched on (filename + starting line number + normalized description prefix 80 chars).
Highest severity and most detailed description retained per duplicate group.

---

## Grand Summary

| Severity | Count |
|----------|-------|
| CRITICAL | 398 |
| HIGH | 2,353 |
| MEDIUM | 3,859 |
| LOW | 4,518 |
| **TOTAL** | **11,128** |

## All Findings (sorted by Project > File > Line)


### AedsCore (139 findings: 7 critical, 35 high, 70 medium, 27 low)

| # | Sev | File | Line(s) | Source | Finding |
|---|-----|------|---------|--------|--------|
| 1 | HIGH | AedsCore/Adapters/MeshNetworkAdapter.cs | 65-69 | sdk-audit | Timer callback `async _ => await DiscoverTopologyAsync()` coerced to `async void` — unhandled exception crashes process on .NET 6+. |
| 2 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/AedsCorePlugin.cs | 296-315 | sdk-audit | `VerifySignatureAsync` fallback returns `true` on structural validation only (field presence, no crypto) when message bus unavailable. |
| 3 | CRITICAL | AedsCore/ClientCourierPlugin.cs | 149 | sdk-audit | `_ = Task.Run(() => ListenLoopAsync(...))` and `_ = Task.Run(() => HeartbeatLoopAsync(...))` — both background loops fully discarded. Unhandled exceptions silently kill courier while `_isRunning` remains true. No fault observation. |
| 4 | HIGH | AedsCore/ClientCourierPlugin.cs | 214 | sdk-audit | `_ = Task.Run(() => ProcessManifestAsync(manifest, ct))` — per-manifest task unobserved. Processing errors silently lost, unbounded concurrent tasks under load. |
| 5 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/ClientCourierPlugin.cs | 330-331 | sdk-audit | Notify action not wired to `NotificationPlugin` — "platform-specific notification dispatch not yet wired". |
| 6 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/ClientCourierPlugin.cs | 337-338 | sdk-audit | Execute action logs warning and does nothing — "requires secure process isolation layer" stub comment. |
| 7 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/ClientCourierPlugin.cs | 423 | sdk-audit | Interactive mode sync-back stub — "file change upload not yet wired to data plane". |
| 8 | HIGH | AedsCore/ControlPlane/GrpcControlPlanePlugin.cs | 51,138,148 | sdk-audit | `_reconnectAttempt` non-atomic `++` from multiple background tasks without volatile/Interlocked. Same pattern in Mqtt and WebSocket control plane plugins. |
| 9 | HIGH | AedsCore/ControlPlane/WebSocketControlPlanePlugin.cs | 55-56 | sdk-audit | `_lastMessageReceived` and `_lastHeartbeatSent` (16-byte `DateTimeOffset`) written/read from different tasks without sync — torn reads on 32-bit ARM edge devices. |
| 10 | HIGH | AedsCore/DataPlane/Http3DataPlanePlugin.cs | 99-161 | sdk-audit | `HttpRequestMessage` and `HttpResponseMessage` not disposed in retry loop — socket/handle leak on every transfer attempt. Same in `FetchDeltaAsync` and `PushPayloadAsync`. |
| 11 | HIGH | AedsCore/DataPlane/Http3DataPlanePlugin.cs | 367-402 | sdk-audit | `HttpRequestMessage`/`HttpResponseMessage` not disposed in `CheckExistsAsync` and `FetchInfoAsync` — handle leak on every HEAD/GET call. |
| 12 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/CodeSigningPlugin.cs | 184-187 | sdk-audit | `catch { return false; }` in `ValidateCertificateChain` — certificate chain failures produce no diagnostic. Misconfigured trust store indistinguishable from rejected cert. |
| 13 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/DeltaSyncPlugin.cs | 171 | sdk-audit | `(int)baseStream.Length` — silent integer overflow for streams >2GB, causes `ArgumentOutOfRangeException`. |
| 14 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Extensions/DeltaSyncPlugin.cs | 175-207 | sdk-audit | `ApplyDeltaAsync` writes modified chunks then unchanged chunks sequentially — output order wrong for interleaved modifications, corrupts reconstruction. |
| 15 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Extensions/DeltaSyncPlugin.cs | 175-207 | sdk-audit | Duplicate of ordering issue — modified+unchanged chunks not interleaved correctly in output stream. |
| 16 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Extensions/DeltaSyncPlugin.cs | 263-276 | sdk-audit | Adler-32 used as chunk discriminator — 32-bit collision space causes silent data corruption in delta reconstruction. |
| 17 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Extensions/GlobalDeduplicationPlugin.cs | 86 | sdk-audit | `QueryServerForDedupAsync` returns empty list — "response would come via subscription" — dedup query non-functional. |
| 18 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/MulePlugin.cs | 115-119 | sdk-audit | USB index deserialized manifest IDs used directly in file paths — path traversal via malicious USB index. |
| 19 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/NotificationPlugin.cs | 55-157 | sdk-audit | `Console.WriteLine` and `Console.Beep()` throughout `NotificationPlugin` — library code bypasses structured logging. |
| 20 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/NotificationPlugin.cs | 108-132 | sdk-audit | Command injection via unescaped `title`/`message` in `Process.Start` arguments — manifest payload name with quotes enables RCE on Linux/macOS. |
| 21 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/NotificationPlugin.cs | 117-141 | sdk-audit | Linux `notify-send` and macOS `osascript` catch-all blocks fall back to `Console.WriteLine` with no logging of the exception. |
| 22 | CRITICAL | AedsCore/Extensions/PolicyEnginePlugin.cs | 81-88 | sdk-audit | `LoadPolicyAsync` is a stub — comment "In production, parse JSON and load rules", body returns `Task.CompletedTask`. File-based policy configuration is non-functional; defaults to allow-all. |
| 23 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/PolicyEnginePlugin.cs | 125-143 | sdk-audit | `EvaluateCondition` stub — `condition.Contains("true") \ |
| 24 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/PreCogPlugin.cs | 157 | sdk-audit | `_ = MessageBus.PublishAsync(...)` — fire-and-forget feedback publish with no fault observation. |
| 25 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Extensions/PreCogPlugin.cs | 213-238 | sdk-audit | `GetAIPredictionsAsync` publishes request but returns empty list — "AI response will be handled via subscription in production". |
| 26 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Extensions/SwarmIntelligencePlugin.cs | 314-316 | sdk-audit | `RequestChunkFromPeerAsync` always returns `null` — "In production, this would wait for response via message subscription". P2P mesh non-functional. |
| 27 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Extensions/ZeroTrustPairingPlugin.cs | 18,53 | sdk-audit | `_pendingPins` plain `Dictionary` accessed concurrently without synchronization — corrupt on concurrent registrations. No expiry cleanup. |
| 28 | LOW | AedsCore/Extensions/ZeroTrustPairingPlugin.cs | 50,75 | sdk-audit | `Guid.NewGuid()` as client ID — adequate for identifiers but not security tokens. |
| 29 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/ZeroTrustPairingPlugin.cs | 55 | sdk-audit | `Console.WriteLine` outputs security-sensitive pairing PIN to stdout — information disclosure in production. |
| 30 | HIGH | AedsCore/Extensions/ZeroTrustPairingPlugin.cs | 155-157 | sdk-audit | `VerifyPairing` always returns `true` — comment: "In production, query trust level from server". Complete Zero-Trust authentication bypass. |
| 31 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Http2DataPlanePlugin.cs | 333,345 | sdk-audit | `_bytesTransferred += bytesRead` non-atomic `long` increment from concurrent Read/ReadAsync paths. |
| 32 | LOW | AedsCore/Scaling/AedsScalingManager.cs | 553 | sdk-audit | `string.GetHashCode(StringComparison.Ordinal)` for partition routing — non-deterministic across restarts. |
| 33 | MEDIUM | AedsCore/Scaling/AedsScalingManager.cs | 572-574 | sdk-audit | Silent catch — `Interlocked.Increment(ref _jobsFailed)` only, no exception logging. Job failure diagnosis impossible. |
| 34 | HIGH | AedsCore/ServerDispatcherPlugin.cs | 148-153 | sdk-audit | `ProcessJobAsync` simulates delivery with `Task.Delay(10)` — "In a real implementation, this would send the manifest via Control Plane". Jobs always report success. |
| 35 | HIGH | AedsCorePlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | Cross-cutting: both AEDS signature paths (AedsCorePlugin + ClientCourierPlugin) accept unverified manifests |
| 36 | MEDIUM | AedsCorePlugin.cs | 38-39 | agent-scan | _manifestCache/_validationCache unbounded Dictionary — no eviction |
| 37 | MEDIUM | AedsCorePlugin.cs | 38-39 | agent-scan | _manifestCache/_validationCache unbounded Dictionary |

### Plugin (195 findings: 3 critical, 96 high, 72 medium, 24 low)

| # | Sev | File | Line(s) | Source | Finding |
|---|-----|------|---------|--------|--------|
| 1 | CRITICAL | **SYSTEMIC** `AuthenticateAsync` — All 11 simple strategies (Asana | 24, | sdk-audit | Returns `(Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N"), DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddHours(X))`. No credential exchange with remote service. Rule 13 stub masquerading as real auth. |
| 2 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` — All 15 files | - | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient { ... }` per-connection without `IHttpClientFactory`. Socket exhaustion (TIME_WAIT) under heavy reconnection. HttpClient leaks if constructor throws before handle assignment. |
| 3 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` — All 15 files (SendGrid, ServiceNow, Shopify, Slack, Stripe, SuccessFactors, Twilio, Workday, Zendesk, Zuora, ApacheDruid, ApacheIgnite, ApachePinot, ClickHouse, CrateDb) | - | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient(...)` per-connection with no `IHttpClientFactory`. Socket exhaustion under load. Identical to prior chunk systemics. |
| 4 | MEDIUM | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` — all TCP/UDP strategies (Ldap, Sftp, Smtp, Ssh, Snmp, Syslog) | - | sdk-audit | `Split(':')` fails for IPv6 addresses like `[::1]:389`. Should use `Uri.TryCreate` or `IPEndPoint.TryParse`. |
| 5 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `DisconnectCoreAsync` — All 15 files | - | sdk-audit | `handle.GetConnection<HttpClient>()?.Dispose()` only cleanup. If handle metadata contains other disposables, they leak. |
| 6 | MEDIUM | **SYSTEMIC** `GetHealthCoreAsync` — All 15 files | - | sdk-audit | Full HTTP round-trip per health check with no cached status. High-frequency polling creates unnecessary load. |
| 7 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `TestCoreAsync` — 13 files (all except Salesforce, Monday) | - | sdk-audit | Health test passes for any status except `503 ServiceUnavailable`. 401/403/404/429/500 all report healthy. Should use `IsSuccessStatusCode`. |
| 8 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `TestCoreAsync` — All 10 SaaS files | - | sdk-audit | `catch { return false; }` swallows all exceptions including `OperationCanceledException`. Same pattern as prior chunks. |
| 9 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `TestCoreAsync` — All 15 files | - | sdk-audit | `catch { return false; }` swallows `OperationCanceledException`, `ObjectDisposedException`, `OutOfMemoryException`. Cancelled test reports "unhealthy" instead of propagating. |
| 10 | MEDIUM | All 15 files | - | sdk-audit | `IncrementCounter(...)` indented at column 8 while method body at column 12. Systemic paste/generation error across all 15 files. |
| 11 | LOW | All 15 files | - | sdk-audit | Mixed indentation: `InitializeAsyncCore`/`ShutdownAsyncCore` at shallower indent than class body. Systemic formatting issue. |
| 12 | LOW | All 15 leaf WasmLanguage strategies | - | sdk-audit | `VerifyLanguageAsync` uses generic nop WASM module — verifies wasmtime itself, not language-specific toolchain (Javy, TeaVM, CPython). Reports `CompilationSuccessful: true` even without toolchains installed. Contract lie in verification method name. |
| 13 | MEDIUM | All S3 strategies: `DeleteAsyncCore | - | sdk-audit | Silently swallows pre-deletion metadata fetch failures with Debug.WriteLine only — stats silently wrong on serious errors. |
| 14 | LOW | All S3 strategies: `ExecuteWithRetryAsync | - | sdk-audit | On first non-retryable exception, lastException remains null — falls through to generic InvalidOperationException losing original. |
| 15 | MEDIUM | All S3 strategies: `ExistsAsyncCore | - | sdk-audit | Catch-all returns false without logging — auth/network errors look identical to "not found". Fail-open for existence checks. Affects DigitalOcean, Linode, OVH, Scaleway, Vultr, Wasabi. |
| 16 | LOW | All S3 strategies: `GetCdnUrl`/`GetDirectUrl | - | sdk-audit | Object key interpolated into URL without Uri.EscapeDataString — malformed URLs on keys with #, ?, space. |

| 18 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/WatermarkEmbeddingStrategy.cs | 475-485 | sdk-audit | `CheckWatermarkHealthAsync` uses ` |
| 19 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/AdaptiveThreatProfileStrategy.cs | 35 | sdk-audit | `GetThreatProfile` returns `ThreatProfile` but XML doc says "risk assessment." Naming mismatch. |

| 21 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/AdaptiveThreatProfileStrategy.cs | 146 | sdk-audit | `_behavioralPatterns` is a plain `List<BehavioralPattern>` with same thread-safety issue. |

| 23 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/ContextualThreatStrategy.cs | 38 | sdk-audit | `EvaluateContext` returns `ContextEvaluation` but property is called `ThreatLevel`. Inconsistent. |
| 24 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/ContextualThreatStrategy.cs | 98 | sdk-audit | `_contextFactors` plain `Dictionary` not thread-safe for concurrent reads/writes during context evaluation. |
| 25 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/ContextualThreatStrategy.cs | 99 | sdk-audit | `_historicalPatterns` plain `List` — same thread-safety gap. |

| 27 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/SoarIntegrationStrategy.cs | 284-310 | sdk-audit | `SendWebhookAlertAsync` constructs JSON payload but no `HttpClient` is available — method body incomplete. Alert notifications silently fail. |
| 28 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/SoarIntegrationStrategy.cs | 341-365 | sdk-audit | `ExecutePlaybookStepsAsync` — all SOAR response actions (isolate host, block IP, disable user, scan endpoint) are stubs returning `true`. Incident response automation will appear to succeed without taking any action. |
| 29 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ZeroTrust/DeviceTrustStrategy.cs | 142 | sdk-audit | `AssessDeviceTrust` returns percentage score but no documentation of scale or thresholds. |
| 30 | MEDIUM | UltimateBlockchain/Services/BlockchainJournalService.cs | 45 | sdk-audit | `FileStream` opened in constructor with no `Dispose` path — resource leak if service is abandoned. |
| 31 | HIGH | UltimateBlockchain/Services/BlockchainJournalService.cs | 156-168 | sdk-audit | Journal write failure caught and logged but not re-thrown. Caller believes journal entry succeeded, breaking blockchain audit trail continuity. |
| 32 | MEDIUM | UltimateBlockchain/Services/BlockchainJournalService.cs | 198 | sdk-audit | `Console.WriteLine` for genesis block creation diagnostic — should use structured logger. |
| 33 | HIGH | UltimateBlockchain/Services/BlockchainJournalService.cs | 210-225 | sdk-audit | `WriteGenesisBlockAsync` calls `Fire-and-forget` task for initial chain validation without await. Validation failure unobserved, genesis integrity unknown. |
| 34 | HIGH | UltimateBlockchain/Services/BlockchainPolicyBridge.cs | 89-102 | sdk-audit | `TranslatePolicyToBlockchainRules` — returns hardcoded empty rule set. Policy-to-chain translation non-functional. |
| 35 | MEDIUM | UltimateBlockchain/Strategies/Network/X509CertStrategy.cs | 65-72 | sdk-audit | Certificate parsing creates new `X509Certificate2` per validation call without caching — expensive ASN.1 parsing repeated for every request. |
| 36 | HIGH | UltimateBlockchain/Strategies/Network/X509CertStrategy.cs | 165-178 | sdk-audit | `ValidateCertificateChainAsync` builds X509Chain but uses default `RevocationMode` — OCSP/CRL failures cause silent fallback to accepting revoked certs in offline environments. |
| 37 | HIGH | UltimateBlockchain/Strategies/Network/X509CertStrategy.cs | 182-195 | sdk-audit | SAN parsing splits on `,` and `:` — fails for SAN entries containing literal commas (e.g., `O=Acme, Inc.`) leading to identity mismatch. |
| 38 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/CredentialIssuanceStrategy.cs | 30 | sdk-audit | Class named `CredentialIssuanceStrategy` but also handles verification. Should be split or renamed. |
| 39 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/CredentialIssuanceStrategy.cs | 48 | sdk-audit | No validation that credential claims are non-empty before issuance. Empty credential can be issued. |
| 40 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/CredentialIssuanceStrategy.cs | 65-70 | sdk-audit | Credential revocation list not checked during verification. Revoked credentials still verify as valid. |
| 41 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/CredentialVerificationStrategy.cs | 42-48 | sdk-audit | Credential schema validation missing — accepts credentials with arbitrary/missing required fields. |
| 42 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/DigitalIdentityStrategy.cs | 60-65 | sdk-audit | Identity verification stub — `VerifyIdentityAsync` returns hardcoded success for any input. |
| 43 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/DigitalIdentityStrategy.cs | 80-85 | sdk-audit | Identity attribute update does not verify caller owns the identity. Any caller can modify any identity. |
| 44 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/DigitalIdentityStrategy.cs | 90 | sdk-audit | Identity store is plain Dictionary, not ConcurrentDictionary. Single-threaded assumption. |
| 45 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/PassportRenewalStrategy.cs | 42-47 | sdk-audit | Same unawaited `base.InitializeAsync()` pattern as PassportIssuanceStrategy. |
| 46 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/PassportRenewalStrategy.cs | 55-60 | sdk-audit | Renewed passport does not invalidate old passport. Both remain valid simultaneously. |
| 47 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/PassportRevocationStrategy.cs | 40-45 | sdk-audit | Same unawaited `base.InitializeAsync()` pattern. |
| 48 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/PassportRevocationStrategy.cs | 50 | sdk-audit | `RevokeAsync` returns success even when passport ID not found. Name implies revocation happened. |
| 49 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/PassportVerificationStrategy.cs | 40 | sdk-audit | No check that passport has not expired before signature verification. Expired passports verify as valid. |
| 50 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Identity/PassportVerificationStrategy.cs | 55-70 | sdk-audit | Signature verification uses different JSON serialization options than issuance (different property ordering). Verification will always fail for valid passports. |

| 52 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Privacy/DataMinimizationStrategy.cs | 60-65 | sdk-audit | `PurgeExpiredData` stub — identifies expired records but does not delete them. Logs "would purge N records". |
| 53 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Privacy/DataMinimizationStrategy.cs | 75 | sdk-audit | Retention policy store is plain Dictionary. Not thread-safe for concurrent policy updates. |

| 60 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Compute/JobSchedulerStrategy.cs | 310-315 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `Task.Run` for job execution. Callers awaiting job completion hang indefinitely if task faults — exception swallowed, `TaskCompletionSource` never completed. |
| 61 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Compute/JobSchedulerStrategy.cs | 340-345 | sdk-audit | Path traversal: `task.Id` used directly in file path construction without sanitization. Crafted task ID with `../` can write outside job directory. |
| 62 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Compute/ResourceManagerStrategy.cs | 290-295 | sdk-audit | Same path traversal via unsanitized resource ID in file path construction. |
| 63 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/LandlockStrategy.cs` (entire) | - | sdk-audit | Claims Linux Landlock LSM but calls `sandboxer` (kernel sample, not standard binary). No InitializeAsync to verify availability. If absent, code executes without any isolation silently with exit 0. |
| 64 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmInterpreterStrategy.cs` (class) | - | sdk-audit | Strategy named "WASM Interpreter (Built-in)" with description promising "Stack-based WASM execution". Never interprets an opcode. Fundamental naming/contract lie. |
| 65 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across all 15 files:** Every AI connector creates `new HttpClient()` per connection. At scale (hundreds of connectors) this exhausts ephemeral ports (socket exhaustion). Should use `IHttpClientFactory` or a shared static client. Affected: AzureMl, AzureOpenAi, Chroma, Cohere, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, GoogleGemini, Groq, Helicone, HuggingFace, Kubeflow, LangSmith, LlamaCpp, LlamaIndex, Milvus. |
| 66 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across all 15 files:** `HttpResponseMessage` from `SendAsync`/`PostAsync`/`GetAsync` is never wrapped in `using`. On error paths (`EnsureSuccessStatusCode` throws), the response body stream leaks. Must use `using var response = ...`. |
| 67 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across ~12 files:** `new StringContent(json, Encoding.UTF8, "application/json")` is never disposed. `StringContent` holds a `MemoryStream` internally. Affected: AzureMl, AzureOpenAi, Cohere, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, GoogleGemini, Groq, HuggingFace, Kubeflow, LangSmith, LlamaIndex, Milvus. |
| 68 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across ~10 files:** `JsonDocument.Parse()` result not disposed. `JsonDocument` rents array buffers that are returned only on `Dispose()`. Affected: AzureMl, AzureOpenAi, Chroma, Cohere, ElevenLabs, GoogleGemini, Groq, HuggingFace, LlamaIndex, Milvus. |
| 69 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across ~5 files:** `StreamResponseAsync` catches all exceptions including `OperationCanceledException`, swallowing cancellation requests. Callers cannot cancel streaming. Affected: Cohere, Deepgram, GoogleGemini, Groq, HuggingFace. |
| 70 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across ~4 files:** `StreamResponseAsync` calls `PostAsync` without forwarding `CancellationToken`. HTTP request cannot be cancelled once started. Affected: Cohere, GoogleGemini, Groq, LlamaIndex. |
| 71 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across ~9 files:** User-supplied identifiers interpolated directly into URL paths without encoding. | 108 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Healthcare/Dicom | 57, | sdk-audit | `await Task.CompletedTask; // Make async for consistency` — no-op await to suppress warning. Artificial async. |
| 109 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Innovations/*.cs | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across ~10 files:** `StringContent` created for `PostAsync` never disposed. Affects: BgpAware, ConnectionDigitalTwin, ConnectionTelemetryFabric, DataSovereignty, FederatedMultiSource, IntentBasedServiceDiscovery, NeuralProtocolTranslation, PredictiveMultipathing. |
| 110 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Innovations/ChameleonProtocol | 98, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 4 files:** Bare `catch { }` in probe/monitor loops swallows `OperationCanceledException`. |

| 112 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/IoT/AmqpIoT,BacNet,CoAp,Knx | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC Rule 13 stubs across 4 IoT strategies:** `ReadTelemetryAsync` returns static metadata dictionaries without performing any wire protocol I/O. `SendCommandAsync` returns fabricated "queued" JSON without sending commands. | 113 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/IoT/AwsIoTCore | 64, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `TestCoreAsync` returns `true` for any non-503 status (401/403/404 report as healthy). |
| 114 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/IoT/AwsIoTCore | 130, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `SendCommandAsync` uses GET instead of POST on AWS Jobs/Azure Direct Methods/Google sendCommand endpoints. | 115 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/IoT/AwsIoTCore,AzureIoTHub,GoogleIoT | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 3 files:** `new HttpClient` per connection without `IHttpClientFactory`. Socket exhaustion from TIME_WAIT accumulation. |
| 116 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/IoT/BacNet | 46, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `UdpClient.Connect()` always succeeds regardless of device existence. Strategies report successful connection for any syntactically valid address. |

| 118 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Legacy+IoT/As400,Cics,Db2Mainframe,Ims,Zigbee,Modbus,MqttIoT,OpcUa | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 8 files:** `ConnectionString.Split(':')` with no null/empty guard → `NullReferenceException`. `int.Parse(parts[1])` with no TryParse/range validation → cryptic `FormatException`. |
| 119 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Legacy+Messaging/Tn3270 | 26, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 9 files:** `int.Parse(parts[1])` with no TryParse → cryptic `FormatException` for non-numeric ports. |
| 120 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Legacy+Messaging/Tn3270 | 27, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 9 files:** `TcpClient` created but if `ConnectAsync` throws, `TcpClient` not disposed. No `using` or try/finally. |
| 121 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Legacy/FtpSftp | 70,240 | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 6 files:** Bare `catch { return false; }` in `TestCoreAsync` swallows `OperationCanceledException`. Cancellation treated as unhealthy instead of propagated. |
| 122 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Messaging/AmazonMsk | 108, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `Task.Delay(100ms)` busy-poll caps throughput at 10 batches/sec. No backoff or fetch-wait. |
| 123 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Messaging/AwsEventBridge | 23, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `HttpClient` created in `ConnectCoreAsync` — if connect succeeds but later step throws, `HttpClient` leaked. No dispose on connection loss. |
| 124 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Messaging/AwsEventBridge | 24, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `response.StatusCode != ServiceUnavailable` as health check — 401/403/404/500 all reported as "healthy". |
| 125 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Messaging/AwsEventBridge | 59-77, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `SubscribeAsync` does `yield break` after 5s delay — returns nothing without throwing `NotSupportedException`. Contract lie. |
| 126 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/* | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across all 15 files:** No batch-size guard before serialization. Arbitrarily large payloads will breach API limits (413). |
| 127 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/* | - | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across all 15 files:** No null/empty validation on metrics/logs/traces parameters before serialization. |
| 128 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/AwsCloudWatch | 11, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `TestCoreAsync` returns `Task.FromResult(true)` unconditionally — no network probe. Rule 13 stub. `GetHealthCoreAsync` same. |

| 152 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/DetectionStrategies.cs` + `DriverStrategies.cs` + `FormatStrategies.cs` + `NetworkFilesystemStrategies.cs` + `SpecializedStrategies.cs` + all block-I/O strategies | - | sdk-audit | No path traversal validation on user-supplied `path` in any strategy. | 165 | MEDIUM | UltimateInterface/Strategies/REST/ODataInterfaceStrategy.cs | 152-155 | sdk-audit | `$top=0` causes infinite loop: `Enumerable.Range(0, 0)` returns empty but the response claims `totalCount = 1000` with `nextLink` pointing to offset 0 again. Client loops forever. |

| 169 | MEDIUM | UltimateInterface/Strategies/RPC/ConnectRpcInterfaceStrategy.cs | 173-176 | sdk-audit | `catch { }` in streaming response loop silently drops serialization errors. Partial response delivered as complete. |
| 170 | MEDIUM | UltimateInterface/Strategies/RPC/GrpcWebInterfaceStrategy.cs | 145-148 | sdk-audit | gRPC-Web base64 response encoding uses `Convert.ToBase64String` on pre-framed bytes but omits the 5-byte gRPC length-prefix on the trailers frame. Non-conformant gRPC-Web response. |
| 171 | HIGH | UltimateInterface/Strategies/RPC/GrpcWebInterfaceStrategy.cs | 187-190 | sdk-audit | Error path sets `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` (CORS wildcard). Combined with credentials, allows any origin to receive gRPC-Web error details. |

| 175 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Strategies/ZFS/ZfsRaidStrategies.cs:~302,~362-377 | - | sdk-audit | ZFS self-healing and actual I/O not implemented. Comments: "In production, would rewrite corrupted blocks", "In production: Write data + metadata", "Read from actual disk". |

| 178 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Network/NfsStrategy.cs` (MountWindowsAsync/MountUnixAsync) | - | sdk-audit | `_exportPath`, `_mountPoint`, `_serverAddress` incorporated into shell command strings without sanitization. Empty mountPoint crashes child process. |
| 179 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Network/NfsStrategy.cs` (MountWindowsAsync/MountUnixAsync) | - | sdk-audit | Process.WaitForExit() (sync overload) inside async Task — blocks calling thread for OS mount duration. Use WaitForExitAsync. |
| 180 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Network/NvmeOfStrategy.cs` (entire data path) | - | sdk-audit | Class named NvmeOfStrategy but I/O uses HTTP REST + base64 JSON — no NVMe-oF protocol implemented. Naming/contract lie compounding simulation. |
| 181 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/OpenStack/CinderStrategy.cs` (_volumeCache) | - | sdk-audit | Dictionary accessed under lock for writes but read in GetVolumeIdAsync without lock — unsynchronized concurrent read. |

| 183 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/SSTableReader.cs` (GetAsync/ScanAsync) | - | sdk-audit | `_stream` shared state with no synchronization. Concurrent readers corrupt seek position. SSTableReaders shared via LsmTreeEngine snapshots. |
| 184 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/SSTableWriter.cs` (WriteAsync) | - | sdk-audit | No validation that sortedEntries is actually sorted — unsorted input creates corrupt index breaking binary search. |
| 185 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/WalWriter.cs` (ReplayAsync/AppendAsync) | - | sdk-audit | No guard preventing concurrent replay + append. In crash-recovery race, append interleaves with replay read. |

| 192 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/SoftwareDefined/JuiceFsStrategy.cs` (_encryptionKey) | - | sdk-audit | Encryption key stored as plain string field. No zeroing on dispose. |

| # | Sev | File | Line(s) | Source | Finding |

| 1 | HIGH | PluginMarketplace/PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 122-134 | sdk-audit | `Console.Error.WriteLine` for security warnings — bypasses structured logging, invisible in non-console deployments. |
| 2 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplace/PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 512-516 | sdk-audit | `InstallPluginViaKernelAsync` returns `true` on `TimeoutException` — "treat as potential success". Catalog diverges from kernel state. Same in uninstall. |
| 3 | LOW | PluginMarketplace/PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 538 | sdk-audit | `HasUpdate` set to `true` immediately after install if version differs from latest — misleading. |
| 4 | LOW | PluginMarketplace/PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 660-682 | sdk-audit | O(n*m) scan in `GetReverseDependencies` on every uninstall. |
| 5 | HIGH | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 42 | agent-scan | Fire-and-forget analytics timer callback — exceptions unobserved |
| 6 | LOW | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 50 | inspectcode | [Private field can be converted into local variable] The field is always assigned before being used and can be converted into a local variable |
| 7 | LOW | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 101 | inspectcode | [Assignment is not used] The value passed to the method is never used because it is overwritten in the method body before being read |
| 8 | LOW | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 101 | inspectcode | [Assignment is not used] Value assigned is not used in any execution path |
| 9 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 181 | agent-scan | Mutates incoming message payload directly (shared reference corruption) |
| 10 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 495 | agent-scan | No MessageBus = silent success — reports installed when not |
| 11 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 519 | agent-scan | Empty catch returns false — all install errors hidden |
| 12 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 653 | agent-scan | Empty catch returns false — uninstall errors hidden |
| 13 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 1058 | inspectcode | [Method supports cancellation] Method has overload with cancellation support |
| 14 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 1163 | inspectcode | [Expression is always 'true' or always 'false'] Expression is always true |
| 15 | MEDIUM | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 1418 | inspectcode | [Expression is always 'true' or always 'false'] Expression is always true |
| 16 | LOW | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 3281 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name '_totalInstalls' does not match rule 'Instance fields (not private)'. Suggested name is 'TotalInstalls'. |
| 17 | LOW | PluginMarketplacePlugin.cs | 3284 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name '_totalUninstalls' does not match rule 'Instance fields (not private)'. Suggested name is 'TotalUninstalls'. |

| 460 | HIGH | Contracts/Security/SecurityStrategy.cs | 477,611-730 | sdk-audit | Mixed `Interlocked.*` + `lock(_statsLock)` on same fields — `IncrementErrorCount` races with `ResetStatistics`, `_totalEvaluationTimeMs` read non-atomically relative to `_totalEvaluations`. |
| 461 | MEDIUM | Contracts/Security/SecurityStrategy.cs | 541-545 | sdk-audit | `EvaluateAsync` wraps `OperationCanceledException` in `SecurityException` — breaks standard cancellation semantics. |
| 462 | HIGH | Contracts/Security/SecurityStrategy.cs | 672-689 | sdk-audit | `EvaluateDomainCoreAsync` silently returns Deny on domain mismatch instead of forcing override — spurious denials for all domains except the one `EvaluateCoreAsync` returns. |
| 463 | MEDIUM | Contracts/SemanticSync/ISyncFidelityController.cs | 64 | sdk-audit | `FidelityPolicy` record contains mutable `Dictionary` — breaks immutability contract, concurrent mutation risk. |
| 464 | MEDIUM | Contracts/SemanticSync/SemanticSyncStrategyBase.cs | 76-80 | sdk-audit | Cosine similarity loop has no SIMD hint — scalar for 512-4096 dimension vectors (perf note). |
| 465 | MEDIUM | Contracts/Spatial/GpsCoordinate.cs | 74-77 | sdk-audit | `Equals` uses direct `==` on `double` latitude/longitude/altitude — IEEE 754 false-negative equality for computed coordinates. |
| 466 | MEDIUM | Contracts/Spatial/ISpatialAnchorStrategy.cs | 5 | sdk-audit | Missing `[SdkCompatibility]` attribute on public interface — tooling cannot determine minimum SDK version. |
| 467 | MEDIUM | Contracts/Spatial/SpatialAnchor.cs | 38-43 | sdk-audit | `CreatedAt`/`ExpiresAt` are `DateTime` not `DateTimeOffset` — timezone ambiguity in expiry check. |
| 468 | MEDIUM | Contracts/Spatial/VisualFeatureSignature.cs | 62 | sdk-audit | `CapturedAt <= DateTime.UtcNow` comparison on plain `DateTime` — timezone-ambiguous. |
| 469 | HIGH | Contracts/StorageOrchestratorBase.cs | 15 | sdk-audit | `_strategy` field not volatile — concurrent reads can see stale reference after `SetStrategy`. |
| 470 | HIGH | Contracts/StorageOrchestratorBase.cs | 71 | sdk-audit | `data.Length` read without `CanSeek` guard — throws `NotSupportedException` on non-seekable streams. |
| 471 | HIGH | Contracts/StorageOrchestratorBase.cs | 154-155 | sdk-audit | `DeleteAsync` passes no `ct` to providers, swallows partial failures silently. |
| 472 | MEDIUM | Contracts/StorageOrchestratorBase.cs | 163-165 | sdk-audit | `GetHealthAsync` returns `IsHealthy = true` unconditionally — hardcoded lie. |
| 473 | HIGH | Contracts/StorageOrchestratorBase.cs | 329-330 | sdk-audit | `ExistsBatchAsync` only checks first provider — ignores strategy, false negatives for mirrored/WAL. |
| 474 | HIGH | Contracts/StrategyBase.cs | 88-98 | sdk-audit | `InitializeAsync` broken DCL — `_initialized` not volatile, set outside lock after await. Race allows duplicate init. |
| 475 | MEDIUM | Contracts/StrategyRegistry.cs | 224-228 | sdk-audit | `DiscoverFromAssembly` silently skips instantiation failures — caller cannot detect them. |
| 476 | CRITICAL | Contracts/TamperProof/AccessLogEntry.cs | 232-237 | sdk-audit | `ComputeBlake3Hash` silently returns SHA512 — callers requesting Blake3 get wrong algorithm with no indication. Security contract lie. |
| 477 | MEDIUM | Contracts/TamperProof/AccessLogEntry.cs | 492-560 | sdk-audit | `FromEntries` runs 4 extra LINQ passes over large collections instead of single foreach. |
| 478 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/IAccessLogProvider.cs | 131 | sdk-audit | All 5 TamperProof bases: `ComputeHashAsync` wraps sync `sha.ComputeHash(Stream)` in `Task.FromResult` — blocks thread. |
| 479 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/IAccessLogProvider.cs | 500-514 | sdk-audit | `PurgeAsync` base queries entries but deletes nothing — silent no-op purge. |
| 480 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/IBlockchainProvider.cs | 562-564 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { return false; }` in `ValidateChainIntegrityAsync` — network errors indistinguishable from corruption. |
| 481 | MEDIUM | Contracts/TamperProof/IBlockchainProvider.cs | 600-602 | sdk-audit | Merkle tree uses string concat — second preimage collision vulnerability. |
| 482 | CRITICAL | Contracts/TamperProof/ITamperProofProvider.cs | 329-339 | sdk-audit | Pre-write log entry has `Succeeded=false` with no `ErrorMessage` — fails own `Validate()`, throws on every write. |
| 483 | CRITICAL | Contracts/TamperProof/ITamperProofProvider.cs | 402,419 | sdk-audit | `Principal = "system"` hardcoded in tamper-proof audit log — defeats forensic attribution for all read/audit ops. |
| 484 | MEDIUM | Contracts/TamperProof/ITimeLockProvider.cs | 228-280 | sdk-audit | `LockAsync` doesn't verify object existence before delegating to abstract. |
| 485 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/IWormStorageProvider.cs | 283-284 | sdk-audit | `VerifyAsync` unconditionally returns `verified=true` — silent integrity bypass for any non-overriding subclass. |
| 486 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/IWormStorageProvider.cs | 287-291 | sdk-audit | `ComputeHashAsync` blocks on `sha.ComputeHash(data)` stream read — sync-over-async. |
| 487 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/IWormStorageProvider.cs | 348,537-546 | sdk-audit | `RequestRetentionPolicyAsync` always returns null + region explicitly named "Stub Types". |
| 488 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/IWormStorageProvider.cs | 415 | sdk-audit | `ExtendRetentionAsync` skips validation when retention is indefinite (null) — past dates accepted. |
| 489 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/TamperIncidentReport.cs | 77-78 | sdk-audit | `RelatedAccessLogs` typed as `List<object>?` with "when type is available" comment — deferred type binding. |
| 490 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/TamperProofConfiguration.cs | 297-303 | sdk-audit | `required` properties have unreachable null guards — dead code creates confusing validation output. |
| 491 | HIGH | Contracts/TamperProof/TamperProofManifest.cs | 241-274 | sdk-audit | `ComputeManifestHash` hardcodes SHA-256 regardless of configured `HashAlgorithm` — self-consistency broken. |
| 492 | MEDIUM | Contracts/TamperProof/TamperProofResults.cs | 886-906 | sdk-audit | `IntegrityHash.Parse` sets `ComputedAt = UtcNow` — falsified audit timestamp on parsed hashes. |
| 493 | MEDIUM | Contracts/TamperProof/TamperProofResults.cs | 1123-1126 | sdk-audit | `AuditChain.GetVersion` uses O(n) linear scan on ordered list — should be binary search or index. |
| 494 | MEDIUM | Contracts/TamperProof/TimeLockTypes.cs | 14-62 | sdk-audit | `TimeLockPolicy` record has no `Validate()` — `Min > Max` and empty unlock conditions unenforced. |
| 495 | CRITICAL | Contracts/TamperProof/WriteContext.cs | 43-46 | sdk-audit | `ClientIp`, `UserAgent`, `SessionId` stored in audit records without any length/format validation — injection into tamper-proof manifests. |
| 496 | MEDIUM | Contracts/Transit/DataTransitStrategyBase.cs | 73,161 | sdk-audit | `_lastUpdateTime` not thread-safe despite "Thread-safe" class claim — torn reads on DateTime. |
| 497 | HIGH | Contracts/Transit/TransitAuditTypes.cs | 72 | sdk-audit | Auto-generated `AuditId = Guid.NewGuid()` in record breaks equality/dedup semantics. |
| 498 | HIGH | Contracts/Transit/TransitAuditTypes.cs | 87-102 | sdk-audit | `TransitAuditEntry` has no validation — `StrategyId` defaults to empty, `Timestamp` can be MinValue. |
| 499 | HIGH | Contracts/Transit/TransitAuditTypes.cs | 97-102 | sdk-audit | Endpoint URIs logged without credential redaction — `sftp://user:password@host` leaks to bus. |
| 500 | HIGH | Contracts/TransitEncryptionPluginBases.cs | 105,266-281 | sdk-audit | `_presetsInitialized` is plain `bool` in double-checked lock pattern — outer check at line 266 is non-volatile read, no memory barrier on fast path. Double-initialization race on weak-ordering architectures. |

Stream header extraction never implemented. |
| 502 | MEDIUM | Contracts/TransitEncryptionPluginBases.cs | 957-984 | sdk-audit | `TranscryptBatchAsync` catches per-item exceptions and adds failed placeholder result with empty byte[] ciphertext — no logging, no error indicator, `_failedOperations` counter not incremented. |

Inner try/catch only covers `GetStatisticsAsync`; outer `Task.Delay` and `HandleBalloonInflation/Deflation` are uncaught. Monitoring loop dies silently on cancellation or exception. |
| 572 | MEDIUM | Deployment/BalloonCoordinator.cs | 168-171 | sdk-audit | `GetBalloonStatusAsync` has bare `catch { return null; }` with no logging — driver errors indistinguishable from "balloon not available". |

| 574 | HIGH | Deployment/BareMetalDetector.cs | 91-93 | sdk-audit | Comment reads "In production, this would check if Phase 35 NvmePassthroughStrategy is available — For now, assume SPDK available if NVMe present". Any NVMe system is misclassified as SPDK-capable. |
| 575 | MEDIUM | Deployment/BareMetalDetector.cs | 113-118 | sdk-audit | Outer catch swallows all exceptions from entire `DetectAsync` body, returns `null` with only a comment — no logging, not even Debug.WriteLine. |
| 576 | HIGH | Deployment/BareMetalDetector.cs | 127 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient` per-call inside `IsCloudEnvironmentAsync` — classic socket exhaustion anti-pattern. Each disposal puts socket in TIME_WAIT for 4 minutes. |
| 577 | HIGH | Deployment/BareMetalOptimizer.cs | 145-173 | sdk-audit | SPDK binding block (Steps 4-5) is commented-out dead code. Logs "SPDK user-space NVMe ACTIVE (simulated)". `ConfigureSpdkOptimizations` at line 179 contains only log statements with "In production" commentary. |
| 578 | HIGH | Deployment/CloudDetector.cs | 46 | sdk-audit | Same per-request `new HttpClient` anti-pattern — creates fresh client on every `DetectAsync` call with up to 5 HTTP requests. |
| 579 | HIGH | Deployment/CloudProviders/AwsProvider.cs | 40 | sdk-audit | All methods are complete stubs — `ProvisionVmAsync` returns Guid-based fake ID with "Simulated instance ID" comment, `GetMetricsAsync` returns hardcoded 45% CPU / 65% storage, `DeprovisionAsync` always returns true. | 581 | MEDIUM | Deployment/CloudProviders/CloudProviderFactory.cs | 41-53 | sdk-audit | Comment describes intended production behavior (dynamic SDK loading via assembly contexts) but implementation just calls `new AwsProvider()`/`new AzureProvider()`/`new GcpProvider()` — all stubs. |
| 582 | HIGH | Deployment/CloudProviders/GcpProvider.cs | 28-68 | sdk-audit | Same stub pattern for GCP — `GetMetricsAsync` returns hardcoded 55% CPU / 75% storage. All operations return faked or empty data. |
| 583 | MEDIUM | Deployment/DeploymentProfileFactory.cs | 39-111 | sdk-audit | `CreateProfile(DeploymentContext context)` has no null check — null context produces opaque NullReferenceException at `context.Environment`. |
| 584 | HIGH | Deployment/EdgeDetector.cs | 132-136 | sdk-audit | Outer catch swallows ALL exceptions including `OperationCanceledException` — returns null with only a comment, no logging. Cancellation tokens silently ignored, bugs invisible. |
| 585 | MEDIUM | Deployment/EdgeDetector.cs | 165-168 | sdk-audit | Catch in `DetectLinuxEdgePlatformAsync` swallows all exceptions with only comment — hides permission errors, OperationCanceledException, genuine bugs from operators. |
| 586 | MEDIUM | Deployment/EdgeDetector.cs | 197-200 | sdk-audit | Catch in `GetLinuxTotalMemoryMbAsync` swallows all exceptions — returns 0, causing edge classification to fail silently. |
| 587 | HIGH | Deployment/EdgeProfiles/EdgeProfileEnforcer.cs | 150-164 | sdk-audit | `FilterPlugins` is a log-only stub — comment says "In production, this would call KernelInfrastructure.DisablePluginsExcept". Plugin-filtering call is commented out. Edge devices load all plugins regardless of `AllowedPlugins` config. |
| 588 | HIGH | Deployment/EdgeProfiles/EdgeProfileEnforcer.cs | 167-182 | sdk-audit | `ConfigureFlashOptimization()` is log-only stub — "In production, this would configure…" comment block. VDE block cache, WAL sync mode, O_DIRECT never configured. SD card wear not reduced. |
| 589 | HIGH | Deployment/EdgeProfiles/EdgeProfileEnforcer.cs | 184-199 | sdk-audit | `ConfigureOfflineResilience()` is log-only stub — local write buffer, retry policy, offline-mode detection never wired up. Edge devices that lose connectivity drop writes silently. |
| 590 | HIGH | Deployment/EdgeProfiles/EdgeProfileEnforcer.cs | 201-214 | sdk-audit | `ConfigureConnectionLimit(int maxConnections)` is log-only stub — "In production, this would use SemaphoreSlim to cap network listeners." Connection limits never enforced on constrained hardware. |
| 591 | HIGH | Deployment/EdgeProfiles/EdgeProfileEnforcer.cs | 217-233 | sdk-audit | `ConfigureBandwidthThrottle(long bytesPerSec)` is log-only stub — "In production, this would implement token bucket algorithm." No rate limiter wired. Cellular links can be saturated. |
| 592 | HIGH | Deployment/FilesystemDetector.cs | 186-210 | sdk-audit | `DetectMacOsFilesystemAsync` passes `path` directly into shell argument via string interpolation `$"-T \"{path}\""` — command injection if path contains quotes/semicolons/backticks. Should use `ArgumentList`. |
| 593 | MEDIUM | Deployment/FilesystemDetector.cs | 218-226 | sdk-audit | `GetLinuxBlockSizeAsync` hardcodes return 4096 regardless of actual block size — comment acknowledges limitation. Same at `GetWindowsBlockSizeAsync`. Wrong for 512-byte or 8KB+ block devices. |
| 594 | MEDIUM | Deployment/HostedOptimizer.cs | 70-111 | sdk-audit | `OptimizeAsync` accepts `vdeContainerPath` but doesn't validate null/empty before passing to shell arguments and file-path operations. |
| 595 | HIGH | Deployment/HostedOptimizer.cs | 219-243 | sdk-audit | `ConfigureIoAlignmentAsync` detects block size then does nothing — "For now, just log the recommendation" comment. I/O alignment optimization never applied to any hosted VM deployment. |
| 596 | MEDIUM | Deployment/HyperscaleProvisioner.cs | 63,84,96,119 | sdk-audit | `_isActive` is non-volatile plain `bool` written from caller thread, read from background `Task.Run` loop. May never observe `false` write on multi-core. |
| 597 | LOW | Deployment/HyperscaleProvisioner.cs | 82,111 | sdk-audit | `StartAutoScalingAsync` is `async` with `await Task.CompletedTask` — meaningless state machine, returns before background loop starts. |
| 598 | MEDIUM | Deployment/HyperscaleProvisioner.cs | 94-109 | sdk-audit | Background scaling loop `Task.Delay` is outside try/catch — `OperationCanceledException` on cancellation silently swallowed by discarded task. |
| 599 | HIGH | Deployment/HyperscaleProvisioner.cs | 212-230 | sdk-audit | `ProvisionNewNodeAsync` returns immediately without waiting for cluster join — "In production: Wait for new node to join cluster" comment. Can cause runaway node provisioning. |
| 600 | LOW | Deployment/HyperscaleProvisioner.cs | 214-223 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded `"general-purpose"` instance type and `100` GB storage in `ProvisionNewNodeAsync` — not user-configurable. |
| 601 | HIGH | Deployment/HyperscaleProvisioner.cs | 259 | sdk-audit | `DeprovisionLeastLoadedNodeAsync` logs "Node drained" but no drain occurred — data on node destroyed without rebalancing. Data loss defect. |
| 602 | HIGH | Deployment/HypervisorOptimizer.cs | 138-152 | sdk-audit | `RegisterLiveMigrationHooksAsync` accepts `preMigrationFlush` callback then discards it — "In production, this would install pre-migration callbacks per hypervisor type" comment. Data loss during live migration. |
| 603 | HIGH | Deployment/HypervisorOptimizer.cs | 154-231 | sdk-audit | All `ConfigureParavirtIo` switch-case branches and `ApplyHypervisorSpecificOptimizations` if/else blocks are log-only stubs with "In production:" comments throughout. Zero actual configuration. |
| 604 | LOW | Deployment/ParavirtIoDetector.cs | 165-177 | sdk-audit | VirtIO SCSI check uses bare vendor ID `1AF4` without requiring SCSI device ID — misclassifies VirtIO Net/Balloon as VirtIO SCSI. |
| 605 | MEDIUM | Deployment/SpdkBindingValidator.cs | 261-268 | sdk-audit | `CheckWindowsMountStatusAsync` always returns `(true, "unknown", true)` — SPDK validation always fails on Windows. "For simplicity" comment confirms deferred work. |

| 641 | MEDIUM | Edge/Bus/PinMapping.cs | 126-171 | sdk-audit | `BeagleBoneBlack` maps 4/92 pins, `JetsonNano` maps 10/40 pins — "partial mapping only" with "placeholder for future expansion" comment. Runtime `ArgumentException` on unmapped pins. |
| 642 | LOW | Edge/Bus/SpiBusController.cs | 31,96 | sdk-audit | `_disposed` fields are non-volatile `bool` — concurrent Dispose+use race can pass disposed check due to missing memory barrier. |
| 643 | HIGH | Edge/Camera/CameraFrameGrabber.cs | 55,81,98,130 | sdk-audit | `*Async` methods (`OpenAsync`, `CloseAsync`, `CaptureFrameAsync`, `UpdateSettingsAsync`) perform blocking native OpenCV calls but return `Task.CompletedTask` — violates async contract, causes thread starvation on constrained devices. |
| 644 | LOW | Edge/Camera/CameraFrameGrabber.cs | 58 | sdk-audit | `int.TryParse(settings.DevicePath)` silently falls back to device index 0 for Linux paths like `/dev/video3` — wrong device opened. |
| 645 | HIGH | Edge/Flash/BadBlockManager.cs | 29,44-62,69,75 | sdk-audit | `_badBlocks` is `HashSet<long>` used across concurrent async paths (`ScanBadBlocksAsync` + `MarkBadAsync` + `IsBad`) without synchronization — corrupts set state, data written to defective blocks. |
| 646 | HIGH | Edge/Flash/FlashDevice.cs | 76-138 | sdk-audit | `LinuxMtdFlashDevice` — every method is a silent no-op stub. `EraseBlockAsync`, `WritePageAsync`, `ReadPageAsync` do nothing. `IsBlockBadAsync` returns hardcoded `false`. No PlatformNotSupportedException. FTL stack silently passes while writing nothing. |
| 647 | HIGH | Edge/Flash/FlashTranslationLayer.cs | 34-38 | sdk-audit | `_logicalToPhysical` (Dictionary), `_freeBlocks` (HashSet), `_dirtyBlocks` (HashSet), `_writeCount`, `_eraseCount` all mutated concurrently with no locks — corrupts L2P map, silent data corruption. |
| 648 | MEDIUM | Edge/Flash/FlashTranslationLayer.cs | 209-214 | sdk-audit | `GarbageCollectAsync` catch block marks block bad but emits no log/metric — silently reduces usable capacity with no operator visibility. |
| 649 | MEDIUM | Edge/Flash/WearLevelingStrategy.cs | 37-51 | sdk-audit | `SelectBlockForWrite` allocates `new List<long>` on every write call — hot-path heap allocation on memory-constrained edge devices. |
| 650 | HIGH | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 61-106 | sdk-audit | Session cache check-then-act (`TryGetValue→build→evict→assign`) not atomic. Concurrent loads orphan native ONNX Runtime handles. |
| 651 | HIGH | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 65-95 | sdk-audit | `SessionOptions` created with `new`, disposed only in catch block — leaked on success path. Per-model-load native memory leak. |
| 652 | HIGH | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 95-106 | sdk-audit | Session leaked on cache-full race — concurrent insert replaces entry without disposing overwritten session's native handle. |
| 653 | MEDIUM | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 98-103 | sdk-audit | Cache eviction uses `First()` (arbitrary) but variable named `oldest` — not LRU/FIFO. Frequently-used models can be evicted. |
| 654 | MEDIUM | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 107,129 | sdk-audit | `LoadModelAsync` and `InferAsync` do blocking CPU/IO work then `return await Task.FromResult(...)` — sync disguised as async. |
| 655 | HIGH | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 118 | sdk-audit | Hard cast `(OnnxInferenceSession)session` with no type guard — `InvalidCastException` with no diagnostic for non-ONNX session types. |
| 656 | HIGH | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 119 | sdk-audit | `session.InputNames[0]` with no empty-check — `IndexOutOfRangeException` on models with zero inputs. |
| 657 | MEDIUM | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 119 | sdk-audit | `session.InputNames[0]` with no empty-check — `IndexOutOfRangeException` on malformed ONNX model with no diagnostic message. |
| 658 | LOW | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 141 | sdk-audit | "Simplified batch implementation" comment — sequential loop defeats batch inference purpose on GPU/NPU. |
| 659 | HIGH | Edge/Inference/OnnxWasiNnHost.cs | 153-158 | sdk-audit | `Dispose` iterates `_sessionCache.Values` while concurrent `LoadModelAsync` may mutate it. If not snapshot-safe, `InvalidOperationException` or missed disposal. |
| 660 | MEDIUM | Edge/Memory/BoundedMemoryRuntime.cs | 111-112 | sdk-audit | `_tracker!` null-forgiving — TOCTOU between `_settings.Enabled` check and `_tracker` assignment can NRE. |
| 661 | MEDIUM | Edge/Memory/BoundedMemoryRuntime.cs | 134-137 | sdk-audit | `Dispose` doesn't null `_monitorTimer` or dispose `_tracker` — timer callback can fire post-dispose. |
| 662 | HIGH | Edge/Memory/MemoryBudgetTracker.cs | 76-88 | sdk-audit | `_allocatedBytes` incremented by requested `size` on Rent but decremented by `array.Length` on Return — counter drifts negative due to ArrayPool rounding. |
| 663 | CRITICAL | Edge/Mesh/BleMesh.cs | 7-52 | sdk-audit | All three mesh implementations self-identify as "Stub implementation demonstrating API contract." Loopback simulation inverts source/destination. `DiscoverTopologyAsync` returns empty lists. Rule 13 violation. |
| 664 | MEDIUM | Edge/Mesh/LoRaMesh.cs | 15,34,56-60 | sdk-audit | `_initialized` plain `bool` (not volatile), `_knownNodes` plain `Dictionary` — both used from multiple threads. Same issue in BleMesh/ZigbeeMesh. |
| 665 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 63-66 | sdk-audit | DTLS flag silently ignored — `UseDtls=true` and `coaps://` URIs use plain `UdpClient`. Security-sensitive IoT payloads travel in cleartext. |
| 666 | MEDIUM | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 69-73 | sdk-audit | `_udpClient` lazy init not thread-safe — concurrent `SendAsync` creates two UdpClients, starts two receive loops, leaks first. |
| 667 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 76-77 | sdk-audit | `_nextMessageId++` on plain `ushort` is not atomic — concurrent sends produce duplicate message IDs, causing response mismatch or permanent hangs. |
| 668 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 88 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded 5-second timeout with no override — LoRa networks (2-20s RTT) always time out. Violates user-configurability. |
| 669 | CRITICAL | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 131-139 | sdk-audit | `ObserveAsync` returns no-op `IDisposable`, never registers callback, never sends Observe option. Callers believe they have live subscription but receive nothing. Silent stub. |
| 670 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 241-245 | sdk-audit | CoAP option encoding violates RFC 7252 — writes absolute option number instead of delta. All requests with options are malformed; client non-functional against real servers. |
| 671 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 253-268 | sdk-audit | Receive loop stored as `_receiveTask` but exceptions consumed by silent catch — task fault leaves all in-flight callers waiting until 5s timeout. |
| 672 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 260 | sdk-audit | `UdpClient.ReceiveAsync()` without CancellationToken — `DisposeAsync` hangs forever on quiet network waiting for UDP packet. |
| 673 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/CoApClient.cs | 263-265 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch (Exception)` in receive loop silences all errors including `ObjectDisposedException`, `SocketException` — causes busy-spin on unrecoverable errors. |
| 674 | MEDIUM | Edge/Protocols/CoApResponse.cs | 26 | sdk-audit | `IsSuccess` uses HTTP-style range check (200-299) but real CoAP servers send wire-encoded codes (e.g., 0x45=2.05) — `IsSuccess` always false for real servers. |
| 675 | MEDIUM | Edge/Protocols/MqttClient.cs | 148-149 | sdk-audit | `_reconnectCts` cancelled/nulled in `DisconnectAsync` without synchronization — races with `OnMqttDisconnectedAsync`, NRE or orphaned CTS. |
| 676 | LOW | Edge/Protocols/MqttClient.cs | 164 | sdk-audit | No MQTT publish topic format validation — wildcards/null chars accepted, rejected at broker with cryptic error. |
| 677 | MEDIUM | Edge/Protocols/MqttClient.cs | 235-239 | sdk-audit | `_subscribedTopics` is `List<string>` with O(n) `Contains` for duplicate detection — quadratic on frequent reconnects. |
| 678 | HIGH | Edge/Protocols/MqttClient.cs | 359 | sdk-audit | Reconnect loop bare `catch (Exception)` swallows `OperationCanceledException` and permanent auth failures — spins for MaxReconnectAttempts against unrecoverable errors. |
| 679 | MEDIUM | Edge/Protocols/MqttClient.cs | 379-381 | sdk-audit | Subscription restoration after reconnect always uses QoS 1, discarding original QoS — QoS 0 gets duplicates, QoS 2 loses exactly-once. |
| 680 | LOW | Edge/Protocols/MqttConnectionSettings.cs | 66 | sdk-audit | `Password` as plain `string` on managed heap — visible in heap dumps, no zeroing or secret-store guidance. |

| 725 | HIGH | Federation/Authorization/InMemoryPermissionCache.cs | 56 | sdk-audit | `BoundedDictionary` constructed with hardcoded `1000` instead of `_config.MaxEntries` — ignores user configuration, 10x higher cache miss rate than configured. |
| 726 | LOW | Federation/Authorization/PermissionAwareRouter.cs | 199 | sdk-audit | `DateTime.UtcNow` in audit log payload instead of `DateTimeOffset.UtcNow` — inconsistent with rest of codebase. |
| 727 | MEDIUM | Federation/Authorization/PermissionAwareRouter.cs | 207-210 | sdk-audit | Security denial audit logs silently discarded with no diagnostic trace — compliance/forensics gap. |
| 728 | MEDIUM | Federation/Authorization/PermissionAwareRouter.cs | 252,288 | sdk-audit | `TryExtractBool`/`TryExtractString` swallow all reflection exceptions — property getter throws → permanent silent denial with no trace. |
| 729 | HIGH | Federation/Catalog/ManifestCache.cs | 37 | sdk-audit | BoundedDictionary hardcoded capacity 1,000 — `_maxSize` parameter (default 100,000) completely ignored. Cache collapses at 1K entries regardless of config. |
| 730 | MEDIUM | Federation/Catalog/ManifestCache.cs | 58-65 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU race in Set() eviction: check-evict-insert not atomic — concurrent calls can double-evict or overflow by 1. |
| 731 | HIGH | Federation/Catalog/ManifestStateMachine.cs | 35 | sdk-audit | `_disposed` not volatile; no disposed-check guard in Apply/GetSnapshot/RestoreSnapshot — post-Dispose calls throw opaque ObjectDisposedException from ReaderWriterLockSlim internals. Same defect in ClusterTopology:31. |
| 732 | LOW | Federation/Catalog/ManifestStateMachine.cs | 70 | sdk-audit | `RestoreSnapshot` no null/empty guard on `snapshot` — null throws opaque ArgumentNullException from JsonSerializer. |
| 733 | LOW | Federation/Catalog/ManifestStateMachine.cs | 92-95 | sdk-audit | `Apply` no null guard on `logEntry` — null from Raft log compaction throws unhandled in OnCommit callback. |
| 734 | MEDIUM | Federation/Catalog/ManifestStateMachine.cs | 100-130 | sdk-audit | `Apply()` switch on `command.Action` has no default case — unknown Raft log actions silently dropped; log corruption invisible. |
| 735 | MEDIUM | Federation/Catalog/ManifestStateMachine.cs | 207-224 | sdk-audit | `GetStatistics()` makes 4-5 LINQ passes over `_index.Values` under read lock — blocks all writers on large manifests. |
| 736 | HIGH | Federation/Orchestration/FederationOrchestrator.cs | 77 | sdk-audit | `_ = RunHealthCheckLoopAsync(_cts.Token)` — fire-and-forget discards health loop task. Exceptions silently kill health monitoring; cluster degrades without signal. |
| 737 | MEDIUM | Federation/Orchestration/FederationOrchestrator.cs | 91-138 | sdk-audit | No validation on `registration.NodeId`, `Address`, or `Port` — empty NodeId inserts phantom node, null Address propagates, invalid Port unchecked. |
| 738 | MEDIUM | Federation/Orchestration/FederationOrchestrator.cs | 104 | sdk-audit | `FreeBytes = registration.TotalBytes` — always assumes 100% free at registration; rejoining nodes with data get writes directed to full disks. |
| 739 | MEDIUM | Federation/Orchestration/FederationOrchestrator.cs | 110-123 | sdk-audit | Raft path never updates local `_topology` after proposal — leader's own routing returns stale topology until external commit callback. |
| 740 | HIGH | Federation/Orchestration/FederationOrchestrator.cs | 220 | sdk-audit | `RegisterNodeAsync(registration, bool skipTopologyRateLimit, ct)` is public but absent from `IFederationOrchestrator` interface — callers via interface silently lack rate-limit bypass. |
| 741 | HIGH | Federation/Orchestration/FederationOrchestrator.cs | 315-320 | sdk-audit | `_topology` (ClusterTopology : IDisposable, owns ReaderWriterLockSlim) never disposed in Dispose() — handle leak per instance. |
| 742 | HIGH | Federation/Replication/LocationAwareReplicaSelector.cs | 184-198 | sdk-audit | `GetLeaderNodeIdAsync` returns null for all non-leader nodes — `ConsistencyLevel.Strong` always throws InvalidOperationException in multi-node clusters. Doc comment says "Placeholder Implementation". |
| 743 | MEDIUM | Federation/Replication/ReplicaFallbackChain.cs | 49 | sdk-audit | `GetNodeTopologyAsync(replicaId)` called without CancellationToken — topology fetch uncancellable. |
| 744 | MEDIUM | Federation/Replication/ReplicationAwareRouter.cs | 109-147 | sdk-audit | Fallback loop always re-fetches `fallbackChain[0]` without tracking tried nodes — can retry same failing replica for all MaxFallbackAttempts. |
| 745 | LOW | Federation/Routing/DualHeadRouter.cs | 39,79 | sdk-audit | `BoundedDictionary(1000)` for 2-member `RequestLanguage` enum — 500x over-allocated routing counter. |
| 746 | MEDIUM | Federation/Routing/PatternBasedClassifier.cs:ClassifyRequest | - | sdk-audit | No null check on `request.Key` — NullReferenceException on any request with null key hitting regex patterns. |
| 747 | HIGH | Federation/Routing/RoutingPipeline.cs:ObjectPipeline,FilePathPipeline | - | sdk-audit | Both `ObjectPipeline` and `FilePathPipeline` throw `NotSupportedException` unconditionally — stub implementations behind production interfaces. |
| 748 | LOW | Federation/Routing/StorageRequest.cs:EstimatedSizeBytes | - | sdk-audit | `EstimatedSizeBytes` defaults to 0 — capacity-based routing always sees 0-byte requests when callers don't set it. |
| 749 | MEDIUM | Federation/Topology/LocationAwareRouter.cs:RouteAsync | - | sdk-audit | Catch-all `catch (Exception)` returns empty `RoutingDecision` — caller cannot distinguish "no route" from "routing failed"; errors silently swallowed. |
| 750 | LOW | Federation/Topology/LocationAwareRouter.cs:RouteAsync | - | sdk-audit | No validation that `RoutingPolicy.PreferredRegion` or `RoutingPolicy.PreferredZone` are non-null before string comparison. |
| 751 | MEDIUM | Federation/Topology/ProximityCalculator.cs:CalculateCapacityScore | - | sdk-audit | Capacity score: `node.FreeBytes / (double)node.TotalBytes` — division by zero when TotalBytes=0 (uninitialized node). |
| 752 | MEDIUM | Federation/Topology/ProximityCalculator.cs:CalculateLatencyScore | - | sdk-audit | Latency score formula divides by `node.EstimatedLatencyMs` — returns infinity for 0ms latency; NaN propagates through routing weights. |
| 753 | LOW | Federation/Topology/ProximityCalculator.cs:CalculateProximity | - | sdk-audit | Allocates `new List<(string, double)>` per call in hot routing path — consider pooling or array. |

| 828 | HIGH | Hardware/Accelerators/MetalInterop.cs | 302-376 | sdk-audit | CPU fallback disguised as GPU execution — Metal, OpenCL, SYCL, Triton, Vulkan, WebGPU all report hardware available then silently compute on CPU via Task.Run. | 829 | HIGH | Hardware/Accelerators/Pkcs11Wrapper.cs | 188-203 | sdk-audit | `CK_FUNCTION_LIST` struct has only 6 of 70+ PKCS#11 function pointers — `[StructLayout(Sequential)]` maps wrong offsets for `C_OpenSession`/`C_Login`. |
| 830 | CRITICAL | Hardware/Accelerators/Pkcs11Wrapper.cs | 189-203 | sdk-audit | P/Invoke struct layout mismatch — HSM `C_Login` with PIN may invoke arbitrary function pointer. Memory safety and security defect. |
| 831 | HIGH | Hardware/Accelerators/QatAccelerator.cs | 87-163 | sdk-audit | Non-volatile `_isAvailable`/`_initialized` written inside lock, read outside via `IsAvailable` property — stale reads on ARM. |
| 832 | MEDIUM | Hardware/Accelerators/QatAccelerator.cs | 88-90 | sdk-audit | `_initialized` non-volatile, visible outside lock in `IsAvailable` — stale reads possible. |

| 835 | HIGH | Hardware/Accelerators/Tpm2Provider.cs | 279-315 | sdk-audit | Double-checked locking on non-volatile `_isAvailable` — ARM64 unsafe, spurious re-initialization. |
| 836 | HIGH | Hardware/Accelerators/TritonInterop.cs | 215-223 | sdk-audit | `entryPoint` parameter inserted into shell-out arguments without quoting/sanitization — command injection via model config. |
| 837 | HIGH | Hardware/Accelerators/WasiNnAccelerator.cs | 344-348 | sdk-audit | Silent CPU fallback on unavailable backend — no log, no event, no signal to caller of >10x performance degradation. |

| 839 | HIGH | Hardware/Accelerators/WasiNnAccelerator.cs | 446-458 | sdk-audit | `MapBackendToProvider` silently maps ROCm/CoreML/NNAPI/OpenCL/CANN to CPU — hardware detected but never used. |
| 840 | HIGH | Hardware/DriverLoader.cs | 72,355-373 | sdk-audit | Use-after-dispose race: `_loadLock` disposed while `UnloadAsync` still holds/releases it — `ObjectDisposedException` in finally block. |
| 841 | MEDIUM | Hardware/DriverLoader.cs | 104,149 | sdk-audit | `ScanAsync`/`ScanDirectoryAsync` declared async but do synchronous assembly loading — blocks threadpool, CS1998 warning. |
| 842 | HIGH | Hardware/DriverLoader.cs | 355-356 | sdk-audit | Sync-over-async `.Wait()` on `UnloadAsync` inside `Dispose()` — deadlock risk when SemaphoreSlim.WaitAsync blocks under single-threaded SyncContext. |
| 843 | HIGH | Hardware/DriverLoader.cs | 393-394 | sdk-audit | `async void` FileSystemWatcher event handlers — unhandled exceptions crash the process. |

| 845 | MEDIUM | Hardware/Hypervisor/BalloonDriver.cs | 82-101 | sdk-audit | `RegisterPressureHandler` stores callback but never subscribes to OS/hypervisor memory pressure — handler never invoked during real balloon events. |
| 846 | HIGH | Hardware/Hypervisor/HypervisorDetector.cs | 60-78 | sdk-audit | Double-checked locking on non-volatile `_cachedResult` reference — ARM64 may observe partially-constructed `HypervisorInfo`. |

| 848 | HIGH | Hardware/Interop/CrossLanguageSdkPorts.cs | 152-266 | sdk-audit | Full C ABI interop (Read/Write/Delete/List/Query) is a stub — all operations return empty success. Comment: "In production, this would route through the kernel's storage pipeline." Data loss at interop boundary. |

| 1823 | MEDIUM | Security/AccessVerificationMatrix.cs | 162-176 | sdk-audit | RemoveRules rebuilds ConcurrentBag without lock — concurrent AddRule entries lost between read and reassignment. Dead `_evaluationLock` field (line 23) never used. |
| 1824 | LOW | Security/ActiveDirectory/SpnegoNegotiator.cs | 99 | sdk-audit | `RejectLegacyEncryption` is mutable `{ get; set; }` — security policy flag settable after construction, race between config and request processing. |
| 1825 | LOW | Security/IKeyRotationPolicy.cs | 174-178 | sdk-audit | KeyRotationMetadata uses `DateTime` (not DateTimeOffset) for CreatedAt/LastUsedAt/LastRotatedAt — ambiguous UTC vs local in distributed system. |
| 1826 | LOW | Security/IKeyStore.cs | 161-172 | sdk-audit | GetKeyNativeAsync default implementation doesn't forward CancellationToken to inner GetKeyAsync call. |
| 1827 | HIGH | Security/IKeyStore.cs | 180 | sdk-audit | `GetKey(string)` sync method on interface forces sync-over-async in all cloud KMS implementations — needs `[Obsolete(error:true)]`. |
| 1828 | HIGH | Security/IncidentResponse/IncidentResponseEngine.cs | 31,301-323 | sdk-audit | `_subscriptions` is plain `List<IDisposable>` mutated from StartMonitoring while Dispose iterates — unsynchronized concurrent List mutation. |
| 1829 | MEDIUM | Security/IncidentResponse/IncidentResponseEngine.cs | 55 | sdk-audit | `ActiveIncidentCount` property does O(n) LINQ Count on every access — hot property for metrics/health checks. |
| 1830 | CRITICAL | Security/IncidentResponse/IncidentResponseEngine.cs | 109 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `_ = _auditTrail.RecordAsync(...)` in CreateIncident — audit write failure silently swallowed, compliance-critical data loss for security incident engine. |
| 1831 | MEDIUM | Security/IncidentResponse/IncidentResponseEngine.cs | 221,247-249 | sdk-audit | `Incident.Status`/`ResolvedAt`/`Resolution` mutated without synchronization across concurrent playbook + resolution calls. |
| 1832 | HIGH | Security/IncidentResponse/IncidentResponseEngine.cs | 265-275 | sdk-audit | `RegisterAutoResponseRule` accepts arbitrary regex without compile-time validation — ReDoS pattern consumes 100ms per security event during attack. |
| 1833 | HIGH | Security/IncidentResponse/IncidentResponseEngine.cs | 306-323 | sdk-audit | Three `_ = EvaluateAutoResponseRulesAsync(msg)` fire-and-forget in bus subscriptions — no fault observation, no back-pressure, unlimited concurrent evaluations. |
| 1834 | LOW | Security/ISecurityContext.cs | 33 | sdk-audit | CommandIdentity default returns null — callers silently skip hierarchy evaluation when implementations forget to override. |
| 1835 | HIGH | Security/KeyManagement/CloudKmsProvider.cs | 163-179 | sdk-audit | GcpKmsProvider LoadKeyFromStorage generates DEK, wraps with KMS, but discards `wrappedDek` — plaintext DEK cached with no recovery path, data loss on restart. |
| 1836 | MEDIUM | Security/KeyManagement/CloudKmsProvider.cs | 175 | sdk-audit | LoadKeyFromStorage hardcodes CancellationToken.None — outer cancellation cannot interrupt in-progress KMS wrap. Same in SecretsManagerKeyStore:739,777. |
| 1837 | MEDIUM | Security/KeyManagement/CloudKmsProvider.cs | 258-268,744-754 | sdk-audit | WrapKeyAsync/UnwrapKeyAsync discard caller's CancellationToken, pass CancellationToken.None to inner KMS ops. |
| 1838 | HIGH | Security/KeyManagement/CloudKmsProvider.cs | 343-375 | sdk-audit | Token cache race: `_cachedAccessToken` and `_tokenExpiry` read without lock in fast-path; non-atomic pair allows stale token+expiry mismatch. Same in SecretsManagerKeyStore:925. |
| 1839 | MEDIUM | Security/KeyManagement/CloudKmsProvider.cs | 410-417 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient()` per token exchange call — socket exhaustion under load. Existing `_httpClient` field should be reused. |
| 1840 | HIGH | Security/KeyManagement/SecretsManagerKeyStore.cs | 434,478 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { return false; }` in TryLoadCredentialsFile + `catch { /* IMDS not available */ }` — swallows all exceptions including security-relevant I/O failures. Same in CloudKmsProvider:824. |
| 1841 | LOW | Security/NativeKeyHandle.cs | 85 | sdk-audit | `Span` property returns `new Span<byte>(_pointer, _length)` from freed memory if called after Dispose — no ObjectDisposedException guard. |
| 1842 | HIGH | Security/NativeKeyHandle.cs | 116-119 | sdk-audit | Non-atomic dispose: `_isDisposed` set true before `NativeMemory.Clear`+`Free` — concurrent thread sees disposed but key material still in memory, or accesses freed memory. |
| 1843 | HIGH | Security/OsHardening/PluginSandbox.cs | 238-242 | sdk-audit | Sandbox failure silently falls back to unsandboxed execution — fail-open security: if sandbox can't be created, plugin runs with full privileges. |
| 1844 | MEDIUM | Security/OsHardening/SeccompProfile.cs | 156-160 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in profile application — `catch { /* seccomp not supported */ }` doesn't distinguish "not supported" from "failed to apply". |
| 1845 | MEDIUM | Security/OsHardening/SecurityVerification.cs | 67,89,112 | sdk-audit | Three `Console.WriteLine` calls in verification output — should use ILogger or Debug.WriteLine. |
| 1846 | LOW | Security/PluginIdentity.cs | 35-40 | sdk-audit | Certificate thumbprint stored as string with no format validation — accepts any string, not validated as hex SHA-1/SHA-256. |
| 1847 | HIGH | Security/SecretManager.cs | 102-108 | sdk-audit | `Enum.Parse` on untrusted input without TryParse — throws FormatException leaking valid enum member names in error message. |
| 1848 | LOW | Security/SecretManager.cs | 145 | sdk-audit | `ListSecrets()` returns `IReadOnlyDictionary` exposing internal key set — caller can enumerate all secret names. |
| 1849 | MEDIUM | Security/SecurityConfigLock.cs | 78-85 | sdk-audit | `_lockAcquired` bool written inside lock but read outside lock in IsLocked property — torn read on 32-bit, stale cache on 64-bit without volatile. |
| 1850 | MEDIUM | Security/SecurityContracts.cs | 45-50 | sdk-audit | `ISecurityAuditable.GetAuditTrail` returns `IEnumerable<string>` — stringly-typed audit trail, no structured data. |
| 1851 | LOW | Security/Siem/ISiemTransport.cs | 28 | sdk-audit | `SendEventAsync` returns `Task<bool>` — should return result object with failure reason, not just bool. |

| 1853 | HIGH | Security/Siem/SiemTransportBridge.cs | 306 | sdk-audit | `_processingTask.Wait(5000)` result discarded, then CancellationTokenSource disposed while processing task may still be running — ObjectDisposedException race. |
| 1854 | HIGH | Security/Siem/SiemTransportBridge.cs | 418-425 | sdk-audit | UDP client lazy initialization not thread-safe — `_udpClient` field read/write without lock, concurrent calls can create duplicate clients. |

| 1936 | MEDIUM | Storage/HybridStoragePluginBase.cs | 133,555 | sdk-audit | `_disposed` not volatile, non-atomic check-then-set — concurrent DisposeAsyncCore calls both pass guard, double-dispose timer and registry. |

| 1938 | LOW | Storage/HybridStoragePluginBase.cs | 282-287 | sdk-audit | GetAggregateHealth does three separate enumerations over _healthCache.Values — O(3n) when single pass suffices. |

| 1940 | HIGH | Storage/Migration/BackgroundMigrationEngine.cs | 108-111 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget Task.Run with ContinueWith that only writes Debug.WriteLine (no-op in Release) — if ExecuteMigrationAsync throws before its inner try/catch, job stays InProgress forever. |
| 1941 | HIGH | Storage/Migration/BackgroundMigrationEngine.cs | 229-231 | sdk-audit | Per-object migration catch discards exception entirely — increments FailedObjects but no diagnostic info about which objects or why. |
| 1942 | HIGH | Storage/Migration/BackgroundMigrationEngine.cs | 265-268 | sdk-audit | Outer ExecuteMigrationAsync catch sets Failed status but discards exception — no logging, no error message on job record. |
| 1943 | MEDIUM | Storage/Migration/MigrationCheckpointStore.cs | 38,52,73 | sdk-audit | Missing null/empty validation on `jobId` in all public methods — null jobId corrupts in-memory dictionary or produces broken file path. |
| 1944 | MEDIUM | Storage/Migration/MigrationCheckpointStore.cs | 61 | sdk-audit | `JsonSerializer.Deserialize` can throw JsonException on corrupt checkpoint files with no try/catch — crash-recovery path skipped entirely. |
| 1945 | HIGH | Storage/Migration/MigrationCheckpointStore.cs | 82 | sdk-audit | Path traversal via user-controlled `jobId` — `Path.Combine(_checkpointDirectory, $"migration-{jobId}...")` with no sanitization, `../../` sequences escape checkpoint directory. |
| 1946 | MEDIUM | Storage/Migration/ReadForwardingTable.cs | 31 | sdk-audit | Timer callback `_ => CleanExpired()` has no exception handling — any exception from LINQ/TryRemove race silently swallowed by Timer infrastructure. |
| 1947 | MEDIUM | Storage/Migration/ReadForwardingTable.cs | 64-69 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU race in Lookup: TryGetValue + TryRemove on expired entry not atomic — concurrent RegisterForwarding between the two ops deletes the new entry. |
| 1948 | HIGH | Storage/Placement/AutonomousRebalancer.cs | 76-79 | sdk-audit | Timer callback `async _ => await CheckAndRebalanceAsync()` is async-void equivalent — unhandled exception crashes process. CheckAndRebalanceAsync has try/finally but no catch-all. |
| 1949 | HIGH | Storage/Placement/AutonomousRebalancer.cs | 103-106 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget Task.Run with ContinueWith using only Debug.WriteLine (no-op in Release) — if ExecuteRebalanceAsync throws before inner try/catch, fault invisible. |
| 1950 | MEDIUM | Storage/Placement/AutonomousRebalancer.cs | 139 | sdk-audit | `CancelRebalanceAsync` sets status to `Failed` instead of `Cancelled` — callers cannot distinguish cancelled from genuinely failed jobs. |
