| 285 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Identity/OidcStrategy.cs | 23-24 | sdk-audit | `_discoveryCache` and `_jwksCache` are plain `Dictionary<>`, not thread-safe. Concurrent OIDC validation calls race on cache reads/writes. |
| 286 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Identity/OidcStrategy.cs | 58-59 | sdk-audit | `ValidateSignature` configurable to `false` with no warning/audit log. Misconfiguration silently disables all JWT signature enforcement. |
| 287 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Identity/RadiusStrategy.cs | 24 | sdk-audit | `_sharedSecret` defaults to empty string. Omitting config makes all RADIUS packets trivially forgeable. |
| 288 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Identity/RadiusStrategy.cs | 222-241 | sdk-audit | `ParseAccessResponse` does not verify response authenticator (RFC 2865 §3). Attacker can spoof Access-Accept for any Identifier. |
| 289 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Identity/SamlStrategy.cs | 125-133 | sdk-audit | Authentication bypass: when `_certificate != null` but assertion has no `<Signature>` element, `signatureNode` is null and verification skipped entirely — unsigned assertions accepted. |
| 290 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Identity/ScimStrategy.cs | 109,135,159,178 | sdk-audit | Four public SCIM methods contain `catch { return null/false; }` with no logging. HTTP errors, serialization failures silently swallowed. |
| 291 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Identity/TacacsStrategy.cs | 130 | sdk-audit | `Random.Shared.Next()` for TACACS+ session ID — not cryptographically secure, enables session fixation. |
| 292 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/BlockchainAnchorStrategy.cs | 90 | sdk-audit | `Status="pending"` never transitions to "confirmed". Metadata misleads callers into believing real blockchain transaction in progress. |
| 293 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/BlockchainAnchorStrategy.cs | 91-93 | sdk-audit | `BlockHeight=0`, `Status="pending"` never updated — no actual blockchain submission. `TransactionId` returned implying anchoring happened. |
| 294 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/ImmutableLedgerStrategy.cs | 123-153 | sdk-audit | `AppendEntry` non-atomic read-modify-write. Concurrent appends for same ledger can interleave, losing entries and corrupting append-only guarantee. |
| 295 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/ImmutableLedgerStrategy.cs | 149 | sdk-audit | `Concat(new[]{entry}).ToList()` copies entire list on every append — O(N²) over ledger lifetime. |
| 296 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/IntegrityStrategy.cs | 143-148 | sdk-audit | `VerifyIntegrityAsync` reads record, creates `with` expression, stores back without lock. Concurrent verifications race on `VerificationCount`. |
| 297 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/MerkleTreeStrategy.cs | 108-137 | sdk-audit | `GenerateProof` sibling-detection condition uses wrong index tracking after first level. Proofs for non-zero leaf indices produce incorrect hashes → fail `VerifyProof`. |
| 298 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/TamperProofStrategy.cs | 127-151 | sdk-audit | `AppendBlock` same non-atomic read-modify-write race as ImmutableLedger. Concurrent calls drop blocks, break hash chain. |
| 299 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/TamperProofStrategy.cs | 147 | sdk-audit | Same O(N²) Concat+ToList pattern on every block append. |
| 300 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/TsaStrategy.cs | 97 | sdk-audit | `Policy = "1.2.3.4.5"` placeholder OID. RFC 3161 requires valid registered OID. Compliant verifier would reject tokens. |
| 301 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Integrity/WormStrategy.cs | 185-190 | sdk-audit | `_records` updated before `CanModify` call, but stale `record` variable used for metadata — `ModificationAttempts` in denial response is off-by-one. |
| 302 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/BiometricStrategy.cs | 205-215 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU race: `GetOrAdd` + count check outside lock. Two concurrent enrollments both pass limit check, exceeding `MaxTemplatesPerUser`. |
| 303 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/BiometricStrategy.cs | 275-306 | sdk-audit | `IsAvailableAsync` always returns `Available=true` for all biometric types regardless of hardware state. |
| 304 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/BiometricStrategy.cs | 312-334 | sdk-audit | `ComputeSimilarity` silently truncates mismatched-length templates — partial comparison inflates similarity, increasing false acceptance. |
| 305 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/EmailOtpStrategy.cs | 120-121 | sdk-audit | `session.AttemptsUsed++` mutated in-place without lock. Two concurrent calls both pass attempt limit check, allowing more than max attempts. |
| 306 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/EmailOtpStrategy.cs | 251-263 | sdk-audit | `CheckRateLimit` calls `RemoveAll`/`Add` on shared `List<DateTime>` without lock. Concurrent OTP sends corrupt rate limit counter. |
| 307 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/HardwareTokenStrategy.cs | 211,291 | sdk-audit | `token.UseCount++` and `token.LastUsed` mutated without synchronization in concurrent evaluation paths. Lost counter updates break replay protection. |
| 308 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/HardwareTokenStrategy.cs | 284-285 | sdk-audit | `ValidateYubicoOtpAsync` validates modhex structure only — no AES counter/session/timestamp verification. Replay attacks fully possible. |
| 309 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/HardwareTokenStrategy.cs | 438-442 | sdk-audit | `VerifyFido2Signature` stub: creates ECDsa but never imports key or calls VerifyData. Returns `signature.Length >= 64` — any 64-byte array passes FIDO2 MFA. Complete security bypass. |
| 310 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/HotpStrategy.cs | 92-93 | sdk-audit | `HotpUserData.Counter` read-modify-write not atomic. Concurrent evaluation for same user can read stale counter, accepting two OTPs for same window. |
| 311 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/HotpStrategy.cs | 104 | sdk-audit | Counter-drift always evaluates to `0` — computed after counter already mutated. Drift should be calculated before mutation. |
| 312 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/HotpStrategy.cs | 196-197 | sdk-audit | Same race in `ResynchronizeCounter`: non-atomic counter update. Two simultaneous resyncs diverge counter. |
| 313 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/HotpStrategy.cs | 199-204 | sdk-audit | `ResynchronizeCounter` drift always yields `-2` — computed from already-mutated counter. |
| 314 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/MlsStrategy.cs | 53-54 | sdk-audit | MLS Bell-LaPadula only handles "read"/"write" actions. Any other action (delete, execute, empty) silently denied as "MLS policy violation" with no diagnostic. |
| 315 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/PushNotificationStrategy.cs | 177 | sdk-audit | `_activeChallenges.Count(...)` full linear scan on every `CreateChallengeAsync` — O(n) with many concurrent challenges. |
| 316 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/PushNotificationStrategy.cs | 267-272 | sdk-audit | `PushChallengeSession.Responded`/`Approved` mutated without sync while `WaitForResponseAsync` polls concurrently. Cross-thread read/write can tear on ARM. |
| 317 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/SmartCardStrategy.cs | 165-173 | sdk-audit | Revocation checked after signature verified and `card.LastUsed`/`UseCount` mutated. Revoked card metrics updated before revocation detected. |
| 318 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/SmartCardStrategy.cs | 255-295 | sdk-audit | `GetOrAdd` returns list, but `lock(userCards)` not applied to earlier count/duplicate checks. Concurrent `RegisterCard` bypasses limit and duplicate checks. |
| 319 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/SmsOtpStrategy.cs | 249-261 | sdk-audit | `CheckRateLimit` reads/mutates shared `List<DateTime>` without lock. Concurrent sends corrupt rate limit. |
| 320 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/TotpStrategy.cs | 95-106 | sdk-audit | TOTP replay protection TOCTOU race: two concurrent requests with same code both read "not present", both pass replay check — defeating entire replay protection. |
| 321 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Mfa/TotpStrategy.cs | 198 | sdk-audit | `ValidateTotp` always passes `DefaultDigits` (6) instead of `userData.Digits`. Users provisioned with non-default digit count always fail auth. |
| 322 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 170-190 | sdk-audit | `EncryptInIsolationAsync`/`DecryptInIsolationAsync` use AES-CBC without authentication. Padding oracle attack possible. |
| 323 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 205-214 | sdk-audit | `DecryptInIsolationAsync` doesn't validate `encryptedData.Length >= 16` before `Buffer.BlockCopy` — short input throws unguarded exception. |
| 324 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 486-503 | sdk-audit | `SgxEnclaveStrategy.SealDataAsync` and `TpmBindingStrategy.SealDataAsync` also use AES-CBC without auth. Same padding oracle vulnerability. |
| 325 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 494 | sdk-audit | SGX `SealDataAsync` truncates `enclaveId` with `.PadRight(32).Substring(0,32)`. Crafted 32-char-prefix ID matches any same-prefix enclave, enabling cross-enclave data access. |
| 326 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 515-520 | sdk-audit | `SgxEnclaveStrategy.UnsealDataAsync` doesn't validate `sealedData.Length >= 48` before `BlockCopy` calls. |
| 327 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 541-546 | sdk-audit | `CheckSgxAvailability()` stub always returns `true` with "For simulation" comment. SGX access granted on any machine without hardware. |
| 328 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 554-558 | sdk-audit | `DeriveSealingKey` uses `SHA256.HashData` as KDF without salt/HKDF. Public `measurementHash` + `enclaveId` → attacker can compute sealing key. |
| 329 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 800-808 | sdk-audit | `TpmBindingStrategy.UnsealDataAsync` doesn't validate `sealedData.Length >= 16` before IV extraction. |
| 330 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 813-817 | sdk-audit | `CheckTpmAvailability()` stub always returns `true`. TPM access granted regardless of hardware. |
| 331 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 824-832 | sdk-audit | `GetCurrentPcrValues()` returns hardcoded constant strings as PCR values. Policy check always passes/fails based on fake static values, never reflecting actual platform state. |
| 332 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 1044-1068 | sdk-audit | `ConfidentialComputingStrategy.EncryptInContextAsync` likewise uses unauthenticated AES-CBC. |
| 333 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MicroIsolation/MicroIsolationStrategies.cs | 1077 | sdk-audit | `GenerateAttestationReport` includes `MeasurementHash = Convert.ToHexString(SHA256.HashData(context.EncryptionKey))` — encryption key hash in public attestation report enables offline brute-force of short keys. |
| 334 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/MilitarySecurity/MilitarySecurityStrategy.cs | 91-93 | sdk-audit | `CheckClearance` returns `true` when both indices are `-1` (unknown clearance). Unrecognized clearance string grants access. |
| 335 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/NetworkSecurity/DdosProtectionStrategy.cs | 67-71 | sdk-audit | Rate-limit window reset non-atomic read-modify-write. Two concurrent threads both get original entry, both compute independent counts — rate limit bypassable under concurrency. |
| 336 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/NetworkSecurity/FirewallRulesStrategy.cs | 91 | sdk-audit | `FirewallRule` declares `Port` property accepted by `AddRule`, but `MatchesPattern`/`EvaluateAccessCoreAsync` never read `Port`. Port-based filtering silently ignored. |
| 337 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/NetworkSecurity/WafStrategy.cs | 53 | sdk-audit | `Regex.IsMatch` on `requestData` with no timeout — ReDoS via crafted input with catastrophic backtracking on SQL keyword alternation pattern. |
| 338 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/NetworkSecurity/WafStrategy.cs | 53-54 | sdk-audit | WAF SQL/XSS patterns miss common variants (hex encoding, EXEC, CAST, comment injection, encoded XSS). Named "OWASP Top 10" but covers a fraction. |
| 339 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/AwsIamStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | `SubjectId.Length > 0` is sole check. No AWS STS validation, no IAM policy eval. Identical stub pattern in all 10 PlatformAuth files. |
| 340 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/CaCertificateStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Same stub — no X509 validation, no chain building, no CRL/OCSP. |
| 341 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/EntraIdStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Same stub — no MSAL/JWT verification, no tenant/audience check. |
| 342 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/GcpIamStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Same stub — no GCP IAM API call. |
| 343 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/LinuxPamStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Same stub — no P/Invoke to `pam_authenticate`. |
| 344 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/SssdStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Same stub — no D-Bus/socket call to sssd. |
| 345 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/SystemdCredentialStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Same stub — no systemd-creds interaction. |
| 346 | CRITICAL | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PlatformAuth/WindowsIntegratedAuthStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Same stub — no NTLM/Kerberos/SSPI. |
| 347 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CasbinStrategy.cs | 147-157 | sdk-audit | `AddRoleForUser` non-atomic read-check-modify-write TOCTOU race on `_roleAssignments`. |
| 348 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CasbinStrategy.cs | 162-184 | sdk-audit | `GetRolesForUser` iterates while `AddRoleForUser` concurrently mutates inner `List<string>` — `InvalidOperationException` or torn reads. |
| 349 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CasbinStrategy.cs | 162-184 | sdk-audit | `GetRolesForUser` only resolves one level of role inheritance. Deep hierarchy silently stops at depth 2. |
| 350 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CedarStrategy.cs | 39 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient()` field with no `IDisposable` — socket handle leaks on teardown. |
| 351 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CedarStrategy.cs | 39 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient()` bypasses connection pooling → socket exhaustion under load. |
| 352 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CedarStrategy.cs | 81 | sdk-audit | `_httpClient.Timeout` set in `InitializeAsync` after construction — requests before init use default 100s timeout. |
| 353 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CedarStrategy.cs | 219-241 | sdk-audit | `EvaluateCondition` returns `true` for time-based conditions and unrecognized conditions. Cedar `when`/`unless` clauses silently disabled. Comment confirms placeholder. |
| 354 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CedarStrategy.cs | 315 | sdk-audit | Remote-evaluation catch swallows all exceptions into deny with only `ex.Message`. No logging, no metric, transient failures indistinguishable from auth errors. |
| 355 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CerbosStrategy.cs | 39 | sdk-audit | `HttpClient` field initializer, no `IDisposable` — socket leak on teardown. |
| 356 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/CerbosStrategy.cs | 280 | sdk-audit | `CheckMultipleActionsAsync` bare `catch {}` swallows all exceptions including `OperationCanceledException`. Cancellation invisible, network failures silently deny. |
| 357 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/OpaStrategy.cs | 33 | sdk-audit | Same `HttpClient` field pattern — socket leak. |
| 358 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/PermifyStrategy.cs | 38 | sdk-audit | Same `HttpClient` field pattern. |
| 359 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/PermifyStrategy.cs | 259 | sdk-audit | `FilterResourcesAsync` bare `catch {}` returns empty allow-list. Network/auth errors cause silent denial with no diagnostics. |
| 360 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/XacmlStrategy.cs | 288-295 | sdk-audit | `string-regexp-match` uses uncached user-controlled regex with no timeout — ReDoS possible via crafted policy pattern. |
| 361 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/PolicyEngine/ZanzibarStrategy.cs | 37 | sdk-audit | Same `HttpClient` field pattern. |
| 362 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/AudioSteganographyStrategy.cs | 393 | sdk-audit | AIFF 80-bit sample-rate parsing stubbed — always defaults to 44100. Non-standard AIFF files silently misread, corrupting capacity calculations. |
| 363 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/AudioSteganographyStrategy.cs | 787-797 | sdk-audit | `GeneratePnSequence` uses `new Random(12345)` hardcoded seed. PN sequence is deterministic and public — spread-spectrum provides zero security. |
| 364 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/DecoyLayersStrategy.cs | 453 | sdk-audit | `OrderBy(_ => Guid.NewGuid())` for shuffling — not cryptographically secure, non-uniform distribution. |
| 365 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/DecoyLayersStrategy.cs | 624-627 | sdk-audit | PBKDF2 uses static salt `"DecoyLayersSalt2024"`. Shared salt weakens derivation. |
| 366 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/LsbEmbeddingStrategy.cs | 318-321 | sdk-audit | `ValidateMagic` always returns `true`. Comment says "Simplified - in production check actual magic bytes." Any byte array passes as valid embedded image. |
| 367 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/LsbEmbeddingStrategy.cs | 583-587 | sdk-audit | `ReconstructImage` returns raw pixel data without file header. Output is not a valid image file — any consumer writing to disk fails. |
| 368 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/ShardDistributionStrategy.cs | 717-718 | sdk-audit | `ReconstructFromErasure` throws `NotImplementedException` — reachable at runtime when ErasureCoding mode selected and data shards lost. |
| 369 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/Steganography/SteganographyStrategy.cs | 541-542 | sdk-audit | `HideInVideo` hardcodes `videoHeaderSize=512` for all formats. Wrong for most containers, silently corrupts video. |
| 370 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/PredictiveThreatStrategy.cs | 112 | sdk-audit | `_threatModels` plain `Dictionary` not thread-safe. |
| 371 | MEDIUM | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ThreatResponse/PredictiveThreatStrategy.cs | 113 | sdk-audit | `_predictionHistory` plain `List` — same issue. |
| 372 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ZeroTrust/ContinuousVerificationStrategy.cs | 188 | sdk-audit | `VerifySessionContinuity` logs at `Debug` level even on verification failure. Should be `Warning`. |
| 373 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ZeroTrust/MtlsStrategy.cs | 310-320 | sdk-audit | `CheckCertificateRevocationAsync` — OCSP and CRL checks are stubbed (`return false` = not revoked). Revoked client certs pass mTLS validation. |
| 374 | HIGH | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ZeroTrust/MtlsStrategy.cs | 335-350 | sdk-audit | `ValidateCertificateChainAsync` — chain verification is placeholder. Self-signed or untrusted intermediates are accepted. |
| 375 | LOW | UltimateAccessControl/Strategies/ZeroTrust/MtlsStrategy.cs | 355 | sdk-audit | Method `ValidateCertificateChainAsync` has `async` modifier but no `await` — produces compiler warning. |

| 80 | MEDIUM | UltimateBlockchain/Services/ComplianceGapAnalyzer.cs | 56-62 | sdk-audit | `HttpClient` created per-call in `AnalyzeComplianceGapsAsync` — socket exhaustion under load. |
| 81 | HIGH | UltimateBlockchain/Services/ComplianceGapAnalyzer.cs | 89-112 | sdk-audit | `GenerateRemediationPlanAsync` calls external AI endpoint but timeout is hardcoded at 5s with no retry. Transient API failures abort remediation planning. |
| 82 | HIGH | UltimateBlockchain/Services/ComplianceGapAnalyzer.cs | 145-172 | sdk-audit | `AnalyzeComplianceGapsAsync` — AI-based gap analysis is stubbed. Returns `"No gaps detected"` unconditionally. |
| 83 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Reporting/ComplianceReportGenerator.cs | 42 | sdk-audit | `TamperProofAuditLog` is a `List<string>` — thread-unsafe for concurrent report generation, and "tamper-proof" name is misleading for an in-memory list. |
| 84 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Reporting/ComplianceReportGenerator.cs | 89-95 | sdk-audit | `_reportCache` is `Dictionary<string, byte[]>` without size bounds. Large report generation caches grow unbounded. |
| 85 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Reporting/ComplianceReportGenerator.cs | 155-165 | sdk-audit | `GenerateCsvReportAsync` does not escape fields containing commas, quotes, or newlines. Broken CSV output. |
| 86 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Reporting/ComplianceReportGenerator.cs | 267-275 | sdk-audit | `GenerateHtmlReport` builds HTML by string concatenation without encoding user-supplied field values. XSS if report rendered in browser. |
| 87 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Reporting/ComplianceReportGenerator.cs | 312-320 | sdk-audit | `ExportToPdfAsync` shells out to `wkhtmltopdf` using `Process.Start` with unsanitized file paths. Path injection possible. |
| 88 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Scaling/ComplianceScalingManager.cs | 256-260 | sdk-audit | `InvalidateCache()` documented as "invalidates cached compliance results" but body is empty. False contract — callers get stale results for up to `_resultTtl` (5 min). |
| 89 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Services/ChainOfCustodyExporter.cs | 25 | sdk-audit | `DefaultHmacKey` derived from hardcoded constant `"DataWarehouse-ChainOfCustody-Seal"`. SHA256 of known string is publicly computable — any attacker can forge valid HMAC seal on documents. Undermines legal-discovery tamper detection. |
| 90 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Services/ComplianceAlertService.cs | 74,109 | sdk-audit | `_deduplicationCache` and `_alertHistory` BoundedDictionary accessed from concurrent callers without lock. TOCTOU race: two concurrent calls with same alert key both pass duplicate check. |
| 91 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Services/ComplianceAlertService.cs | 93-96 | sdk-audit | Channel delivery failures captured in `failures` list but no logging of exception. Critical/Emergency channel failures invisible without caller inspection of `AlertResult`. |
| 92 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Services/ComplianceAlertService.cs | 114 | sdk-audit | `_ = ScheduleEscalationAsync(alert, cancellationToken)` discards task with no error observation. Synchronous exceptions silently swallowed; caller's CancellationToken cancels escalation mid-flight with no logging. |
| 93 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Services/ComplianceReportService.cs | 377-422 | sdk-audit | `IsEvidenceApplicableToControl` rebuilds full `categoryMapping` dictionary (24 keys, each with HashSet) on every call. O(N×M×24) allocations per report. Should be `static readonly`. |
| 94 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Services/ComplianceReportService.cs | 425-451 | sdk-audit | `DetermineApplicableFrameworks` similarly reconstructs `crossFrameworkMap` on every call. Move to `static readonly`. |
| 95 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Services/ComplianceReportService.cs | 500 | sdk-audit | `ComplianceReportPeriod` record has no validation: `End` can be before `Start`, either can be `DateTime.MinValue`. Bounds interpolated into report text without guard. |
| 96 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Services/TamperIncidentWorkflowService.cs | 46 | sdk-audit | Incident ID sequence resets on service restart. Same-day restart causes ID collision — `_incidents[incidentId]` silently overwrites existing ticket, destroying evidence chain. |
| 97 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Americas/PipedaStrategy.cs | 39 | sdk-audit | Attribute key `"AppropiateSafeguards"` is typo — correct is `"AppropriateSafeguards"`. Callers using correct spelling never satisfy check, causing permanent spurious PIPEDA-004 violation. |
| 98 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/AsiaPacific/PdpaPhStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | Class `PdpaPhStrategy` but regulation is officially "Data Privacy Act" (DPA), not PDPA. `Framework` returns `"DPA-PH"` while `StrategyId` is `"pdpa-ph"` — naming inconsistency. |
| 99 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/AsiaPacific/PdpaVnStrategy.cs | 42,56 | sdk-audit | Two distinct violations both use code `"PDPA-VN-026"` — cross-border transfer and data localization. Duplicate codes break downstream keying. |
| 100 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 25 | sdk-audit | `_flushTimer` created in `InitializeAsync` but no `Dispose` override visible. Timer handle leaks if not disposed in `ShutdownAsyncCore`. |
| 101 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 26-27 | sdk-audit | `_immutableMode`/`_blockchainMode` plain bools written in `InitializeAsync`, read from timer callback and concurrent calls without `volatile` or memory barrier. |
| 102 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 36 | sdk-audit | `Framework` returns `"Audit-Based"` — not a real compliance framework identifier. Should use `"CROSS-FRAMEWORK"` or `"INTERNAL"`. |
| 103 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 39-67 | sdk-audit | `InitializeAsync` doesn't validate `flushIntervalSeconds` for positive/non-zero. Value of 0 causes Timer to fire continuously. |
| 104 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 41 | sdk-audit | `base.InitializeAsync(...)` return value discarded — base task never awaited, initialization work/exceptions silently lost. |
| 105 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 60-64 | sdk-audit | Timer callback `async _ => await FlushAuditQueueAsync(ct)` — async void-equivalent swallows all exceptions. Process crash or silent loss. |
| 106 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 159-189 | sdk-audit | `GenerateAuditEntryAsync` declared `async` with no `await`. Unnecessary state-machine allocation. |
| 107 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 184-185 | sdk-audit | `_previousHash` plain `string?` read/written without sync in concurrent `CheckComplianceCoreAsync`. Data race: two threads read same previous hash, producing broken blockchain link. |
| 108 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 191-218 | sdk-audit | `GenerateChainEntryAsync` declared `async` with no `await` and never observes CancellationToken. Unnecessary state-machine overhead; CancellationToken is contract lie. |
| 109 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 216 | sdk-audit | `Console.WriteLine` for security-critical audit chain tampering event. In non-console deployments (service host, container), event silently disappears. |
| 110 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 221-239 | sdk-audit | `VerifyChainIntegrity` recomputes hash from entry fields, but `_previousHash` race (#1382) means verified hash may not match stored, producing false-positive tamper detections. |
| 111 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 222 | sdk-audit | `chain.Entries.ToArray()` in `VerifyChainIntegrity` copies potentially thousands of entries on every enqueue. O(n) per append. |
| 112 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 263-271 | sdk-audit | `IsAuditRequired` calls `context.DataClassification.Contains(...)` without null guard. NullReferenceException if `DataClassification` is null. Same in `DetermineFrameworks`. |
| 113 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 302-305 | sdk-audit | `FlushAuditQueueAsync` batches entries then does nothing — comment says "In production, write to persistent storage" with `await Task.CompletedTask`. Rule 13 stub: every queued audit entry silently discarded. |
| 114 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AuditTrailGenerationStrategy.cs | 325-326 | sdk-audit | `AuditEntry` declares `Hash`/`PreviousHash` as mutable `{ get; set; }` but documented as "immutable audit entry". Mutable hash fields undermine tamper-evident guarantee. |
| 115 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AutomatedComplianceCheckingStrategy.cs | 34 | sdk-audit | `base.InitializeAsync(...)` called without `await` — returned Task discarded. Base initialization may not complete before method returns. |
| 116 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AutomatedComplianceCheckingStrategy.cs | 41-45 | sdk-audit | `_rulesByFramework[rule.Framework]` read-then-write TOCTOU race on BoundedDictionary. Two threads could both create new List. |
| 117 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AutomatedComplianceCheckingStrategy.cs | 57 | sdk-audit | Timer callback `async _ => await RunContinuousChecksAsync(ct)` is async void-equivalent. Unhandled exceptions silently swallowed. |
| 118 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/AutomatedComplianceCheckingStrategy.cs | 192 | sdk-audit | `CheckRuleAsync` declared `async` with no `await`. Unnecessary state machine. |
| 119 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/ComplianceReportingStrategy.cs | 34 | sdk-audit | `base.InitializeAsync(...)` not awaited. Task discarded. |
| 120 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/ComplianceReportingStrategy.cs | 43 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget timer callback wrapping `GenerateScheduledReportsAsync`. Exceptions silently swallowed. |
| 121 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/ComplianceReportingStrategy.cs | 126-135 | sdk-audit | `LogComplianceEventAsync` ContainsKey→assign TOCTOU race, plus `List<ComplianceEvent>` not thread-safe for concurrent `Add`. |
| 122 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/ComplianceReportingStrategy.cs | 285-289 | sdk-audit | `CalculateAvailability` returns hardcoded `0.999` — placeholder appearing in SOC2 reports. Misleads auditors. |
| 123 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/ComplianceReportingStrategy.cs | 298-301 | sdk-audit | `CalculateIncidentReadiness` returns hardcoded `1.0` or `0.5`. No real computation. |

| 127 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/ContinuousComplianceMonitoringStrategy.cs | 166-192 | sdk-audit | `ComplianceMetric` fields `TotalChecks`, `ViolationCount`, etc. are plain long/double mutated directly from concurrent threads. No Interlocked/lock. |
| 128 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/Automation/PolicyEnforcementStrategy.cs | 33 | sdk-audit | `base.InitializeAsync(...)` not awaited. |

| 249 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/USFederal/FismaStrategy.cs | 103-106 | sdk-audit | `AtoExpirationDate` cast as `DateTime` not `DateTimeOffset`. Timezone-dependent comparison with `DateTime.UtcNow`. Same in CjisStrategy, SoxComplianceStrategy, StateRampStrategy. |
| 250 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/USFederal/TxRampStrategy.cs | 25-49 | sdk-audit | `CheckComplianceCoreAsync` is entirely synchronous (returns `Task.FromResult`). Method name promises async I/O but no await anywhere. |
| 251 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/USFederal/TxRampStrategy.cs | 137 | sdk-audit | `context.OperationType.Equals(...)` called without null guard. NRE if OperationType null. Same pattern in all USState, USFederal, and WORM strategies in this batch. |
| 252 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/USState/CpaStrategy.cs | 24 | sdk-audit | `UniversalOptOutHonored` checked unconditionally regardless of OperationType. May generate false positives for non-sale operations. |
| 253 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/USState/NyShieldStrategy.cs | 37 | sdk-audit | `EncryptionImplemented` checked unconditionally for every operation type. False positives for read/audit operations. |
| 254 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/WORM/FinraWormStrategy.cs | 143 | sdk-audit | WORM strategies use `violations.Count == 0` for isCompliant while all other strategies use `!violations.Any(v => Severity >= High)`. Stricter but undocumented inconsistency. |
| 255 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/WORM/FinraWormStrategy.cs | 158-184 | sdk-audit | `GenerateRecommendations` O(N×M) using `violations.Any()` per check code. Should use HashSet. |
| 256 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/WORM/Sec17a4WormStrategy.cs | 59-71 | sdk-audit | Retention period check uses `is int` pattern match. `long`/`double` from JSON deserializer silently fails. Same in FinraWormStrategy. |
| 257 | LOW | UltimateCompliance/Strategies/WORM/WormRetentionStrategy.cs | 21 | sdk-audit | `IncrementCounter` indentation inconsistent across all 3 WORM files. |
| 258 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | 95-98 | sdk-audit | `RegisterStrategy` does not validate parameter. `RegisterStrategy(null)` → NRE at `_strategies[strategy.StrategyId]`. |
| 259 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliance/UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | 103-111 | sdk-audit | `CheckComplianceAsync` does not validate `context` for null. Propagates unchecked to strategy. |
| 260 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | 360 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget: `MessageBus.Subscribe(IntelligenceTopics.RequestPIIDetection, ...)` return value (IDisposable) not stored in `_subscriptions`. Never unsubscribed on dispose. |
| 261 | HIGH | UltimateCompliance/UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | 453 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `DiscoverAndRegisterStrategiesAsync` swallows all exceptions during strategy instantiation. Failed strategies silently skipped with no logging. |
| 262 | HIGH | UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | DetectPII creates new Regex instances on every call — expensive under load |
| 263 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | Missing cleanup on stop |
| 264 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | Subscription leak |
| 265 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompliancePlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | _initialized not volatile |

| 106 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Scaling/CompressionScalingManager.cs | 91-94 | sdk-audit | Multiple mutable fields (`_chunkSemaphore`, `_currentLimits`, `_chunkSize`) read/written without synchronization. Semaphore replaced while tasks still waiting on old one → disposed while in use. |
| 107 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Scaling/CompressionScalingManager.cs | 369-378 | sdk-audit | Race condition in `ReconfigureLimitsAsync`: `_currentLimits` updated before new semaphore created. Concurrent readers see inconsistent mixed state. |
| 108 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Archive/RarStrategy.cs | 19-28 | sdk-audit | Contract lie: `RarStrategy` writes custom proprietary format using Deflate, not RAR. Not readable by unrar/WinRAR. "RAR-compatible headers" comment misleading. |
| 109 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Archive/SevenZipStrategy.cs | 134 | sdk-audit | `lzmaStream` (MemoryStream) not disposed. Created, used for ToArray(), but never wrapped in `using`. |
| 110 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Archive/SevenZipStrategy.cs | 150-161 | sdk-audit | `GetDictionarySize()` is dead code — never called. `_dictionarySize` always 8MB default. |
| 111 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Archive/TarStrategy.cs | 197-199 | sdk-audit | TAR header offset bug: version field at 264-265, owner name starts at 265, overwriting version's second byte. Corrupt USTAR headers. |
| 112 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Archive/TarStrategy.cs | 236-237 | sdk-audit | `Convert.ToInt32(sizeOctal, 8)` without bounds check on malformed octal. FormatException/OverflowException not translated to InvalidDataException. |
| 113 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Archive/XzStrategy.cs | 136 | sdk-audit | XZ magic bytes manually written during compression then skipped during decompression, but XZStream expects magic bytes present. Round-trip likely broken. |
| 114 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Archive/XzStrategy.cs | 179-181 | sdk-audit | `XZStream` doesn't respect `leaveOpen` parameter. Disposes input stream regardless. Breaks contract with other strategies. |
| 115 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/ContextMixing/CmixStrategy.cs | 261-285 | sdk-audit | `GradientMixer.Predict` 256K array access + Math.Log/Exp per bit. CompressionMemoryUsage=1GB understates actual CPU/memory profile. |
| 116 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/ContextMixing/NnzStrategy.cs | 308 | sdk-audit | `GetFeatures` allocates `new double[NumInputs]` per bit (~8M allocations per MB). Should reuse pre-allocated array. |
| 117 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/ContextMixing/PaqStrategy.cs | 263-309 | sdk-audit | `LogisticMixer.Update` context hashes shared between encoder/decoder without per-byte reset. Maintained by symmetry but differs from PAQ8 reference. |
| 118 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/ContextMixing/PpmdStrategy.cs | 200,250 | sdk-audit | Same hot-loop HashSet allocation as #1576 in EncodeSymbol and DecodeSymbol. |
| 119 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/ContextMixing/PpmStrategy.cs | 196 | sdk-audit | `EncodeSymbol` allocates `new HashSet<byte>()` per byte (~100M for 100MB input). Should reuse cleared set. Same in DecodeSymbol:243. |
| 120 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/ContextMixing/ZpaqStrategy.cs | 365-391 | sdk-audit | `ContextModel.Update` updates all 8 bit-position slots identically — 8× memory/CPU for zero benefit. Equivalent to single-slot model. |
| 121 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/BsdiffStrategy.cs | 126 | sdk-audit | Dead unreachable empty-input guard: line 121 returns on `Length==0`, so `CreateEmptyBlock()` at 126 never called. Empty input produces invalid headerless output, breaking round-trip. |
| 122 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/BsdiffStrategy.cs | 265-266 | sdk-audit | Integer underflow: `extraData` size subtracts `controlLen + diffLen` that were already consumed from stream. Produces negative/too-small allocation → corrupt decompression. |
| 123 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/BsdiffStrategy.cs | 326-338 | sdk-audit | `BuildSuffixArray` uses `Array.Sort` with O(n²) byte-array comparator. O(n² log n) worst case. Non-terminating for inputs approaching 100MB limit. |
| 124 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/DeltaStrategy.cs | 249-258 | sdk-audit | `DeltaCompressionStream.Write` doesn't validate buffer/offset/count. Violates Stream contract. |
| 125 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/DeltaStrategy.cs | 254-255 | sdk-audit | Streaming header writes placeholder `originalLength=0` and never seeks back to patch. Streaming decompression returns empty → silent data loss. `SupportsStreaming=true` is false. |
| 126 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/VcdiffStrategy.cs | 146-259 | sdk-audit | Hash table `List<int>` values grow unbounded — millions of entries for large inputs. O(n) inner scan per bucket. |
| 127 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/XdeltaStrategy.cs | 142 | sdk-audit | Same unbounded `Dictionary<uint, List<int>>` pattern as Vcdiff. O(n) bucket scan risk. |
| 128 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/XdeltaStrategy.cs | 311-318 | sdk-audit | Missing check on COPY `ReadByte()` return -1. Blindly cast to `(byte)` writes 0xFF. Silent data corruption on malformed input. VcdiffStrategy has correct guard. |
| 129 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Delta/ZdeltaStrategy.cs | 144-147 | sdk-audit | `List<int>[16384]` allocated per call — 16K heap objects per compression. Should use flat array with chaining. |
| 130 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Domain/AvifLosslessStrategy.cs | 286-287 | sdk-audit | `RangeEncode` step can become 0 when range < 256. `high = low - 1` inverts interval → infinite loop or garbage output. |
| 131 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Domain/DnaCompressionStrategy.cs | 279-280 | sdk-audit | `BuildHuffmanTree` returns `heap.Min!` — NRE if frequencies empty. No guard beyond `input.Length == 0`. |
| 132 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Domain/JxlLosslessStrategy.cs | 209 | sdk-audit | LINQ `.Count(f => f > 0)` on int[256] in compression hot path — unnecessary enumerator allocation. |
| 133 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/DensityStrategy.cs | 183-188 | sdk-audit | `compressedLength` header field written but unused in decompress loop — reads directly from stream ignoring boundary. Stream corruption silently ignored. |
| 134 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/GipfeligStrategy.cs | 26-57 | sdk-audit | `SupportsParallelCompression=true` but implementation is sequential `for` loop. No parallel mechanism. Contract lie. |
| 135 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/GipfeligStrategy.cs | 145 | sdk-audit | `ArrayPool.Rent` immediately followed by `.ToArray()` copy — pool benefit completely negated. |
| 136 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/GipfeligStrategy.cs | 363-365 | sdk-audit | `DecompressBlock` reads literals byte-by-byte in tight loop. Should use buffer read for 128KB blocks. |
| 137 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/LizardStrategy.cs | 269 | sdk-audit | `FindMatchLength` bounds check only constrains `data.Length - pos2`, not `pos1`. Array index out of bounds when both positions near end. |
| 138 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/LizardStrategy.cs | 295,297 | sdk-audit | `originalLength`/`compressedLength` from header used without non-negative/bounded check. `Int32.MaxValue` → OOM instead of InvalidDataException. |
| 139 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/LizardStrategy.cs | 354-361 | sdk-audit | Match-copy MemoryStream bug: `output.Position = output.Length` inside loop diverges when Length grows during overlapping match copy → data corruption. |
| 140 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/OodleStrategy.cs | 144-220 | sdk-audit | O(n²) compression: `CompressBlock` builds unbounded `Dictionary<uint, List<int>>`. Inner `foreach` walks unbounded lists. Thousands of heap allocations per 256KB block. |
| 141 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/OodleStrategy.cs | 193-196 | sdk-audit | Inner-loop hash entries for matched region never pruned. O(n) list growth per position. |
| 142 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/OodleStrategy.cs | 310,327 | sdk-audit | Same missing header field validation. Crafted stream can allocate arbitrary memory. |
| 143 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/OodleStrategy.cs | 363-370 | sdk-audit | Same MemoryStream match-copy bug as Lizard. `Length` as write-position proxy fails for overlapping matches. |
| 144 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/ZlingStrategy.cs | 184,202 | sdk-audit | O(n) `IndexOf` + `RemoveAt` + `Insert(0,...)` on `List<int>` per matched symbol in MTF transform. Should use array/linked-list. |
| 145 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/ZlingStrategy.cs | 297-299 | sdk-audit | Same missing header validation pattern as Lizard/Oodle. |
| 146 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Emerging/ZlingStrategy.cs | 353-360 | sdk-audit | Same MemoryStream match-copy bug. Shared flawed helper pattern across Lizard/Oodle/Zling. |
| 147 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/AnsStrategy.cs | 41-42 | sdk-audit | `_tableLogSize`/`_precision` fields hold hardcoded defaults, never configurable. Validation in InitializeAsync is dead code masking contract lie. |
| 148 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/AnsStrategy.cs | 221-222 | sdk-audit | Unchecked `stream.Read` return value — partial read silently produces corrupt decompressed output. |
| 149 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/AnsStrategy.cs | 376-391 | sdk-audit | `EncodeSymbol` state logic differs from canonical tANS formula. Round-trips by symmetry only. |
| 150 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/ArithmeticStrategy.cs | 41-43 | sdk-audit | `_precisionBits`/`_modelUpdateFrequency` validated but never used. Config has no effect. |
| 151 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/HuffmanStrategy.cs | 213-214 | sdk-audit | Same unchecked `stream.Read` pattern. |
| 152 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/HuffmanStrategy.cs | 254-259 | sdk-audit | `HuffmanNode.Frequency` set on parent but never read back in `TraverseForLengths`. Dead field maintenance. |
| 153 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/RansStrategy.cs | 41-42 | sdk-audit | `_interleavedStreams`/`_precisionBits` validated but never used. Config has no effect. |
| 154 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/RansStrategy.cs | 218-219 | sdk-audit | Same unchecked `stream.Read` as ANS. |
| 155 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/RleStrategy.cs | 40,42 | sdk-audit | `_minRunLength`/`_maxRunLength` validated but `CompressCore` uses constant `MinRunLength=3`. Config silently ignored. |
| 156 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/EntropyCoding/RleStrategy.cs | 308-311 | sdk-audit | Streaming path writes zero-length placeholder header never patched on Dispose. Decompression returns empty → silent data loss. |
| 157 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Generative/GenerativeCompressionStrategy.cs | 1609-1610 | sdk-audit | `DecompressGenerative` silently returns empty for zero length. Truncated data silently short-reads without signaling. |
| 158 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Generative/GenerativeCompressionStrategy.cs | 1853 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `DetectGpuAvailability` — `_gpuAvailable` drives behavior paths but exception swallowed without logging. |
| 159 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Generative/GenerativeCompressionStrategy.cs | 1873-1877 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stub: `GpuMatrixMultiply` claims GPU but unconditionally calls `CpuMatrixMultiply`. `_gpuAvailable` can be true. Same for `GpuApplyGradients`:1914. |
| 160 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/GZipStrategy.cs | 151-154 | sdk-audit | `EstimateCompressedSize` returns 275 bytes for 1-byte input. Conservative but documented. |
| 161 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/Lz78Strategy.cs | 209 | sdk-audit | `List<byte>` as output buffer — `AddRange(prefix)` causes O(n) copies per dictionary entry. Should use MemoryStream. |
| 162 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzfseStrategy.cs | 329-332 | sdk-audit | `Hash4` `BitConverter.ToUInt32(data, pos)` requires `pos+4 <= Length`. Safe in current callers but no defensive guard in method itself. |
| 163 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzfseStrategy.cs | 339-398 | sdk-audit | `FseEncode` naming lie: `0x02` path writes raw bytes unchanged. No actual entropy encoding applied. Frequency table written but unused. |
| 164 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzhStrategy.cs | 40-42 | sdk-audit | `_slidingWindowSize` validated but CompressCore uses hardcoded 4096. Config ignored. |
| 165 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzhStrategy.cs | 260-280 | sdk-audit | `DecodeSymbol` walks Huffman tree one bit at a time via `ReadBit()` — O(n) per symbol. Should use table-based decode. |
| 166 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/Lzma2Strategy.cs | 40-42 | sdk-audit | Same unused config fields as LZMA. |
| 167 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/Lzma2Strategy.cs | 305-310 | sdk-audit | Same silent Deflate fallback as LZMA. Decompress expects LZMA2 framing, gets raw Deflate → corrupt output. |
| 168 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/Lzma2Strategy.cs | 348-365 | sdk-audit | Identical EncodeChunked/DecodeChunked Deflate fallback bug as LZMA. |
| 169 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzmaStrategy.cs | 40-42 | sdk-audit | `_dictionarySize` and `_matchFinder` validated in InitializeAsync but never used in CompressCore. Config silently ignored. |
| 170 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzmaStrategy.cs | 305-310 | sdk-audit | Silent fallback to Deflate when LZMA encode fails. No format tag written — decompress assumes LZMA, reads garbage. Data corruption on round-trip. |
| 171 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzmaStrategy.cs | 348-365 | sdk-audit | `EncodeChunked` Deflate fallback path writes no frame tag. `DecodeChunked` reads first byte as LZMA property byte → wrong dictionary size → silent corruption. |
| 172 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzoStrategy.cs | 195-200 | sdk-audit | Encoder writes literal-length as single byte (max 255). Decoder reads multi-byte length. Mismatch for literals >255 bytes → decode reads wrong offset → corrupt output. |
| 173 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzxStrategy.cs | 160-180 | sdk-audit | BWT implementation uses O(n² log n) suffix sort via `Array.Sort` with byte-array comparator. Non-terminating for large inputs. |
| 174 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzxStrategy.cs | 243-246 | sdk-audit | Unchecked `stream.Read()` return value in `DecompressCore`. Partial read silently produces corrupt output. |
| 175 | HIGH | UltimateCompression/Strategies/LzFamily/LzxStrategy.cs | 310-315 | sdk-audit | Match position off-by-one: `matchPos` should be `windowPos - matchDistance` not `windowPos - matchDistance - 1`. Shifts every back-reference by 1 byte → broken round-trip. |
| 176 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Transit/AdaptiveTransitStrategy.cs | 180-185 | sdk-audit | `EstimateCompressionRatio` returns hardcoded 0.65 for all algorithms. Naming lie — no estimation performed. |
| 177 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Transit/AdaptiveTransitStrategy.cs | 285-290 | sdk-audit | `SelectDecompressionAlgorithm` always returns Zstd regardless of what algorithm compressed the data. Round-trip broken for non-Zstd. |
| 178 | LOW | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Transit/BrotliTransitStrategy.cs | 175-178 | sdk-audit | `EstimateCompressionRatio` returns constant 0.6. Same pattern as LZ4Transit. |
| 179 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Transit/BrotliTransitStrategy.cs | 215-218 | sdk-audit | `TransitDecompress` reads entire input into `byte[]` before decompressing. Defeats streaming purpose for large payloads. |
| 180 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompression/Strategies/Transit/SnappyTransitStrategy.cs | 140-145 | sdk-audit | Transit strategies require parameterless constructor for factory instantiation but none provided. Factory `Activator.CreateInstance` will throw. |
| 181 | HIGH | UltimateCompressionPlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | OnWriteAsync/OnReadAsync reads entire stream into MemoryStream then ToArray() — doubles memory for large files |
| 182 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompressionPlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | Constructor-time reflection |
| 183 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompressionPlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | Subscription leak |
| 184 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompressionPlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | _activeStrategy race condition |
| 185 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompressionPlugin.cs | 171 | inspectcode | [MethodHasAsyncOverloadWithCancellation] Method has async overload with cancellation support |
| 186 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompressionPlugin.cs | 203 | inspectcode | [MethodHasAsyncOverloadWithCancellation] Method has async overload with cancellation support |
| 187 | LOW | UltimateCompressionPlugin.cs (LZ4) | — | agent-scan | LZ4 integer overflow in EstimateCompressedSize for inputs > int.MaxValue |
| 188 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Innovations/SemanticTrafficCompressionStrategy.cs | 34-45 | sdk-audit | `PayloadProfiles` static `Dictionary` is mutable. Should be `IReadOnlyDictionary` or `FrozenDictionary`. |
| 189 | HIGH | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Deduplication/DeltaCompressionDeduplicationStrategy.cs | 313-375 | sdk-audit | `ComputeDelta` O(n*m) nested loop. 1MB files = 10^12 comparisons. Catastrophic for any meaningful file size. |
| 190 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Deduplication/DeltaCompressionDeduplicationStrategy.cs | 328-374 | sdk-audit | `ComputeDelta` O(n*m) worst case. Linear scan per byte of newData. Unacceptable for production file sizes. |
| 191 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Deduplication/DeltaCompressionDeduplicationStrategy.cs | 429-457 | sdk-audit | `ApplyDelta` never validates `resultPos + length <= result.Length`. Corrupted delta causes IndexOutOfRangeException or data truncation. |
| 192 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Innovation/PredictiveCompressionStrategy.cs | 486-492 | sdk-audit | `_alreadyCompressedExtensions` array (17 elements) scanned linearly on every store. Convert to HashSet. |
| 193 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/ContentAwareCompressionStrategy.cs | 63 | sdk-audit | Wrong extension for ZLib — "zlib" maps to .zst (Zstandard extension). Consumers expecting Zstd format will fail. |
| 194 | LOW | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/ContentAwareCompressionStrategy.cs | 63 | sdk-audit | Naming contract — "zlib" algorithm labelled with .zst extension (Zstandard convention). |
| 195 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageBrotliStrategy.cs | 43-44 | sdk-audit | Quality clamping silently overrides user quality=0 to DefaultQuality(4). Deliberate fastest-level preference ignored. |
| 196 | HIGH | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageLz4Strategy.cs | 50-68 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 — fake LZ4. Writes real LZ4 magic header then pipes through DeflateStream. Output is not valid LZ4. Any standard LZ4 reader will reject or corrupt. Comment says "we simulate via DeflateStream." |
| 197 | HIGH | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageLz4Strategy.cs | 59 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 — decompress also broken. Uses DeflateStream to read files with LZ4 magic header. Real LZ4 files produce garbage. |
| 198 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageLz4Strategy.cs | 72-73 | sdk-audit | compressionRatio hardcoded 0.0 on decompress — callers relying on ratio for accounting always get 0.0. |
| 199 | LOW | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageLz4Strategy.cs | 87 | sdk-audit | "algorithm" = "lz4" in result is a lie — actual compression is Deflate. |
| 200 | LOW | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageLz4Strategy.cs | 175 | sdk-audit | `await Task.FromResult(...)` causes unnecessary state-machine allocation. Remove async/await. |
| 201 | LOW | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageSnappyStrategy.cs | 41 | sdk-audit | No validation of mode option — "Decompress" (wrong case) silently compresses instead. |
| 202 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageSnappyStrategy.cs | 47-49 | sdk-audit | Decompression output path logic inconsistent — stripping .snappy vs appending .decompressed differs from Zstd behavior. |
| 203 | HIGH | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageSnappyStrategy.cs | 56-66 | sdk-audit | Fake Snappy — writes "sNaPpY" magic then uses DeflateStream. Not valid Snappy format. Also Cat-1 and Cat-15 violation. |
| 204 | LOW | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageSnappyStrategy.cs | 63-64 | sdk-audit | False magic bytes — "sNaPpY" prefix corrupts Deflate stream. Neither Snappy nor Deflate readers can process output. |
| 205 | HIGH | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/OnStorageZstdStrategy.cs | 60-73,224-234 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 — "Zstandard" compression uses ZLibStream, not Zstd. Extension .zst and algorithm "zstd" but bytes are zlib. Real Zstd decoders fail. |
| 206 | HIGH | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/TransparentCompressionStrategy.cs | 61-64 | sdk-audit | Format routing lie — "zstd" routed to ZLibStream, "lz4" to DeflateStream. Both wrong. Real Zstd/LZ4 data causes decompression failures. |
| 207 | HIGH | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/Compression/TransparentCompressionStrategy.cs | 82-84 | sdk-audit | Compress path format lie — "lz4" output written as .lz4 but contains raw Deflate. "zstd" uses ZLibStream. |
| 208 | LOW | UltimateStorageProcessing/Strategies/GameAsset/TextureCompressionStrategy.cs | 45 | sdk-audit | Inverted colorSpace flag — `-srgb` appended when colorSpace=="linear" but should apply when "sRGB". Logic bug. |
