| 37 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Scaling/WasmScalingManager.cs | 87-89 | sdk-audit | `_maxConcurrent` and `_currentLimits` read without volatile/lock in `GetScalingMetrics` and `CurrentBackpressureState`. Torn reads on 64-bit fields possible on 32-bit runtime. |
| 38 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Scaling/WasmScalingManager.cs | 189-195 | sdk-audit | `ReconfigureLimitsAsync` disposes old `SemaphoreSlim` and creates new one without lock. Concurrent `WaitAsync` callers on disposed semaphore → `ObjectDisposedException`. |
| 39 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/KataContainersStrategy.cs | 280-285 | sdk-audit | Command injection: `_containerName` interpolated directly into shell command string passed to `Process.Start`. Attacker-controlled container name can inject arbitrary commands. |
| 40 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/KataContainersStrategy.cs | 310-315 | sdk-audit | Silent catch around container cleanup — if cleanup fails, resources leak. Exception swallowed without logging. |
| 41 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/PodmanStrategy.cs | 275-280 | sdk-audit | Same command injection vulnerability as KataContainers. Container name unsanitized in shell command. |
| 42 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/PodmanStrategy.cs | 305-310 | sdk-audit | Same silent catch in container cleanup as KataContainers. |
| 43 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/RunscStrategy.cs | 75 | sdk-audit | Container ID truncated to first 10 chars of task.Id. Sequential UUIDs with common prefix → ID collisions → second `runsc run` fails. Same in YoukiStrategy. |
| 44 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/RunscStrategy.cs | 180-185 | sdk-audit | `_containerCount` incremented/decremented with non-atomic `++`/`--`. Race under concurrent container starts. |
| 45 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/RunscStrategy.cs | 290-295 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in container start. Process launch failure silently returns null container handle. Caller NPE later. |
| 46 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Container/YoukiStrategy.cs | 285-290 | sdk-audit | Same silent catch pattern as RunscStrategy in container lifecycle. |
| 47 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/DockerExecutionStrategy.cs | 34 | sdk-audit | Comment says "Unix socket (/var/run/docker.sock)" but default URL is TCP `localhost:2375`. No Unix socket handler configured. Misleading documentation. |
| 48 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/DockerExecutionStrategy.cs | 101-111 | sdk-audit | `PullImageAsync` catches all non-cancellation exceptions with comment "Image may already exist locally". Registry auth failures, network errors silently swallowed. |
| 49 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/DockerExecutionStrategy.cs | 133-134 | sdk-audit | Path injection in volume mounts: user-supplied `AllowedFileSystemPaths` embedded directly into `docker create` CLI as `-v "{path}:{path}:ro"` without sanitization. Shell metacharacters can mount unintended host directories. |
| 50 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/DockerExecutionStrategy.cs | 139-141 | sdk-audit | Environment variable injection: `key`/`value` from `task.Environment` embedded into CLI as `-e "{key}={value}"` without escaping. Values containing `"` or `\n` escape argument boundary. |
| 51 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/DockerExecutionStrategy.cs | 144-146 | sdk-audit | Command injection: `command` inserted as `sh -c "{command}"` with only naive `Replace("\"", "\\\"")`. Shell metacharacters (`$`, backtick, `\n`, `;`) not escaped — breaks sandbox isolation. |
| 52 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/ProcessExecutionStrategy.cs | 67-68 | sdk-audit | `Path.GetTempFileName()` creates file, then `.cmd`/`.sh` appended to make different path. Original zero-byte file never deleted — temp file leak per execution. |
| 53 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/ProcessExecutionStrategy.cs | 146 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteAzureFunctionAsync` instantiates `new HttpClient()` per request. Socket exhaustion under load (TIME_WAIT accumulation). Should use IHttpClientFactory or shared instance. |
| 54 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/ProcessExecutionStrategy.cs | 164-167 | sdk-audit | Lambda payload interpolated into CLI args with incomplete escaping. `%` not escaped on Windows cmd.exe. Large payloads can break argument. Prefer `--payload file://` pattern. |
| 55 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/ProcessExecutionStrategy.cs | 201-208 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteLocalFunctionAsync` is a Rule 13 stub — returns fake string `"Local function executed: {code.Length} chars"` without executing any code. Comment admits "Roslyn would be ideal". |
| 56 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/ProcessExecutionStrategy.cs | 258 | sdk-audit | Same `GetTempFileName()` + extension leak pattern in `ExecuteCSharpScriptAsync`, `ExecuteJavaScriptAsync` (line 286), `ExecutePythonScriptAsync` (line 307). Three leak sites. |
| 57 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/CoreRuntimes/ProcessExecutionStrategy.cs | 595 | sdk-audit | `GpuComputeAbstractionStrategy.ExecuteAsync` non-CUDA path returns stub `"GPU compute completed"`. `SupportedLanguages` advertises `["cuda", "opencl", "hlsl"]` but only CUDA implemented. |
| 58 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Distributed/BeamStrategy.cs | 43-44 | sdk-audit | `runner` from metadata used directly in CLI args without validation. Shell metacharacters break argument parsing. Should validate against known runner set. |
| 59 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Distributed/BeamStrategy.cs | 50-51 | sdk-audit | Python module path `apache_beam.runners.{runner.ToLowerInvariant()}` is wrong — actual module is `apache_beam.runners.portability.fn_api_runner`. Will fail for all runners. |
| 60 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Distributed/DaskStrategy.cs | 60-62 | sdk-audit | `exec(open(...).read())` pattern — user code exception skips `client.close()`, leaking Dask connections. Missing try/finally in generated Python. |
| 61 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Distributed/FlinkStrategy.cs | 51 | sdk-audit | `task.Metadata["detached"]` checked with `d is true` (boxed bool). JSON-deserialized values as string `"true"` silently fail pattern match. |
| 62 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Distributed/MapReduceStrategy.cs | 47 | sdk-audit | SHA256.HashData per line for partitioning. Cryptographic hash overkill for non-security partition — unnecessary GC pressure. FNV-1a would suffice. |
| 63 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Distributed/PrestoTrinoStrategy.cs | 71 | sdk-audit | `--session {key}={value}` built from metadata without escaping. Keys/values with spaces or `=` produce malformed CLI arguments. |
| 64 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Distributed/SparkStrategy.cs | 40-41 | sdk-audit | `Path.GetTempFileName()` creates file; `codePath = jobPath + ext` used instead. Original `jobPath` file never cleaned up in finally block. |
| 65 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/ConfidentialVmStrategy.cs | 40-45 | sdk-audit | `_attestationEndpoint` config validated but used only in stub `AttestAsync` that returns hardcoded success. |
| 66 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/ConfidentialVmStrategy.cs | 49-55 | sdk-audit | Unsanitized `provider` value used as discriminant to select arbitrary tools via ternary. Future string interpolation of `provider` would be instantly exploitable. Fragile security pattern. |
| 67 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/ConfidentialVmStrategy.cs | 57-59 | sdk-audit | `sevctl verify --attestation-report` result captured but ExitCode never checked. Failed attestation doesn't prevent workload launch — undermines confidential-computing guarantee. |
| 68 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/NitroEnclavesStrategy.cs | 40-45 | sdk-audit | Same unused attestation config as ConfidentialVm. |
| 69 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/NitroEnclavesStrategy.cs | 70 | sdk-audit | Enclave ID assigned from `runResult.StandardOutput.Trim()` without validation. Multi-line or unexpected output → malformed ID → cleanup and console read fail silently. |
| 70 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/NitroEnclavesStrategy.cs | 78 | sdk-audit | "Wait for completion via vsock" but just `Task.Delay(1000)` with no actual vsock polling. No real completion detection. |
| 71 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/SevStrategy.cs | 40-45 | sdk-audit | Same unused attestation config pattern. |
| 72 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/SevStrategy.cs | 41 | sdk-audit | `sevctl export --full` result captured but ExitCode never checked. SEV not available → continues to launch QEMU guest without SEV protections. |
| 73 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/SevStrategy.cs | 54-55 | sdk-audit | `sevctl measurement build` result ExitCode never checked. Measurement failure should abort launch — enclave image potentially untrusted. |
| 74 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/SgxStrategy.cs | 66 | sdk-audit | Path traversal: `keyPath` from `task.Metadata["signing_key"]` passed to `sgx_sign -key` without validation. Attacker-controlled task can read any private key on host filesystem. |
| 75 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/SgxStrategy.cs | 71 | sdk-audit | Arbitrary executable: `appHost` from `task.Metadata["app_host"]` overrides default without whitelist. Caller can execute any binary on host. |
| 76 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/TrustZoneStrategy.cs | 52 | sdk-audit | Path traversal: `taUuid` from `task.Metadata["ta_uuid"]` used in path construction (`/lib/optee_armtz/{taUuid}`) and CLI args without sanitization. `../../etc/cron.d/malicious` escapes directory. |
| 77 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Enclave/TrustZoneStrategy.cs | 56-65 | sdk-audit | Command/argument injection: `taUuid` and `task.EntryPoint` interpolated directly into `optee_example_ta_invoke` arguments without quoting. Caller can inject extra flags via `ta_uuid`. |
| 78 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Gpu/MetalStrategy.cs | 68 | sdk-audit | Arbitrary executable: `host_app` from `task.Metadata` passed directly as executable to `RunProcessAsync` without whitelist. Same in VulkanComputeStrategy.cs:66. |
| 79 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Gpu/OpenClStrategy.cs | 56 | sdk-audit | Code injection: kernel source embedded into generated C code via string interpolation with incomplete escaping (`\r`, null bytes, `*/`, `#include` not handled). Attacker can inject arbitrary C code compiled and executed on host. |
| 80 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Gpu/OpenClStrategy.cs | 57-80 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stub: generated C host program only builds kernel and releases it — no `clCreateKernel`, `clSetKernelArg`, or `clEnqueueNDRangeKernel`. Always prints "built successfully" regardless. |
| 81 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Gpu/TensorRtStrategy.cs | 87-90 | sdk-audit | `inputPath` temp file (`GetTempFileName() + ".bin"`) created but never deleted. No finally block covers cleanup. Leaks .bin file per inference call with input data. |
| 82 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/AdaptiveRuntimeSelectionStrategy.cs | 192-195 | sdk-audit | Silent security degradation: `nsjail` in candidate list but no case in `GetRuntimeCommand` — falls through to `sh` with no sandbox. `bwrap` uses `--ro-bind / /` mounting entire host filesystem. |
| 83 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/AdaptiveRuntimeSelectionStrategy.cs | 192 | sdk-audit | `docker` variant silently omits `--memory` limit that `podman` applies. Different resource constraints for "equivalent" isolation options without documentation. |
| 84 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/AdaptiveRuntimeSelectionStrategy.cs | 234-235 | sdk-audit | `_selectionHistory.AddOrUpdate` mutates shared `List<SelectionRecord>` in-place. Concurrent calls for same key race on list's internal array → corruption. Same in ComputeCostPredictionStrategy.cs:178-187. |
| 85 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/CarbonAwareComputeStrategy.cs | 83 | sdk-audit | Exponential backoff broken: `deferralTime` computed after loop exits, always `TimeSpan.Zero` inside loop. Wait formula always `30 * 2^0 = 30s` — never increases. |
| 86 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/CarbonAwareComputeStrategy.cs | 175 | sdk-audit | `JsonDocument.Parse` result not disposed. Pooled memory grows unbounded until GC finalization. Should use `using var json = ...`. |
| 87 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/CarbonAwareComputeStrategy.cs | 191-193 | sdk-audit | `catch { }` swallows all exceptions including `OperationCanceledException`. Shutdown cancellation silently ignored — tasks don't terminate promptly. |
| 88 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/HybridComputeStrategy.cs | 191,219,277 | sdk-audit | `cpuElapsed`/`gpuElapsed` plain `TimeSpan` variables captured into concurrent `Task.Run` lambdas. Not formally atomic — torn reads possible on 32-bit runtime. |
| 89 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/HybridComputeStrategy.cs | 258-269 | sdk-audit | GPU output fewer lines than segments → `fullOutput` (entire GPU output) assigned to remaining slots. Merged result contains full GPU output repeated N times for overflow positions. |
| 90 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/HybridComputeStrategy.cs | 365 | sdk-audit | `EstimateIntensity` calls `segment.Count(c => ...)` O(n) per line inside loop over all input lines. O(lines × line_length) with LINQ closure allocation per segment. |
| 91 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/IncrementalComputeStrategy.cs | 162-174 | sdk-audit | `EvictCache` materializes entire dictionary into sorted list O(n log n) when eviction triggered. For 10K-entry caches near limit, full sort every execution. Consider min-heap. |
| 92 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/SelfOptimizingPipelineStrategy.cs | 24 | sdk-audit | Field named `_emaThoughput` — typo ("Thoughput" vs "Throughput"). Affects code searchability. |
| 93 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/IndustryFirst/SpeculativeExecutionStrategy.cs | 77-82 | sdk-audit | Race condition: `winnerOutput`/`winnerLogs` assigned after `Interlocked.CompareExchange` on `winner` without additional synchronization. Two near-simultaneous successes can overwrite each other's output. |
| 94 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/AppArmorStrategy.cs | 37 | sdk-audit | Profile name `datawarehouse_compute_{id}` may contain hyphens from task.Id. AppArmor names restricted to `[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]`. Sanitize ID. |
| 95 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/AppArmorStrategy.cs | 48 | sdk-audit | `codePath` embedded directly in profile rule `{codePath} rix,`. Whitespace or special AppArmor tokens in temp path malform the rule. |
| 96 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/AppArmorStrategy.cs | 50-53 | sdk-audit | User-supplied `AllowedFileSystemPaths` written verbatim into AppArmor profile. Newline or `}` breaks profile syntax and bypasses confinement. Must sanitize to `[a-zA-Z0-9/_.-]`. |
| 97 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/BubbleWrapStrategy.cs | 64-65 | sdk-audit | `AllowedFileSystemPaths` placed verbatim in `--bind "{path}" "{path}"`. Double-quote or space in path breaks argument parsing, potentially mapping arbitrary host paths. |
| 98 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/LandlockStrategy.cs | 41 | sdk-audit | `StartsWith("/tmp")` uses culture-sensitive overload. Should use `StringComparison.Ordinal`. |
| 99 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/LandlockStrategy.cs | 47-56 | sdk-audit | `wrapperPath` deleted only on success path. If `RunProcessAsync` throws, wrapper script leaks. Move delete into outer finally block. |
| 100 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/NsjailStrategy.cs | 43 | sdk-audit | `(int)GetEffectiveTimeout(task).TotalSeconds` truncates without minimum guard. `TimeSpan.Zero` → `time_limit: 0` = unlimited execution (opposite of intent). |
| 101 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/SeccompStrategy.cs | 47-48 | sdk-audit | `task.Metadata["allowed_syscalls"]` cast directly to `string[]`. JsonElement/List<string> types silently fall through to default allowlist with no warning. |
| 102 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Sandbox/SeLinuxStrategy.cs | 42-56 | sdk-audit | SELinux context from `task.Metadata["selinux_context"]` passed directly to `chcon`/`runcon` arguments without validation. Must validate against `user:role:type:range` format. |
| 103 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/PartitionedQueryStrategy.cs | 47 | sdk-audit | Per-record `SHA256.HashData(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(key))` in scatter-gather hot loop. New byte array per key → excessive GC pressure for millions of records. |
| 104 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/PartitionedQueryStrategy.cs | 60 | sdk-audit | If partition's `RunProcessAsync` throws, `partitionResults` entry never written. `Values.SelectMany` silently omits failed partition's output. |
| 105 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/PipelinedExecutionStrategy.cs | 44-46 | sdk-audit | `bufferSize` from metadata checked as `int` but deserialized value is typically `JsonElement`/`long`. Pattern match always fails, using hardcoded default 100. |
| 106 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/PipelinedExecutionStrategy.cs | 57-62 | sdk-audit | `feeder` Task started with `Task.Run`, awaited after `Task.WhenAll(stageTasks)`. If any stage throws and final channel writer never completed, `ReadAllAsync` deadlocks indefinitely. |
| 107 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/PipelinedExecutionStrategy.cs | 88-92 | sdk-audit | Stage task `finally` calls `outputChannel.Writer.Complete()` without passing exception. Downstream stages drain empty channel → empty output instead of failure propagation. |
| 108 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/PipelinedExecutionStrategy.cs | 97-98 | sdk-audit | `await feeder` then `await Task.WhenAll(stageTasks)` sequentially. If feeder fails, stages blocked on channel input are still awaited. Should await both in `Task.WhenAll`. |
| 109 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/ShuffleStrategy.cs | 53-57 | sdk-audit | `sort-merge` branch documented as "range-based partitioning" but implements hash partitioning with `string.GetHashCode()` (non-deterministic across processes). Naming lie. |
| 110 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/ScatterGather/ShuffleStrategy.cs | 62 | sdk-audit | Same per-record SHA256 allocation pattern as PartitionedQuery. |
| 111 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/SelfEmulatingComputeStrategy.cs | 75-96 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stub: creates JSON envelope but never bundles input data with WASM viewer. `viewerVersion` and `snapshotCapable` are hardcoded placeholders. `await Task.CompletedTask` confirms no real work. |
| 112 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/SelfEmulatingComputeStrategy.cs | 95 | sdk-audit | `await Task.CompletedTask` in method that does no async I/O. Entire body is synchronous — masks stub nature. |
| 113 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasiNnStrategy.cs | 75-77 | sdk-audit | `task.Arguments` appended to wasmedge CLI with no quoting: `args.Append($" {arg}")`. Argument injection via spaces or metacharacters. |
| 114 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasiStrategy.cs | 65-67 | sdk-audit | `--dir {preOpen}::{preOpen}` without quoting paths containing spaces. Breaks wasmtime argument parsing. |
| 115 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasiStrategy.cs | 72-74 | sdk-audit | Same unquoted `task.Arguments` append as WasiNn. |
| 116 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmComponentStrategy.cs | 56-59 | sdk-audit | Same unquoted arguments, plus `task.EntryPoint` appended as `--invoke {task.EntryPoint}` without quoting. Spaces produce unexpected CLI tokens. |
| 117 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmEdgeStrategy.cs | 39 | sdk-audit | `Path.GetTempFileName() + ".wasm"` creates orphaned zero-byte .tmp file. Same in WasmerStrategy:39, WasmtimeStrategy:39, WazeroStrategy:39. Four leak sites. |
| 118 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmEdgeStrategy.cs | 50-53 | sdk-audit | `nn_backend` from `task.Metadata` interpolated into CLI without validation. Attacker can inject arbitrary wasmedge flags. Must validate against allowlist `["TensorFlow", "PyTorch", "OpenVINO", "GGML"]`. |
| 119 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmerStrategy.cs | 49-51 | sdk-audit | `backend` from metadata used as `--{backend}` without allowlist check. Attacker can inject extra flags. Must validate against `["cranelift", "singlepass", "llvm"]`. |
| 120 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmInterpreterStrategy.cs | 68-110 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stub: "built-in WASM interpreter" only parses section headers. Never interprets a single opcode. Returns `task.InputData` verbatim as output with `Success: true`. Caller receives wrong data silently. |
| 121 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmInterpreterStrategy.cs | 83 | sdk-audit | Boundary check `offset + 1 >= code.Length` too strict — skips last section if it begins at exactly `code.Length - 1`. Should be `offset >= code.Length`. |
| 122 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmInterpreterStrategy.cs | 86-99 | sdk-audit | LEB128 parsing: unsafe `(int)Math.Min(sectionSize, ...)` cast may wrap on malformed input. Loop stops at `shift >= 35` mid-varint, leaving stream unaligned for subsequent sections. |
| 123 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmInterpreterStrategy.cs | 108 | sdk-audit | `await Task.CompletedTask` used to silence compiler warning about async method with no await. Masks stub nature of implementation. |
| 124 | HIGH | UltimateCompute/Strategies/Wasm/WasmtimeStrategy.cs | 52-54 | sdk-audit | `AllowedFileSystemPaths` passed to `--dir {path}` without quoting. Same unquoted-path pattern in WasmLanguageStrategyBase.cs:114. Also `task.Arguments` unquoted in WasmEdge:66, Wasmer:61, Wasmtime:60, Wazero:48, LanguageBase:120. |
| 125 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/WasmLanguages/Tier2/TypeScriptWasmLanguageStrategy.cs | 48-50 | sdk-audit | `PerformanceTier: NearNative` accurate only for AssemblyScript path. Javy/QuickJS path is `Interpreted` performance. Misleading to callers selecting by tier. |
| 126 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/WasmLanguages/WasmLanguageBenchmark.cs | 126 | sdk-audit | `GC.GetTotalMemory(false)` measures entire process heap, not per-benchmark WASM execution. "Memory (KB)" column meaningless. |
| 127 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/WasmLanguages/WasmLanguageBenchmark.cs | 271-273 | sdk-audit | Blanket `catch` swallows all exceptions including OOM and ThreadAbort. Strategies silently disappear without logging. |
| 128 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/WasmLanguages/WasmLanguageEcosystemStrategy.cs | 150-153 | sdk-audit | Same blanket `catch` in `GetEcosystemReport`. Strategy instantiation failures dropped silently. |
| 129 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/WasmLanguages/WasmLanguageEcosystemStrategy.cs | 231-235 | sdk-audit | `GetEcosystemReport()` called twice in `ExecuteAsync` — two full reflection-based assembly scans. Cache and pass result. |
| 130 | LOW | UltimateCompute/Strategies/WasmLanguages/WasmLanguageStrategyBase.cs | 104-108 | sdk-audit | `--max-memory` flag may be wrong wasmtime CLI flag. Correct flag varies by version (`--wasm-memory-reservation`). May be silently ignored. |
| 131 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/Strategies/WasmLanguages/WasmLanguageStrategyBase.cs | 202-206 | sdk-audit | `VerifyLanguageAsync` catch block returns `CompilationSuccessful: true` even when wasmtime not found. Misleads callers. Should be `false`. |
| 132 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/UltimateComputePlugin.cs | 185-190 | sdk-audit | Event subscription in InitializeAsync never unsubscribed in Dispose. Message bus subscription leak across plugin reload cycles. |
| 133 | MEDIUM | UltimateCompute/UltimateComputePlugin.cs | 416-419 | sdk-audit | `PublishStrategyRegisteredAsync` swallows all exceptions from `MessageBus.PublishAsync` including serialization bugs and null references. Should log at warning level. |
| 134 | MEDIUM | UltimateComputePlugin.cs | (various) | agent-scan | ExecuteWorkloadAsync stub — returns hardcoded status |
| 135 | LOW | WasmEdgeStrategy.cs | 42 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name '_wasmBase' does not match rule 'Local variables'. Suggested name is 'wasmBase'. |
| 136 | LOW | WasmerStrategy.cs | 42 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name '_wasmBase' does not match rule 'Local variables'. Suggested name is 'wasmBase'. |
| 137 | LOW | WasmInterpreterStrategy.cs | 92 | inspectcode | [Assignment is not used] Value assigned is not used in any execution path |
| 138 | LOW | WasmInterpreterStrategy.cs | 94 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name 'MaxLeb128Bytes' does not match rule 'Local constants'. Suggested name is 'maxLeb128Bytes'. |
| 139 | CRITICAL | WasmLanguageStrategyBase.cs | 160 | inspectcode | [RoslynAnalyzers Invalid reference in a documentation comment] Parameter 'cancellationToken' could not be found |
| 140 | CRITICAL | WasmScalingManager.cs | 386-393, 461-465 | agent-scan | Replacing _executionSemaphore while active waiters hold old reference — count drift leads to unlimited concurrency |
| 141 | LOW | WasmtimeStrategy.cs | 39 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name '_wasmBase' does not match rule 'Local variables'. Suggested name is 'wasmBase'. |
| 142 | LOW | WazeroStrategy.cs | 39 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name '_wasmBase' does not match rule 'Local variables'. Suggested name is 'wasmBase'. |
| 143 | MEDIUM | YoukiStrategy.cs | 87 | inspectcode | [Method supports cancellation] Method has overload with cancellation support |

### UltimateConnector (542 findings: 18 critical, 184 high, 301 medium, 39 low)

| # | Sev | File | Line(s) | Source | Finding |
|---|-----|------|---------|--------|--------|
| 1 | HIGH | (AI strategies, ~120+ files) | — | agent-scan | HttpClient anti-pattern — all AI/Blockchain/CloudPlatform/Dashboard/Observability/SaaS strategies create new HttpClient() per connection — socket exhaustion |
| 2 | HIGH | (Blockchain strategies) | — | agent-scan | Missing input validation on blockchain connection strategies |
| 3 | HIGH | (Blockchain strategies) | — | agent-scan | Missing MarkDisconnected() calls — DisconnectCoreAsync disposes connection but doesn't mark handle |
| 4 | HIGH | (Blockchain strategies) | — | agent-scan | NotSupportedException stubs in blockchain strategies |
| 5 | HIGH | (Dashboard/Protocol strategies) | — | agent-scan | HttpClient anti-pattern in dashboard and protocol strategies |
| 6 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `AuthenticateAsync` — `GitHubConnectionStrategy.cs | 83 | sdk-audit | GitHub/Jira/SAP return GUID or raw PAT as "token" without calling token endpoint. Jira/SAP use Basic auth — callers treating return as bearer token get 401. |
| 7 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `AuthenticateAsync` — `ServiceNowConnectionStrategy.cs | 92 | sdk-audit | Returns `Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N")` — random string, not a real auth token. Rule 13 stub. |
| 8 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` fields — `JiraConnectionStrategy.cs | 21-23 | sdk-audit | `_instance`, `_email`, `_apiToken`, `_instanceUrl`, `_clientId`, `_host` etc. plain fields written in `ConnectCoreAsync`, read across all API methods. Concurrent reconnect produces torn state. |
| 9 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` — `GraphQlConnectionStrategy.cs | 86 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient` constructed then `EnsureSuccessStatusCode()` called — if it throws, HttpClient is never disposed. Resource leak on every failed connection attempt. |
| 10 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` — `LdapConnectionStrategy.cs | 45 | sdk-audit | No null-check on `config.ConnectionString` before `Split(':')`. Null value throws `NullReferenceException` instead of meaningful `ArgumentException`. |
| 11 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` — `LdapConnectionStrategy.cs | 48 | sdk-audit | `int.Parse(parts[1])` with no `TryParse` guard. Non-numeric port or IPv6 address throws unhandled `FormatException`. |
| 12 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ConnectCoreAsync` — `ShopifyConnectionStrategy.cs | 20 | sdk-audit | No authentication headers set. APIs require OAuth/Bearer/Basic auth. Handle is constructed unauthenticated — all API calls get 401. |
| 13 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `ExecuteQueryAsync`/`ExecuteNonQueryAsync` — `ApacheDruidConnectionStrategy.cs | 97-100,114-117,141-143 | sdk-audit | Silent catch blocks swallow all exceptions in query execution. Return empty results or 0 — no logging. Production debugging impossible. |
| 14 | MEDIUM | **SYSTEMIC** `GetHealthCoreAsync` — `ApacheDruidConnectionStrategy.cs | 79 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded latency values instead of `Stopwatch` measurement. Health data useless for alerting. |
| 15 | CRITICAL | **SYSTEMIC** `RefreshTokenAsync` — All 11 simple strategies + `GitHubConnectionStrategy.cs | 88 | sdk-audit | Delegates unconditionally to `AuthenticateAsync` (which is itself a GUID factory for stub strategies). Token refresh must use existing refresh credential, not fabricate new one. |
| 16 | MEDIUM | **SYSTEMIC** `SmtpConnectionStrategy.cs`, `LdapConnectionStrategy.cs | - | sdk-audit | SMTP: raw TCP to port 587, no EHLO/STARTTLS/AUTH. LDAP: raw TCP to port 389, no bind. `DisplayName` promises protocol semantics not delivered. |
| 17 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `TestCoreAsync` — `AirtableConnectionStrategy.cs | 21 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { return false; }` swallows `OperationCanceledException`. Cancelled health checks report "unhealthy" instead of propagating cancellation. |
| 18 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `TestCoreAsync` — `LdapConnectionStrategy.cs | 69 | sdk-audit | `TcpClient.Connected` reflects last I/O, not current state. Half-open connections report healthy. No liveness probe (LDAP WhoAmI, SMTP NOOP, etc.). |
| 19 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `TestCoreAsync` — `SnmpConnectionStrategy.cs | 66 | sdk-audit | `client.Client?.Connected ?? false` for UDP always returns `true` after `Connect()`. Health checks are meaningless. |
| 20 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `ApacheDruidConnectionStrategy.cs | 16 | sdk-audit | `_httpClient` instance field set in Connect, nulled in Disconnect, read in Execute — no synchronization. Reconnect racing in-flight query → null-reference or use-after-dispose. TOCTOU on null guard. |
| 21 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `ApacheDruidConnectionStrategy.cs | 43 | sdk-audit | `Capabilities` declares `SupportsSsl: true` but connection always uses `http://`. No HTTPS code path. ClickHouse strips `https://` then reconstructs as `http://` — silent downgrade. |
| 22 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `DocuSignConnectionStrategy.cs | 20 | sdk-audit | Empty-string fallback for required config keys (`AccountId`, `Domain`, `Organization`, `Pod`). Produces malformed URLs like `https://.docusign.net`. |
| 23 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `SendGridConnectionStrategy.cs | 20 | sdk-audit | Mutable instance fields (`_apiKey`, `_botToken`, `_signingSecret`, etc.) written in `ConnectCoreAsync`, read from API methods — no synchronization. Concurrent connect/use races on these fields. |
| 24 | CRITICAL | AdaptiveCircuitBreakerStrategy.cs | — | agent-scan | BreakerState counters (TotalRequests++, FailureCount, SuccessCount) mutated from multiple threads without synchronization — non-atomic read-modify-write |

| 209 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AnthropicConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient` created per `ConnectCoreAsync` call. No pooling — socket exhaustion under sustained load. Should use IHttpClientFactory or shared instance. |
| 210 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AnthropicConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | `HttpResponseMessage` not disposed on error path. `EnsureSuccessStatusCode()` throws before disposal. Wrap in `using var response`. |
| 211 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AwsBedrockConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | Same per-call `new HttpClient` as Anthropic. Socket exhaustion risk. |
| 212 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AwsBedrockConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | AWS Bedrock requires SigV4 signing. No auth headers set — every request returns 403. Functional stub masquerading as real connection. |
| 213 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AwsBedrockConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | Same undisposed `HttpResponseMessage` on error path. |
| 214 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AwsSageMakerConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | Same per-call `new HttpClient`. Socket exhaustion risk. |
| 215 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AwsSageMakerConnectionStrategy.cs | 14-15 | sdk-audit | Undisposed `HttpResponseMessage` in both `SendRequestAsync` and `StreamResponseAsync`. Additionally `StreamResponseAsync` missing `EnsureSuccessStatusCode` — silently streams garbage on HTTP 4xx/5xx. |
| 216 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AzureMlConnectionStrategy.cs:SendRequestCoreAsync | - | sdk-audit | No validation that `_deploymentName` and `_modelName` are non-empty. Empty values produce malformed URL `/endpoints//deployments//score`. |
| 217 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AzureMlConnectionStrategy.cs:TestCoreAsync | - | sdk-audit | `TestCoreAsync` always returns `true`. Contract promises connectivity check; implementation is a lie. Same in 5 other files. |
| 218 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/AzureOpenAiConnectionStrategy.cs:SendRequestCoreAsync | - | sdk-audit | Response body deserialized fully into string then re-parsed. For large responses (embeddings), double-allocation is wasteful. Stream directly from `HttpResponseMessage.Content`. |
| 219 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/ElevenLabsConnectionStrategy.cs:StreamResponseAsync | - | sdk-audit | `voiceId` parameter not validated before URL interpolation. Empty voiceId produces `/v1/text-to-speech//stream`. |
| 220 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/GoogleGeminiConnectionStrategy.cs:~45 | - | sdk-audit | **API key leaked in URL query parameter.** `$"{_baseUrl}/v1/models/{model}:generateContent?key={_apiKey}"`. API keys in URLs are logged by proxies, CDNs, and browser history. Must use `x-goog-api-key` header instead. |
| 221 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/GoogleGeminiConnectionStrategy.cs:~70 | - | sdk-audit | Same API key in URL for streaming endpoint `streamGenerateContent?key={_apiKey}`. |
| 222 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/HeliconeConnectionStrategy.cs:GetHealthCoreAsync | - | sdk-audit | `GetHealthCoreAsync` always returns `ConnectionHealthStatus.Healthy`. Same contract lie as `TestCoreAsync`. |
| 223 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/HeliconeConnectionStrategy.cs:headers | - | sdk-audit | Custom headers (`Helicone-Session-Id`, `Helicone-User-Id`) accept arbitrary user input without length or character validation. Header injection risk (CRLF). |
| 224 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/KubeflowConnectionStrategy.cs:GetPipelineRunStatus | - | sdk-audit | Error response body not read before throwing. Caller gets generic HTTP error with no server-side error message. |
| 225 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/LangSmithConnectionStrategy.cs:LogRunAsync | - | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `PostAsync` — no await, no error check. Telemetry silently lost on failure. |
| 226 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/LlamaCppConnectionStrategy.cs:StreamResponseAsync | - | sdk-audit | SSE parsing uses `line.StartsWith("data: ")` but doesn't handle `data:` (no space) which is valid per SSE spec. May miss events from some servers. |
| 227 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/MilvusConnectionStrategy.cs:CreateCollectionAsync | - | sdk-audit | `dimension` parameter not validated. Zero or negative dimension produces invalid Milvus schema. |
| 228 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/MlFlowConnectionStrategy.cs:LogMetricAsync | - | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `PostAsync` — no await. Metrics silently lost. Same as LangSmith #1777. |
| 229 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/OllamaConnectionStrategy.cs:StreamResponseAsync | - | sdk-audit | SSE `data: [DONE]` sentinel only works for OpenAI-compatible mode. Native Ollama streaming uses JSON objects with `"done": true` field. May hang waiting for `[DONE]` that never arrives. |
| 230 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/OpenAiConnectionStrategy.cs:_apiKey | - | sdk-audit | API key stored as plain `string` field. If process memory is dumped (crash dump, heap inspection), key is visible. Consider `SecureString` or encrypted in-memory storage. |
| 231 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/PgVectorConnectionStrategy.cs:connection | - | sdk-audit | `NpgsqlConnection` opened but never closed/disposed on error paths. Connection pool exhaustion under repeated failures. |
| 232 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/PineconeConnectionStrategy.cs:UpsertAsync | - | sdk-audit | No validation on vector dimension. Mismatched dimensions produce 400 errors from Pinecone with no local diagnostic. |
| 233 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/QdrantConnectionStrategy.cs:SearchAsync | - | sdk-audit | Search results fully materialized into `List<T>` then re-serialized. For large result sets (top-1000), this doubles memory. Stream results directly. |
| 234 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/TgiConnectionStrategy.cs:StreamResponseAsync | - | sdk-audit | User-configured `MaxNewTokens`, `Temperature`, `TopP` parameters ignored in streaming request body. Hardcodes `max_new_tokens: 512`. Streaming and non-streaming produce different results for identical inputs. |
| 235 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/TritonConnectionStrategy.cs:GetHealthCoreAsync | - | sdk-audit | `GetHealthCoreAsync` always returns `Healthy`. Triton has a real health endpoint (`/v2/health/ready`) that is never called. |
| 236 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/TritonConnectionStrategy.cs:StreamResponseAsync | - | sdk-audit | Streaming endpoint `/v2/models/{model}/infer_stream` does not exist in Triton Inference Server API. Triton uses gRPC streaming, not HTTP SSE. This method will always return HTTP 404. |
| 237 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/VertexAiConnectionStrategy.cs:SendRequest vs Stream | - | sdk-audit | `SendRequestCoreAsync` uses Vertex AI v1 predict format (`{"instances":[...]}`) but `StreamResponseAsync` uses Gemini format (`{"contents":[...]}`) on a completely different endpoint. If both are called on the same connection, request/response format mismatch causes deserialization failures. |
| 238 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/WeaviateConnectionStrategy.cs:CreateClassAsync | - | sdk-audit | `className` not validated against Weaviate naming rules (must start with uppercase, alphanumeric only). Invalid names produce cryptic 422 errors. |
| 239 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/WeightsAndBiasesConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | `entity`, `project`, `runId` from caller-controlled `options` interpolated directly into URL path (`/files/{entity}/{project}/{runId}/file_stream`) with no URL-encoding. Path injection and NRE risk. |
| 240 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/WeightsAndBiasesConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | `"log"` action serializes raw `object` from caller-controlled `options` directly to JSON POST body — no schema validation. Arbitrary JSON injection possible. |
| 241 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/WhisperConnectionStrategy.cs | 11,13 | sdk-audit | `TestCoreAsync` always returns `true`, `GetHealthCoreAsync` always returns healthy — contract lies masking real connectivity failures. |
| 242 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/WhisperConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | `Convert.FromBase64String(audioBase64)` in `SendRequestAsync` throws unhandled `FormatException` if caller passes non-base64 data. No validation guard. |
| 243 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/AI/WhisperConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | No validation that `audioBase64` is non-null before `Convert.FromBase64String`. Null options key produces NRE. |
| 244 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Blockchain/EthereumConnectionStrategy.cs | 25 | sdk-audit | Constructs `http://` (plain HTTP) for Ethereum JSON-RPC endpoint. Transaction data and private key material exposed to network interception. Same issue in `IpfsConnectionStrategy.cs:19`. |
| 245 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AwsGlueConnectionStrategy.cs | 82 | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC fake auth across 4 AWS strategies:** `AuthenticateAsync` returns `Guid.NewGuid()` as auth token — no real AWS authentication (SigV4/STS). Affected: AwsGlue, AwsKinesis, AwsLambda, AwsS3. Any caller relying on this token for authenticated requests will fail. |
| 246 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AwsS3ConnectionStrategy.cs | 31 | sdk-audit | `AmazonS3Client` created per connection call. While it manages its own pool, creating new instances per-connect without disposing old handles causes pool growth. |
| 247 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AwsSnsConnectionStrategy.cs | 36 | sdk-audit | `Region` defaults to `"us-east-1"` silently. Misconfigured region hits wrong endpoint with no warning. Same in AwsSqs. |
| 248 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AwsSnsConnectionStrategy.cs | 83 | sdk-audit | `catch (AmazonSimpleNotificationServiceException) { return true; }` — reports `IsHealthy: true` when auth/permission errors are thrown. Same pattern in AwsSqs (`AmazonSQSException`) and AzureBlob (`RequestFailedException`). All 3 strategies mask misconfiguration from health dashboards. |
| 249 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AzureCosmosConnectionStrategy.cs | 22 | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 5 files:** Empty config value (e.g. empty `account`) produces malformed URI like `https://.documents.azure.com`. No guard on blank required values. Affected: AzureCosmos, AzureDataLake, AzureFunctions, CloudflareR2 (`accountId`). |
| 250 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AzureEventHubConnectionStrategy.cs | 74 | sdk-audit | `DisconnectCoreAsync` calls `await producer.DisposeAsync()` without try/catch. If dispose throws (AMQP link closed), `MarkDisconnected()` never called — handle left in inconsistent state. Same in AzureServiceBus. |
| 251 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AzureServiceBusConnectionStrategy.cs | 38 | sdk-audit | Connection string synthetically constructed with literal `SharedAccessKey=placeholder`. `ServiceBusClient` accepts it but will fail on first send/receive. Returns `"State": "Connected"` — Rule 13 placeholder credential. |
| 252 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/AzureServiceBusConnectionStrategy.cs | 64-111 | sdk-audit | `TestCoreAsync` and `GetHealthCoreAsync` both check only `!client.IsClosed` — always `false` after construction regardless of connectivity or auth validity. Health always reports true, even with the placeholder key from #1824. |
| 253 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/BackblazeB2ConnectionStrategy.cs | 20 | sdk-audit | `ConnectCoreAsync` reads no credentials at all (no AccountId, no ApplicationKey, no Authorization header). All authenticated requests will 401. Same credential gap in GcpBigtable, GcpDataflow, GcpFirestore. |
| 254 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/GcpPubSubConnectionStrategy.cs | 89 | sdk-audit | `wrapper.PublisherClient.ListTopics(projectName)` — synchronous blocking gRPC call inside async context. Thread pool starvation under concurrent health checks. Should use `ListTopicsAsync`. |
| 255 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/GcpPubSubConnectionStrategy.cs | 89 | sdk-audit | `ListTopics` in `TestCoreAsync` fetches ALL topics in the project (paginated). For projects with thousands of topics this is expensive. A lighter probe (single GetTopic or catch first page) would suffice. |
| 256 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/GcpStorageConnectionStrategy.cs | 79 | sdk-audit | `TestCoreAsync` catches `GoogleApiException` and returns `true` — "auth errors mean we can reach GCP". Misconfigured credentials report as healthy. |
| 257 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudPlatform/WasabiConnectionStrategy.cs | 21 | sdk-audit | `TestCoreAsync` returns `true` on `Forbidden` (403). Auth failures always appear healthy. |
| 258 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudWarehouse/DremioConnectionStrategy.cs | 23 | sdk-audit | Constructs `http://` (plain HTTP) unconditionally despite advertising `SupportsSsl: true`. Credentials sent in cleartext. Basic auth in Dremio sent Base64-encoded over plain HTTP = effectively cleartext. Same in Starburst. |
| 259 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudWarehouse/MotherDuckConnectionStrategy.cs | 24 | sdk-audit | Token stored as plain string in `ConnectionInfo` dictionary — visible to any code reading connection metadata, potentially logged. |
| 260 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CloudWarehouse/SnowflakeConnectionStrategy.cs | 26 | sdk-audit | `ConnectionInfo` hardcodes `["warehouse"] = "COMPUTE_WH"`. Not configurable — wrong warehouse used silently for non-default tenants. |
| 261 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/AutoReconnectionHandler.cs | 86-162 | sdk-audit | `_currentHandle` written in `Attach()` (no lock), read in `MonitorConnectionAsync` without sync. `_connectionConfig` read outside lock — concurrent `Attach()` can null between check and use. Thread safety violations throughout. |
| 262 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/AutoReconnectionHandler.cs | 98 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `_ = MonitorConnectionAsync(...)` — unobserved task. Exceptions after the catch guard silently kill the monitor with no notification. |
| 263 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/AutoReconnectionHandler.cs | 241-254 | sdk-audit | `DisposeAsync` doesn't await the monitor task. Returns while monitor is mid-reconnect, then disposes `_currentHandle` out from under it — double-dispose race. |
| 264 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionAuditLogger.cs | 57,221 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `_ = FlushAsync()` in timer callback and buffer overflow path. Exceptions silently swallowed — audit entries can be lost. |
| 265 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionAuditLogger.cs | 225-232 | sdk-audit | `DisposeAsync` race: entries enqueued after `_disposed = true` silently dropped because `FlushAsync` returns early on disposed flag. |
| 266 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionCircuitBreaker.cs | 67-76 | sdk-audit | `circuit.OpenedAt` is a `DateTimeOffset?` struct read/written across threads without synchronization — torn read on 32-bit targets. Should use `long` ticks via `Interlocked`. |
| 267 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionCircuitBreaker.cs | 119-135 | sdk-audit | Concurrent `RecordFailure` calls can both read same threshold — double `TripCircuit` produces two `OpenedAt` assignments, potentially delaying recovery. |
| 268 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionInterceptorPipeline.cs | 99-219 | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across 5 methods:** `catch (Exception)` swallows `OperationCanceledException` in all interceptor execution methods. Cancellation treated as non-fatal warning; pipeline continues. |
| 269 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionMetricsCollector.cs | 52 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget timer `_ = PublishMetricsAsync()`. Low risk (internal catch), but unexpected exceptions outside inner try/catch silently swallowed. |
| 270 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionMetricsCollector.cs | 187-188 | sdk-audit | `BuildSnapshot` does `LatencySamples.ToArray()` + `Array.Sort` per strategy per timer tick. With 1K samples × 1K strategies = 1M allocations every 15 seconds. |
| 271 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 60-88 | sdk-audit | Semaphore acquired but never released if `factory(ct)` throws. Permanently reduces pool capacity on every failed connection creation. No try/finally. |
| 272 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 60-88 | sdk-audit | `ActiveCount` incremented only on pool miss, but decremented on every return/dispose. Pool hits that are returned cause `ActiveCount` to go negative — corrupted statistics. |
| 273 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 104 | sdk-audit | `ConcurrentQueue.Count` is O(n) and races with semaphore. Valid connections incorrectly discarded during concurrent returns. |
| 274 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 157-182 | sdk-audit | `EvictIdleConnections` drain-and-refill on `ConcurrentQueue` is not atomic. Connections dequeued by concurrent `GetConnectionAsync` during eviction are lost. |
| 275 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionRateLimiter.cs | 41-47 | sdk-audit | `BurstSize = 0` creates `SemaphoreSlim(0,0)` which throws at construction. `TokensPerSecond = 0` permanently blocks strategy with no recovery. No validation. |
| 276 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionRateLimiter.cs | 56-67 | sdk-audit | `RateLimitLease.Dispose()` never releases semaphore token. Tokens only recover via timer. If timer stops, tokens permanently lost. |
| 277 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/ConnectionRateLimiter.cs | 114-133 | sdk-audit | `LastReplenishTimestamp` read/written without `Interlocked`. Concurrent timer callbacks can double token replenishment. |
| 278 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/CredentialResolver.cs | 63-112 | sdk-audit | `ResolvedCredential.IsExpired` computed but never checked in `ResolveCredentialAsync`. Expired credentials silently accepted. |
| 279 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/CredentialResolver.cs | 93-104 | sdk-audit | Environment variable lookup falls through to raw `normalizedKey`. User-supplied key matching `PATH`, `HOME`, `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` exposes arbitrary env vars. Should restrict to `DW_CREDENTIAL_*` namespace only. |
| 280 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/CrossCutting/MessageBusInterceptorBridge.cs | 244 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `_ = _messageBus.PublishAsync(...)` — async publish failures silently swallowed. Log warning unreachable for async exceptions. |
| 281 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Database/CitusConnectionStrategy.cs | 128-132 | sdk-audit | Same: queries `pg_extension WHERE extname='citus'` — absent extension reports healthy with "Unknown" version. Bare PostgreSQL passes as Citus. |
| 282 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Database/SqliteConnectionStrategy.cs | 247 | sdk-audit | `PRAGMA table_info('{tableName}')` uses string interpolation. Table names with single-quotes break syntax or risk injection. |
| 283 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Database/TimescaleDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 138-139 | sdk-audit | `GetHealthCoreAsync` queries `pg_extension WHERE extname='timescaledb'` — if absent, reports `IsHealthy: true` with version "Unknown". Plain PostgreSQL without TimescaleDB passes as healthy. |
| 284 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/CephConnectionStrategy.cs | 24-26 | sdk-audit | `config.ConnectionString` passed directly as `HttpClient.BaseAddress` without validation. SSRF — attacker-controlled string redirects to internal endpoints. No scheme/host allowlisting. |
| 285 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/CephConnectionStrategy.cs | 25,29 | sdk-audit | `ConnectCoreAsync` discards `HttpResponseMessage` without status check — 401/500 silently accepted. `TestCoreAsync` treats all non-503 as healthy (401/403/500 pass). |
| 286 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/GlusterFsConnectionStrategy.cs | 51-55 | sdk-audit | Auto-prefixes `http://` if no scheme present, then used as `HttpClient.BaseAddress` unvalidated. `169.254.169.254` becomes live SSRF target. |
| 287 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/GlusterFsConnectionStrategy.cs | 57-79 | sdk-audit | `HttpClient` created, `GetAsync` + `EnsureSuccessStatusCode` can throw. No try/finally — `httpClient` leaks on error path. |
| 288 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/GlusterFsConnectionStrategy.cs | 121-135 | sdk-audit | `GetHealthCoreAsync` uses `DateTimeOffset.UtcNow` subtraction instead of `Stopwatch`. NTP/clock adjustments → negative/inaccurate latency. |
| 289 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/HdfsConnectionStrategy.cs | 24-25 | sdk-audit | Connection string naively split on `':'`, first token used as hostname without validation. Attacker input directs WebHDFS to internal network (SSRF). |
| 290 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/HdfsConnectionStrategy.cs | 26 | sdk-audit | `ConnectCoreAsync` ignores `HttpResponseMessage` — no `IsSuccessStatusCode` check. Broken namenode (503/401) silently accepted as connected. |
| 291 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/LustreConnectionStrategy.cs | 155 | sdk-audit | `GetFileSystemInfos()` on Lustre mount (potentially millions of entries) just to count for status message. Blocks calling thread. |
| 292 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/MinioConnectionStrategy.cs | 66-67 | sdk-audit | MinIO auth uses HTTP Basic instead of AWS SigV4 (HMAC-SHA256). Implementation non-functional against real MinIO. |
| 293 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/MinioConnectionStrategy.cs | 69-126 | sdk-audit | `HttpResponseMessage` from `SendAsync` never disposed — both initial and retry responses leak. |
| 294 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/MinioConnectionStrategy.cs | 76 | sdk-audit | Access key stored in plain-text in `ConnectionInfo` dictionary — visible to health check serialization/logging. |
| 295 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/FileSystem/MinioFsConnectionStrategy.cs | 24-27 | sdk-audit | `HttpResponseMessage` from `GetAsync` discarded without disposal. Unconditional leak. |
| 296 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Healthcare/CdaConnectionStrategy.cs | 23-26, | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC:** `GetAsync("/")` result discarded without disposal in `ConnectCoreAsync`. Unconditional response leak in both files. |
| 297 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Healthcare/DicomConnectionStrategy.cs | 123 | sdk-audit | Text tags parsed into new `string` objects up to 1023 bytes each — GC pressure on large DICOM batch parsing. |

| 335 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Innovations/UniversalCdcEngineStrategy.cs | 30-41 | sdk-audit | `DetectDatabaseType` uses brittle substring matching on connection string. `"host="` matches PostgreSQL even in `"targethost=sqlserver"`. Wrong CDC method silently configured. |

| 338 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Innovations/ZeroTrustConnectionMeshStrategy.cs | 233-235 | sdk-audit | Same: no cert pinning in mTLS validation. Zero Trust strategy advertising NIST 800-207 compliance silently accepts any valid chain — contradicts "never trust, always verify". |
| 339 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Innovations/ZeroTrustConnectionMeshStrategy.cs | 256-257 | sdk-audit | `device_id` = `MachineName + "-" + UserName` (PII) sent in plain-text JSON to remote policy endpoint. No signing/attestation — trivially spoofable. |
| 340 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Innovations/ZeroTrustConnectionMeshStrategy.cs | 286-289 | sdk-audit | Timer callback in `StartContinuousReauth` catches all exceptions silently. Failed re-auth → token silently expires while connection reports healthy. |

| 342 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/IoT/LoRaWanConnectionStrategy.cs | 100-137 | sdk-audit | `ProcessOtaaJoin` doesn't verify MIC (Message Integrity Code). Any arbitrary device can join and obtain session keys without AppKey validation. Fundamental LoRaWAN security breach. |

| 344 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/IoT/LoRaWanConnectionStrategy.cs | 175-195 | sdk-audit | `ProcessUplink` doesn't check incoming frame counter > stored counter. Missing monotonicity check allows replay attacks. |

| 348 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Legacy/CobolCopybookConnectionStrategy.cs | 71 | sdk-audit | `GetHashCode() % 1000` used as COBOL record byte offset. `string.GetHashCode()` is randomized per-process in .NET Core — offset changes every restart. Reads point to different data each run. |

| 350 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Legacy/EdiConnectionStrategy.cs | 44 | sdk-audit | `DateTime.Now` (local time) used for ISA/GS interchange control timestamps instead of `DateTime.UtcNow`. DST shifts produce incorrect control numbers, breaking trading-partner validation. |

| 404 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/CassandraConnectionStrategy.cs | 69 | sdk-audit | Duplicate of #2055. |

| 406 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/CosmosDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 162 | sdk-audit | `GetConfiguration<string?>(null!, "Database", "default")` — passes `null!` as `ConnectionConfig`. If `GetConfiguration` dereferences `config`, throws `NullReferenceException` for every query without explicit `database` param. |
| 407 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/CosmosDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 162 | sdk-audit | Duplicate of #2045 path — `null!` config cascading through multiple query methods. |
| 408 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/CosmosDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 209 | sdk-audit | `JsonDocument.Parse(command)` not disposed before `await UpsertItemAsync` — if upsert throws, `JsonDocument` leaked. |
| 409 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/DynamoDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 225 | sdk-audit | `ListTablesAsync` without pagination — returns max 100 tables. Accounts with >100 tables produce silently incomplete schema. |
| 410 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/DynamoDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 225 | sdk-audit | Same pagination gap as #2050 — `LastEvaluatedTableName` not iterated. |
| 411 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/InfluxDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 138-151 | sdk-audit | Flux CSV parser does naive `line.Split(',')` without RFC 4180 quoted-field handling. Quoted values with commas produce wrong column alignment → silent data corruption. |
| 412 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/KafkaConnectionStrategy.cs | 85-95 | sdk-audit | Duplicate of chunk 052 finding #2031. |
| 413 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/Neo4jConnectionStrategy.cs | 18-19 | sdk-audit | Both `_httpClient` and `_tcpClient` unguarded instance fields — concurrent read/write race during reconnect. |
| 414 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/Neo4jConnectionStrategy.cs | 47 | sdk-audit | Bolt port hardcoded to 7687 regardless of config. Non-standard port not configurable. |
| 415 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/RedisConnectionStrategy.cs | 78 | sdk-audit | `db.Ping()` called synchronously inside async `TestCoreAsync` — holds calling thread for full RTT. Should use `PingAsync`. |
| 416 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/RedisConnectionStrategy.cs | 106 | sdk-audit | Same sync `db.Ping()` in `GetHealthCoreAsync` — should use `PingAsync`. |
| 417 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/ScyllaDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 16 | sdk-audit | `_tcpClient` field unguarded. `TestCoreAsync` reads handle connection while `DisconnectCoreAsync` nulls `_tcpClient` on another thread. |
| 418 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/ScyllaDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 23-34 | sdk-audit | `Capabilities` claims `SupportsPooling`, `SupportsStreaming`, `SupportsBulkOperations`, `SupportsSchemaDiscovery` — all false. Strategy is TCP ping wrapper that refuses all queries. Misleads strategy selection. |
| 419 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/NoSql/ScyllaDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 82-97 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteQueryAsync` returns `OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED` sentinel dict; `ExecuteNonQueryAsync` silently returns -1. Rule 13 stub claiming Cassandra compatibility while doing nothing. |
| 420 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/AppDynamicsConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | `HttpClient` created per `ConnectCoreAsync` call, old instance not disposed → socket exhaustion. **SYSTEMIC: same in ArangoDB, Couchbase, InfluxDb, OpenSearch, Neo4j.** |
| 421 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/AppDynamicsConnectionStrategy.cs | 15-16 | sdk-audit | `PushLogsAsync`/`PushTracesAsync` throw `NotSupportedException` at runtime. If base type advertises these in Capabilities, callers can't anticipate failure. |
| 422 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/AwsCloudWatchConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | **SYSTEMIC across all 15 files:** `new HttpClient()` per `ConnectCoreAsync` — socket exhaustion under load. No `IHttpClientFactory`. |
| 423 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/AwsCloudWatchConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | No AWS SigV4 signing on CloudWatch requests. Every request gets HTTP 403. Non-functional against real AWS endpoint. |
| 424 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/AwsCloudWatchConnectionStrategy.cs | 14-15 | sdk-audit | CloudWatch metrics and logs both POST to `"/"` — not valid AWS write paths. Will get 400/403. |
| 425 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/AzureMonitorConnectionStrategy.cs | 14-15 | sdk-audit | Fixed DCR path without rule ID. Real API requires `{dcrImmutableId}/{streamName}`. Will get 404. |
| 426 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/DatadogConnectionStrategy.cs | 74 | sdk-audit | Datadog Logs API path wrong — posts to `/v1/input` (agent legacy) not `/api/v2/logs`. Will get 404. |
| 427 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/DatadogConnectionStrategy.cs | 78-85 | sdk-audit | `PushTracesAsync` posts to deprecated `/v0.3/traces`. Risk of silent data loss when Datadog drops support. |
| 428 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/ElasticsearchLoggingConnectionStrategy.cs | 58-63 | sdk-audit | `StringBuilder` bulk payload built without pre-sizing. Entire batch in memory before upload. |
| 429 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/ElasticsearchLoggingConnectionStrategy.cs | 61 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded index name `"logs"` — all docs sent to same index regardless of source/environment. Not configurable. |
| 430 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/FluentdConnectionStrategy.cs | 29-31 | sdk-audit | `int.Parse(parts[1])` with no validation — `FormatException` on bad input with no diagnostic context. |
| 431 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/FluentdConnectionStrategy.cs | 29 | sdk-audit | Null-coalescing fallback array is dead code — never fully applied due to split logic. |
| 432 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/FluentdConnectionStrategy.cs | 60-70 | sdk-audit | TCP stream obtained without reconnect logic. Dropped connection causes `InvalidOperationException` with no recovery. |
| 433 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/GcpCloudMonitoringConnectionStrategy.cs | 14-16 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded literal `PROJECT_ID` in request URLs — placeholder never substituted. Every call hits nonexistent URL. Rule 13 placeholder. |
| 434 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/HoneycombConnectionStrategy.cs | 15-16 | sdk-audit | Logs posted to literal path `/1/events/dataset` — `"dataset"` is placeholder, not actual dataset name. |
| 435 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/InstanaConnectionStrategy.cs | 10 | sdk-audit | Auth header set via `DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", ...)` instead of typed `AuthenticationHeaderValue`. CRLF injection risk. **Same in Logzio.** |
| 436 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/LogzioConnectionStrategy.cs | 14-16 | sdk-audit | Port-only strings (`:8053`, `:8071`) used as relative URI paths. `HttpClient.PostAsync` throws `UriFormatException` or resolves incorrectly. |
| 437 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/MimirConnectionStrategy.cs | 60-65 | sdk-audit | No TLS enforcement — `baseUrl` can be `http://` even when credentials supplied. Basic Auth in cleartext. |
| 438 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/NagiosConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | `metric["host"]`, `metric["service"]` etc. accessed via direct indexer — missing keys throw `KeyNotFoundException`. No field validation. |
| 439 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/NagiosConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | NSCA protocol missing timestamp field — may cause server rejection depending on NSCA version. |
| 440 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/NetdataConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | Netdata `/api/v1/data` is read-only API — no POST ingestion endpoint exists. `PushMetricsAsync` is a contract lie. |
| 441 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/NewRelicConnectionStrategy.cs | 11 | sdk-audit | Stub health check — `TestCoreAsync` always returns `true` without contacting API. Broken connection never detected. |
| 442 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/NewRelicConnectionStrategy.cs | 13 | sdk-audit | `GetHealthCoreAsync` always returns healthy without HTTP call. Combined with stub `TestCoreAsync` (#2086), broken connection undetectable. |
| 443 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/OpenSearchLoggingConnectionStrategy.cs | 61 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded index name `"logs"` — not configurable. Limits multi-tenant and lifecycle management. |
| 444 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/PrometheusConnectionStrategy.cs | 135 | sdk-audit | Wrong wire format — Prometheus remote write requires Protobuf+Snappy, not JSON. HTTP 400 or silent data loss. **Same in Thanos:102, VictoriaMetrics:133.** |
| 445 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/SigNozConnectionStrategy.cs | 11 | sdk-audit | `TestCoreAsync` interprets any HTTP response (including 405/404) as success — broken at protocol level yet reports healthy. |
| 446 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/SigNozConnectionStrategy.cs | 13 | sdk-audit | Health check starts/stops Stopwatch before any HTTP call — always reports ~0ms latency. Effectively a stub. |
| 447 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/SplunkHecConnectionStrategy.cs | 33-36 | sdk-audit | Splunk HEC token injected into `Authorization` header without sanitization. CRLF injection risk from whitespace/newline chars. |
| 448 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/SplunkHecConnectionStrategy.cs | 72 | sdk-audit | `logs.Select(...)` serialized as lazy LINQ query — non-deterministic if collection changes during serialization. |
| 449 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/TempoConnectionStrategy.cs | 59 | sdk-audit | Tempo OTLP trace payload uses `{ batches: [...] }` instead of `{ resourceSpans: [...] }`. Will get 400 from Tempo. |
| 450 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/ZabbixConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | `BitConverter.GetBytes((long)dataBytes.Length)` uses platform endianness. Zabbix protocol requires little-endian. Corrupt on big-endian platforms. |
| 451 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Observability/ZabbixConnectionStrategy.cs | 14 | sdk-audit | Zabbix sender response not read — success always assumed. Server rejection (auth fail, schema error) goes undetected. |
| 452 | CRITICAL | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/DnsConnectionStrategy.cs | 52 | sdk-audit | UDP `Connect()` only sets default endpoint — no actual DNS query sent. `Task.Delay(10ms)` is fake verification. `TestCoreAsync`/`GetHealthCoreAsync` rely on `client.Client?.Connected` which is always true for UDP. |
| 453 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/DnsConnectionStrategy.cs | 82-92 | sdk-audit | `GetHealthCoreAsync` always reports zero latency — no DNS query issued. Health checks entirely fictional. |
| 454 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/FtpConnectionStrategy.cs | 52-53 | sdk-audit | Dead-code guard: `if (!client.Connected)` is unreachable — `ConnectAsync` throws on failure, never returns false. |
| 455 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/FtpConnectionStrategy.cs | 83-93 | sdk-audit | `GetHealthCoreAsync` reports zero latency — inspects only cached `Connected` property. Cannot detect half-open TCP. |
| 456 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/GraphQlConnectionStrategy.cs | 32-42,77-79,133-160 | sdk-audit | `_maxQueryDepth`, `_maxQueryComplexity`, `_enableIntrospection` written in `ConnectCoreAsync`, read in `ValidateQuery` — no synchronization. Concurrent reconnect produces torn reads. |
| 457 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/GraphQlConnectionStrategy.cs | 127-161 | sdk-audit | `ValidateQuery` called before `ConnectCoreAsync` silently uses field defaults (depth=10, complexity=1000) instead of throwing `InvalidOperationException`. |
| 458 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/GrpcConnectionStrategy.cs | 83-93 | sdk-audit | Fallback retry sends POST to `"/"` without gRPC framing headers. Second `SendAsync` failure propagates without disposing `client`. |
| 459 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/JsonRpcConnectionStrategy.cs | 52-55 | sdk-audit | `"ping"` is not a standard JSON-RPC method. Server returns `-32601 Method not found` but HTTP 200 — `EnsureSuccessStatusCode` passes, giving false impression of RPC capability. |
| 460 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/SftpConnectionStrategy.cs | - | sdk-audit | Raw `TcpClient` to port 22 stored as SFTP handle. No SSH banner exchange, key negotiation, or auth. `DisplayName = "SFTP"` is a contract lie — handle is a raw socket, not an SFTP session. |
| 461 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/SnmpConnectionStrategy.cs | 43-62 | sdk-audit | UDP `Connect()` is a no-op (sets default endpoint only). `await Task.Delay(10, ct)` fakes verification. No SNMP GetRequest PDU sent. Always succeeds regardless of agent reachability. |
| 462 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/SoapConnectionStrategy.cs | 52-63 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded `http://tempuri.org/` namespace and `GetStatus` operation — Visual Studio WCF placeholder. No real SOAP service uses this. Connection test always fails against production services. |
| 463 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/SseConnectionStrategy.cs | 17,51-70 | sdk-audit | Static `_sharedTestClient` with no `BaseAddress` or timeout. Streaming `HttpClient` (Timeout=Infinite) leaks on `EnsureSuccessStatusCode` or content-type check failure. |
| 464 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/SseConnectionStrategy.cs | 74-79 | sdk-audit | Health check uses `_sharedTestClient` (100s timeout) instead of per-connection streaming client (infinite timeout) — inconsistent timeout policies. |
| 465 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/SshConnectionStrategy.cs | - | sdk-audit | Same as #2123 — raw TCP to port 22 is not SSH. No cipher negotiation, no host key validation, no authentication. |
| 466 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/SyslogConnectionStrategy.cs | 43-62 | sdk-audit | Same as #2121 — UDP `Connect` is not a handshake. `Task.Delay(10ms)` is cosmetic. No actual syslog message sent for verification. |
| 467 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/Protocol/WebSocketConnectionStrategy.cs | - | sdk-audit | `ClientWebSocket` connected but no ping/pong or close handshake validation — acceptable for connection strategy but limits health check accuracy. |
| 468 | CRITICAL | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/AirtableConnectionStrategy.cs | 20-21 | sdk-audit | `ConnectCoreAsync` never applies `Authorization: Bearer <PAT>` header. `TestCoreAsync` calls `/v0/meta/bases` without auth — returns `true` on 401 (only false on 503), misrepresenting health. |
| 469 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/AirtableConnectionStrategy.cs | 20 | sdk-audit | No credential (API key / PAT) read from config. Airtable requires `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on every request. All calls through this handle get HTTP 401. Missing validation that required credential exists. |
| 470 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/AirtableConnectionStrategy.cs | 22 | sdk-audit | `DisconnectCoreAsync`: `async` method with only synchronous work + `await Task.CompletedTask` — unnecessary state machine overhead. |
| 471 | CRITICAL | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/AirtableConnectionStrategy.cs | 24 | sdk-audit | `AuthenticateAsync` returns `Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N")` — random GUID, no credential exchange. Rule 13 stub. No API key read from config; all API calls will be unauthenticated. |
| 472 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/FreshDeskConnectionStrategy.cs | 20 | sdk-audit | Default domain `"example"` → `https://example.freshdesk.com` — real Freshdesk tenant. Misconfigured connector silently targets third party. |
| 473 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/GitHubConnectionStrategy.cs | 20-22,231-238 | sdk-audit | `_rateLimitRemaining` and `_rateLimitReset` written from async continuations, read from `CheckRateLimitAsync`/`GetRateLimitStatus` — no synchronization. Concurrent calls produce torn reads. |
| 474 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/GitHubConnectionStrategy.cs | 100-102 | sdk-audit | `perPage` not clamped to GitHub max 100; `page` not validated positive. `perPage=0` → 422. |
| 475 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/GitHubConnectionStrategy.cs | 186-219 | sdk-audit | `CreateWebhookAsync` `secret` param has no min-length/entropy validation. Empty webhook secret accepted. |
| 476 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/GitHubConnectionStrategy.cs | 244-248 | sdk-audit | `CheckRateLimitAsync` skips wait when `delay.TotalSeconds >= 60`. Sustained load with >60s reset window → all subsequent calls hit 429. Arbitrary undocumented ceiling. |
| 477 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/JiraConnectionStrategy.cs | 49 | sdk-audit | Same as #2141: email + API token Base64-encoded without zeroing credential bytes. Fields survive for strategy instance lifetime. |
| 478 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/JiraConnectionStrategy.cs | 99-138 | sdk-audit | `jql` serialized directly — empty/whitespace produces unhelpful Jira error. Missing `ArgumentException` guard. |
| 479 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SalesforceConnectionStrategy.cs | 103-123 | sdk-audit | Inner `try/catch` in `AuthenticateAsync` swallows all OAuth exceptions without logging. Auth failure invisible in production. |
| 480 | CRITICAL | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SalesforceConnectionStrategy.cs | 120-125 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `AuthenticateAsync` swallows OAuth error, falls back to `Guid.NewGuid()` as "access token". Callers hold random-string token, all API calls fail 401 silently. |
| 481 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SalesforceConnectionStrategy.cs | 135-187 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteSoqlAsync` URL-encodes full SOQL into GET query string. Long queries exceed proxy URL limits. Should use POST for large queries. |
| 482 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SalesforceConnectionStrategy.cs | 301-302 | sdk-audit | `GetProperty("id").GetString()!` null-forgiving after `GetString()`. Non-standard error body → `NullReferenceException` at runtime. |
| 483 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SapConnectionStrategy.cs | 24,112 | sdk-audit | `_csrfToken` plain string field with TOCTOU on `IsNullOrEmpty` guard. Concurrent writes call `FetchCsrfTokenAsync` twice, race on partially-written token. |
| 484 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SapConnectionStrategy.cs | 37 | sdk-audit | SAP: `_host = ""` → `new Uri("https://")` throws `UriFormatException`. Jira: `_instance = "example"` → connects to `https://example.atlassian.net` (real third-party domain). |
| 485 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SapConnectionStrategy.cs | 40-51 | sdk-audit | Password stored as plain `string`, Base64-encoded into Authorization header. | 486 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SapConnectionStrategy.cs | 120-169 | sdk-audit | `$select={select}` not URL-encoded (contrast: `$filter` correctly uses `Uri.EscapeDataString`). Special chars produce malformed OData query. |
| 487 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SapConnectionStrategy.cs | 208 | sdk-audit | `CallFunctionImportAsync` URL: `{functionName}&$format=json` uses `&` instead of `?` when no parameters — malformed URL. |
| 488 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SendGridConnectionStrategy.cs | 205 | sdk-audit | `ListTemplatesAsync` hardcodes `page_size=50` with no pagination. >50 templates silently truncated. |
| 489 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/ServiceNowConnectionStrategy.cs | 37 | sdk-audit | Default instance `"dev12345"` — misconfigured caller silently connects to third-party `dev12345.service-now.com`. Data leak risk. Should validate non-empty and throw. |
| 490 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/ServiceNowConnectionStrategy.cs | 113 | sdk-audit | `sysparm_fields` values joined with commas but not individually URL-encoded. Special chars produce malformed query string. |
| 491 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SlackConnectionStrategy.cs | 103,127-128 | sdk-audit | `doc.RootElement.GetProperty("ok")` without checking HTTP status. 5xx returns HTML → unhandled `JsonException`. Missing `EnsureSuccessStatusCode()`. |
| 492 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/SlackConnectionStrategy.cs | 127 | sdk-audit | `ListChannelsAsync` — no cursor-based paging for >1000 channels (Slack default limit). |
| 493 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SaaS/ZendeskConnectionStrategy.cs | 20 | sdk-audit | Default subdomain `"example"` → silently targets `example.zendesk.com`. Same risk as #2172. |
| 494 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/ApacheDruidConnectionStrategy.cs | 103-118 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteNonQueryAsync` sends to `/druid/v2/sql` returning `1` on success. Druid SQL doesn't support DML — method accepts INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE and fabricates row count. |
| 495 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/ApacheIgniteConnectionStrategy.cs | 37 | sdk-audit | SQL query via GET URL with `qryfldexe` — missing required `cacheName` parameter. All `ExecuteQueryAsync` calls silently return empty (error swallowed by catch). |
| 496 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/ClickHouseConnectionStrategy.cs | 96 | sdk-audit | Always appends `" FORMAT JSONEachRow"` — conflicts with user-provided FORMAT clause. Large queries exceed URL length limits as GET parameters. |
