| 498 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 96-121 | sdk-audit | `PooledConnection<T>` fields `IsInUse`, `LastUsedAt`, `UseCount` mutated without sync. Maintenance loop races with `MarkInUse` in AcquireAsync. |
| 499 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 176-185 | sdk-audit | `GetOrCreatePool` no null check on `parameters`. NullReferenceException on `parameters.Host`. |
| 500 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 216-228 | sdk-audit | `ReleaseAsync` silently destroys connection if pool not found, but contract implies return-to-pool. |
| 501 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 279-281 | sdk-audit | Pool key: null username and empty username produce same key `"::"`. Unauthenticated can share authenticated pool. |
| 502 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 311-316,419-423 | sdk-audit | Two bare `catch { }` blocks: maintenance loop and warm-up. Errors invisible. |
| 503 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 388-392 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget: `_ = WarmUpAsync()` in constructor. Unobserved exceptions if warm-up fails. |
| 504 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 503-541 | sdk-audit | `TryReleaseAsync`: if `DisposeConnectionAsync` throws on expired connection, semaphore Release in finally inflates available slots beyond MaxPoolSize. |
| 505 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 543-583 | sdk-audit | `PerformMaintenanceAsync` reads snapshot via `ToArray()` then `TryDequeue` — under concurrency can dequeue wrong connection, causing double-use. |
| 506 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 631-633 | sdk-audit | Sync-over-async: `Dispose()` calls `DisposeAsync().AsTask().Wait()`. Deadlock risk in ASP.NET Core contexts. |
| 507 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ConnectionPoolManager.cs | 638-645 | sdk-audit | `DisposeAsync` guard `if (_disposed) return` not atomic. Concurrent calls double-dispose semaphores. |

| 509 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/ConnectorIntegration/ConnectorIntegrationStrategy.cs | 155-172 | sdk-audit | `CheckConnectorRegistryReachabilityAsync` creates new disposable HttpClient per call instead of reusing managed dictionary. Socket exhaustion. |
| 510 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/ConnectorIntegration/ConnectorIntegrationStrategy.cs | 264-362 | sdk-audit | Five async observation handlers (BeforeRequest, AfterResponse, SchemaDiscovered, Error, ConnectionEstablished) are all no-ops with `await Task.CompletedTask`. |
| 511 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/GraphQlConnectorStrategy.cs | 302-303 | sdk-audit | `DeleteAsyncCore` mutation not passed through `ValidateGraphQlQuery`. Crafted key injects nested mutation bypassing depth/introspection guards. |

| 514 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/GrpcConnectorStrategy.cs | 75-78 | sdk-audit | TLS validation bypassed with `=> true` callback when `_useTls = false`. Suppresses errors on accidental TLS negotiation. |
| 515 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/GrpcConnectorStrategy.cs | 87-98 | sdk-audit | `TestConnectionAsync` hollow — `await Task.CompletedTask`. Init always succeeds regardless of network. |
| 516 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/GrpcConnectorStrategy.cs | 117 | sdk-audit | `_channelLock` declared and disposed but never acquired in store/retrieve. No concurrency guard on shared `_channel`. |
| 517 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/GrpcConnectorStrategy.cs | 131-132 | sdk-audit | ETag uses `HashCode.Combine` — process-local, non-deterministic. Must use SHA-256 for stable ETags. |
| 518 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/JdbcConnectorStrategy.cs | 119-120 | sdk-audit | SQL injection: caller-supplied `SqlCommand` metadata key executed without validation. |
| 519 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/JdbcConnectorStrategy.cs | 298 | sdk-audit | `GetSchema("Tables")` returns all tables unbounded. OOM on large databases. Same in ODBC (378). |
| 520 | CRITICAL | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/KafkaConnectorStrategy.cs | 61-77,156-158 | sdk-audit | No real Kafka client. InitializeCoreAsync=CompletedTask. All ops on in-memory ConcurrentQueue. ExistsAsync returns IsEmpty (not per-key). |
| 521 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/KafkaConnectorStrategy.cs | 101,130-145 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU: `.Count >= _maxQueueSize` check then `.Enqueue` not atomic. Exceeds limit under concurrent load. Same in NATS (90), Pulsar (89). |
| 522 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/KafkaConnectorStrategy.cs | 117 | sdk-audit | ETag from `HashCode.Combine(topic, partition, offset)` — process-local hash. Same in NATS (106), Pulsar (105). |
| 523 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/KafkaConnectorStrategy.cs | 130-145 | sdk-audit | `RetrieveAsyncCore` ignores `key` parameter. Dequeues oldest message regardless. Same in NATS (118-133), Pulsar (117-133). |
| 524 | CRITICAL | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/NatsConnectorStrategy.cs | 56-67,142-145 | sdk-audit | No real NATS client. Same pattern: InitializeCoreAsync=CompletedTask, in-memory queue, ExistsAsync=IsEmpty. |
| 525 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/OdbcConnectorStrategy.cs | 222-231 | sdk-audit | SQL injection: `query://` key path passes raw `target` as `sqlQuery`. Arbitrary SQL execution. |
| 526 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/OdbcConnectorStrategy.cs | 433,337,290 | sdk-audit | SQL injection: unvalidated `target` in `SELECT COUNT(*)`, `DELETE FROM`. No `ValidateTableName` in ODBC ParseKey. |
| 527 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/OdbcConnectorStrategy.cs | 549-558 | sdk-audit | `ConstructInsertCommand` builds column names from caller-controlled parameter keys. SQL injection in column list. |
| 528 | CRITICAL | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/PulsarConnectorStrategy.cs | 55-67,141-144 | sdk-audit | No real Pulsar client. Same pattern. DeleteAsyncCore=CompletedTask. |
| 529 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/WebhookConnectorStrategy.cs | 38 | sdk-audit | Dedup cache holds events 10 min (`_replayWindowSeconds * 2`) but replay check is 5 min. Undocumented 2x multiplier. |
| 530 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/WebhookConnectorStrategy.cs | 113-116,130-136 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU: duplicate-event check separate from TryAdd. Queue-full check separate from Enqueue. Concurrent bypass. |
| 531 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Connectors/WebhookConnectorStrategy.cs | 321 | sdk-audit | `VerifySignature` no distinction between "header missing" vs "wrong signature". Both return false. |
| 532 | MEDIUM | VertexAiConnectionStrategy.cs | 15 | inspectcode | [Confusing body-like statement] Statement can be confused with previous statement's body |

### UltimateConsensus (61 findings: 3 critical, 33 high, 16 medium, 9 low)

| # | Sev | File | Line(s) | Source | Finding |
|---|-----|------|---------|--------|--------|
| 1 | HIGH | (Paxos/PBFT/ZAB strategies) | (various) | agent-scan | Single global lock serializes ALL groups under contention |
| 2 | HIGH | (PBFT strategy) | (various) | agent-scan | PBFT commit verification is a no-op — same-key HMAC comparison always succeeds; Byzantine faults undetectable |
| 3 | HIGH | (PBFT strategy) | (various) | agent-scan | PBFT TriggerViewChange loses proposal data (re-commits with empty Data) |
| 4 | HIGH | (PBFT strategy) | (various) | agent-scan | PBFT PreparedSet and ViewChangeHistory unbounded |
| 5 | LOW | (UltimateConsensus files) | (various) | agent-scan | Empty catch blocks (part of the 139+ cross-plugin count) |
| 6 | HIGH | (ZAB strategy) | (various) | agent-scan | ZAB CommittedLog unbounded List<ZabTransaction> — OOM under sustained load |
| 7 | MEDIUM | **SYSTEMIC** `ParseHostPort` — `FoundationDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 47 | sdk-audit | Split on `:` with no null/empty guard. Null/empty ConnectionString → empty hostname → unhelpful `SocketException`. |
| 8 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** `TestCoreAsync` — `FoundationDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 27 | sdk-audit | `Task.Delay(N)` + `TcpClient.Connected` — Connected reflects last I/O, not live state. Dead connections report healthy indefinitely. |
| 9 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `EventStoreDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 13 | sdk-audit | `_httpClient` unsynchronized instance field. Concurrent `ConnectCoreAsync` races to assign — old client leaks, torn state. |
| 10 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `EventStoreDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 62,81,103 | sdk-audit | Silent catches swallow all exceptions. Caller gets empty result or `false` with no way to distinguish "no data" from "connection failed". |
| 11 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `FoundationDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 13 | sdk-audit | Same race as #2191 but for `_tcpClient`. Previous `TcpClient` undisposed on concurrent reconnect. |
| 12 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `HazelcastConnectionStrategy.cs | 31-33 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stubs: `ExecuteQueryAsync`/`ExecuteNonQueryAsync`/`GetSchemaAsync` return hardcoded fake data (e.g. `{ ["key"]="key1" }`, hardcoded `1` rows, static schemas) behind `Task.Delay`. Nine strategies produce invented results indistinguishable from real data. |
| 13 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `UltimateConsensus/Scaling/SegmentedRaftLog.cs | 553-556,612-616 | sdk-audit | Two silent catches: (1) `LoadSegmentsAsync` discards all deserialization/IO exceptions with `// Skip corrupted segment` — no diagnostic output. (2) `LoadPersistentStateAsync` resets `currentTerm` to 0 on any parse error — stale node re-votes in a term already promised. |
| 14 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — EventStoreDb, FaunaDb, Hazelcast, QuestDb, SurrealDb, TigerGraph, VoltDb | - | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient { ... }` per instance without `IHttpClientFactory`. Socket exhaustion under reconnect load. |
| 15 | HIGH | ConsensusScalingManager.cs | (various) | agent-scan | Connection pool TOCTOU race (GetOrCreatePool) |
| 16 | HIGH | ConsensusScalingManager.cs | (various) | agent-scan | Dispose not thread-safe (non-Interlocked _disposed) |
| 17 | LOW | ConsensusScalingManager.cs | 450 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name 'Fnv1aHash' does not match rule 'Methods'. Suggested name is 'Fnv1AHash'. |
| 18 | MEDIUM | IRaftStrategy.cs | 431 | inspectcode | [Access to modified captured variable] Captured variable is modified in the outer scope |
| 19 | MEDIUM | IRaftStrategy.cs | 432 | inspectcode | [Access to modified captured variable] Captured variable is modified in the outer scope |
| 20 | MEDIUM | IRaftStrategy.cs | 470 | inspectcode | [Access to modified captured variable] Captured variable is modified in the outer scope |
| 21 | MEDIUM | IRaftStrategy.cs | 471 | inspectcode | [Access to modified captured variable] Captured variable is modified in the outer scope |
| 22 | LOW | IRaftStrategy.cs | 714 | inspectcode | [Collection content is never queried: Private accessibility] Content of collection 'ViewChangeHistory' is only updated but never used |
| 23 | HIGH | IRaftStrategy.cs | 777 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent synchronization on field] The field is sometimes used inside synchronized block and sometimes used without synchronization |
| 24 | HIGH | IRaftStrategy.cs | 780 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent synchronization on field] The field is sometimes used inside synchronized block and sometimes used without synchronization |
| 25 | HIGH | IRaftStrategy.cs | 783 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent synchronization on field] The field is sometimes used inside synchronized block and sometimes used without synchronization |
| 26 | HIGH | SegmentedRaftLog.cs | (various) | agent-scan | CompactAsync re-indexes entries — breaks Raft log index monotonicity invariant |
| 27 | HIGH | SegmentedRaftLog.cs | (various) | agent-scan | _entriesLock ReaderWriterLockSlim not disposed |
| 28 | CRITICAL | SegmentedRaftLog.cs | 670 | agent-scan | CompactionCallback calls _logLock.Wait() synchronously on thread pool timer thread — thread pool starvation/deadlock |
| 29 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/DuckDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 12,30,38,43 | sdk-audit | `_filePath` unsynchronized field — `DisconnectCoreAsync` sets `null`, concurrent `TestCoreAsync` reads stale/null value. Torn reads on reconnect. |
| 30 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/DuckDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 19-24 | sdk-audit | `Capabilities` declares `SupportsAuthentication: false` — DuckDB supports auth in server mode. Strategy mixes embedded/server modes without surfacing distinction. |
| 31 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/DuckDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 30 | sdk-audit | No null/empty validation on `ConnectionString` for non-`:memory:` paths. Empty string passes `TestCoreAsync` (not null). |
| 32 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/DuckDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 53-73 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteQueryAsync`/`ExecuteNonQueryAsync`/`GetSchemaAsync` return empty results silently. `Capabilities` claims `SupportsBulkOperations: true`, `SupportsSchemaDiscovery: true` — lies. |
| 33 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/EventStoreDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 76 | sdk-audit | JSON injection: `eventData` from `command.Split(' |
| 34 | LOW | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/EventStoreDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 105 | sdk-audit | `ParseHostPort` strips `http://` but not `https://`. TLS connection string includes scheme in hostname. |
| 35 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/FaunaDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 22-26 | sdk-audit | SSRF: auth credential sent to endpoint from user-supplied `config.ConnectionString`. Attacker-controlled URL receives bearer token. Validate endpoint domain. |
| 36 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/FoundationDbConnectionStrategy.cs | 30-46 | sdk-audit | Same as #2197 — `ExecuteQueryAsync`/`ExecuteNonQueryAsync` silently return empty/0. `Capabilities` claims `SupportsPooling: true`, `SupportsBulkOperations: true`. |
| 37 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/Strategies/SpecializedDb/HazelcastConnectionStrategy.cs | 18 | sdk-audit | `Capabilities` declares `SupportsTransactions: false` — Hazelcast supports XA transactions. Contract lie may cause callers to avoid available transactions. |
| 38 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/UltimateConnectorPlugin.cs | 47,154 | sdk-audit | `_initialized` plain `bool` without synchronization. Concurrent `OnStartCoreAsync` races — both execute full discovery, no memory barrier on write. |
| 39 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/UltimateConnectorPlugin.cs | 91-141 | sdk-audit | `DeclaredCapabilities` property rebuilds `List<RegisteredCapability>` from all 283 strategies on every access. O(n) LINQ on every handshake call. Cache after init. |
| 40 | MEDIUM | UltimateConnector/UltimateConnectorPlugin.cs | 209-263 | sdk-audit | `GetStaticKnowledge()` runs 3 separate `Count(predicate)` + `GroupBy` over all strategies = O(4n) per call. Pre-compute during init. |
| 41 | HIGH | UltimateConnector/UltimateConnectorPlugin.cs | 457-460 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `PublishStrategyRegisteredAsync` — strategy registration failures silently dropped. No way to detect missing bus broadcast at startup. |
| 42 | LOW | UltimateConsensus/ConsistentHash.cs | 42-46 | sdk-audit | `GetBucket` returns `0` for `numBuckets <= 0` silently. Public static method should throw `ArgumentOutOfRangeException`. |
| 43 | MEDIUM | UltimateConsensus/ConsistentHash.cs | 54-60 | sdk-audit | `Route(string)` acquires `_lock` for read-only `GetBucket` call. Every routing call blocks all other routing threads. Use `volatile int` for `_bucketCount` so reads are lock-free. |
| 44 | CRITICAL | UltimateConsensus/ConsistentHash.cs | 95-101 | sdk-audit | **Data-loss routing bug**: `RemoveNode` removes from `_activeNodes` but doesn't reduce `_bucketCount`. `Route` uses `_bucketCount` directly without consulting `_activeNodes` — removed nodes still receive traffic. Keys hashing to dead node's bucket routed to dead Raft group until restart. |
| 45 | HIGH | UltimateConsensus/IRaftStrategy.cs | 86-89,110 | sdk-audit | `PaxosStrategy._isStableLeader` read outside `_lock` without `volatile`/`Volatile.Read` — stale-read race. `_nextProposalNumber` is `long` incremented without `Interlocked` — non-atomic on 32-bit platforms. |
| 46 | HIGH | UltimateConsensus/IRaftStrategy.cs | 325-329 | sdk-audit | Compaction re-indexes entries in-memory (`_entries[i].Index = i + 1`) but does NOT persist to disk until `RewriteSegmentsAsync`. Crash between mutation and rewrite leaves on-disk indices inconsistent with in-memory. |
| 47 | HIGH | UltimateConsensus/IRaftStrategy.cs | 451-455 | sdk-audit | PBFT commit HMAC check is tautology: `VerifyHmac(commitHmac, ComputeHmac(...))` where `commitHmac` was computed with identical inputs one line above. Always true — bypasses Byzantine commit quorum validation. |
| 48 | HIGH | UltimateConsensus/IRaftStrategy.cs | 524-549 | sdk-audit | `TriggerViewChange` ends with comments `// New primary creates NEW-VIEW...` and `// Re-propose uncommitted entries...` — neither implemented. View change silently drops uncommitted entries, violating PBFT safety. |
| 49 | MEDIUM | UltimateConsensus/IRaftStrategy.cs | 683-686 | sdk-audit | `PbftGroupState` constructor ignores `totalNodes` param, hardcodes `HighWatermark = 200`. Proposals beyond seq 200 rejected before first checkpoint. Should compute `CheckpointInterval * 2`. |
| 50 | MEDIUM | UltimateConsensus/Scaling/SegmentedRaftLog.cs | 128-134 | sdk-audit | `Count`, `GetAsync`, `GetRangeAsync`, `GetFromAsync` access `_entries` List without `_logLock`. Concurrent `AppendAsync`/`TruncateFromAsync` races — torn state or `ArgumentOutOfRangeException`. |
| 51 | HIGH | UltimateConsensus/Scaling/SegmentedRaftLog.cs | 431-433 | sdk-audit | Silent `catch { /* best-effort cleanup */ }` in `RewriteSegmentsAsync` swallows file-delete failures. Old segments remain on disk, causing duplicate log entries on next load. No logging, no retry. |
| 52 | LOW | UltimateConsensus/Scaling/SegmentedRaftLog.cs | 502-508 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `RefreshHotSegments` suppresses mmap errors. Persistent failure causes silent fallback to slower file reads with no visibility. |
| 53 | HIGH | UltimateConsensus/UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 113-124 | sdk-audit | Rule 13: Constructor `TODO (v6.0)` states `InMemoryClusterMembership` and `InMemoryP2PNetwork` are "DEV-ONLY / SINGLE-NODE". Multi-node deployment silently runs in-memory consensus with no real transport — proposals to peers throw `InvalidOperationException`. Advertises multi-node Raft but only works single-node. |
| 54 | LOW | UltimateConsensus/UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 240-243 | sdk-audit | `GetClusterStateAsync` sets `Term = maxCommitIndex`. Raft term ≠ commit index — callers expecting election term get wrong data. |
| 55 | LOW | UltimateConsensus/UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 496-497 | sdk-audit | Silent catch for corrupted `commitIndices` resets to zero — nodes may re-propose already-committed entries, causing duplicate state machine application. |
| 56 | HIGH | UltimateConsensus/UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 561-566 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `NotifyCommitHandlers` — handler exceptions completely invisible. Need at minimum error counter or structured log. |
| 57 | MEDIUM | UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | (various) | agent-scan | _activeStrategy assignment without volatile/Interlocked |
| 58 | HIGH | UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 221 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent synchronization on field] The field is sometimes used inside synchronized block and sometimes used without synchronization |
| 59 | MEDIUM | UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 346 | inspectcode | [Method supports cancellation] Method has overload with cancellation support |
| 60 | MEDIUM | UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 555 | inspectcode | [OptionalParameterHierarchyMismatch] Parameter ct in base method 'Task OnBeforeStatePersistAsync(CancellationToken)' has default value |
| 61 | CRITICAL | UltimateConsensusPlugin.cs | 617-626 | agent-scan | _groupHash owns ReaderWriterLockSlim that is never disposed |

| 100 | HIGH | PostgreSqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 270-271 | agent-scan | Sends password in cleartext without checking TLS |
| 101 | HIGH | PostgreSqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 337-339 | semantic-search | [CW-03] The PostgreSQL wire-protocol implementation unconditionally sends MD5 password hashes (authentication type 5). MD5 is collision-broken (CVE-2004-2761) and pre-image attacks exist. Modern PostgreSQL 14+ prefers SCRAM-SHA-256 (RFC 5802) by default.

| 127 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/DatabaseProtocolStrategyBase.cs | 997 | sdk-audit | `ResetStatistics` writes `_lastUpdateTime` without lock/volatile. Technically undefined in C# memory model. |
| 128 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/DatabaseProtocolStrategyBase.cs | 1221-1230 | sdk-audit | Two nested bare `catch { }` blocks in `DiscoverStrategies` swallow all instantiation and assembly-scanning errors. Broken strategies silently skipped. |
| 129 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ProtocolCompression.cs | 280-291 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch` swallows compression failures, returns uncompressed data as `WasCompressed = false`. |
| 130 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ProtocolCompression.cs | 358-363 | sdk-audit | `CompressToStreamAsync` reads `input.Length` after copy — throws `NotSupportedException` for non-seekable streams. |
| 131 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ProtocolCompression.cs | 475-487 | sdk-audit | `GetBestAlgorithm` is hardcoded content-type lookup, not intelligent analysis. Name misleading. |
| 132 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ProtocolCompression.cs | 675-757 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stubs: LZ4→Deflate, Zstd→Brotli, Snappy→Deflate, LZO→Deflate. Wire protocol advertises one codec but sends another. Data sent to real servers will fail to decompress. |
| 133 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/ProtocolCompression.cs | 828-833 | sdk-audit | `WrapWithCompression()` returns unwrapped stream. Comment: "would need proper integration". |
| 134 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Driver/DriverProtocolStrategies.cs | 508-525 | sdk-audit | JdbcBridge Commit/Rollback don't call `EnsureSuccessStatusCode()`. HTTP error silently treated as success. |
| 135 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Embedded/EmbeddedDatabaseStrategies.cs | - | sdk-audit | All three "embedded key-value" strategies are plain filesystem file-per-key stores. No actual LevelDB/RocksDB/BerkeleyDB driver, LSM trees, bloom filters, or WAL. |
| 136 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Embedded/EmbeddedDatabaseStrategies.cs | 680,971,1209 | sdk-audit | `Directory.GetFiles` materializes entire array then `OrderBy().Take()`. Use `EnumerateFiles`. |
| 137 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Embedded/EmbeddedDatabaseStrategies.cs | 994-1002 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stub: `RocksDbProtocolStrategy.Compact()` returns `"compaction_triggered"` with no actual work. |
| 138 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Embedded/EmbeddedDatabaseStrategies.cs | 1021-1035,1236-1251 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stubs: RocksDb and BerkeleyDb declare `SupportsTransactions = true` but Begin/Commit/Rollback are all no-ops returning fake GUIDs or Task.CompletedTask. |
| 139 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Graph/AdditionalGraphStrategies.cs | 67,288,490 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient { ... }` in ArangoDB/JanusGraph/TigerGraph AuthenticateAsync. Not disposed if subsequent call throws. |
| 140 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Graph/AdditionalGraphStrategies.cs | 600-615 | sdk-audit | TigerGraph `BeginTransactionCoreAsync` returns GUID, Commit/Rollback are Task.CompletedTask despite `SupportsTransactions = true`. |
| 141 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Graph/Neo4jBoltProtocolStrategy.cs | 82-88 | sdk-audit | `_inTransaction` set false after failed rollback. Server may still have active transaction. |
| 142 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Graph/Neo4jBoltProtocolStrategy.cs | 499-501 | sdk-audit | Non-struct message marker reads garbage into metadata. |
| 143 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/CassandraCqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 86-89 | sdk-audit | `_protocolVersion` read without sync from multiple async continuations. |
| 144 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/CassandraCqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 146-151 | sdk-audit | Sends `CQL_VERSION = "3.4.5"` unconditionally regardless of server's SUPPORTED response. |
| 145 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/CassandraCqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 316-318 | sdk-audit | `ResultPrepared` case returns success without caching prepared statement ID. Subsequent execute lost. |
| 146 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/MemcachedProtocolStrategy.cs | 249-272 | sdk-audit | Multi-get `catch { break; }` returns partial result set without notifying caller. |
| 147 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/MemcachedProtocolStrategy.cs | 500 | sdk-audit | `uint.Parse(parts[2])` without TryParse. FormatException on non-numeric expiry. |
| 148 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/MongoDbWireProtocolStrategy.cs | 232-236 | sdk-audit | `Normalize()` returns password unchanged. SASLprep not implemented despite SCRAM requirement. |
| 149 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/MongoDbWireProtocolStrategy.cs | 296-303 | sdk-audit | `ParseQueryAsCommand` silently falls through to collection.operation parser on JsonException. |
| 150 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/MongoDbWireProtocolStrategy.cs | 641-648 | sdk-audit | `ReadCString` byte-by-byte into `List<byte>` then `ToArray()`. Two allocations per string. |
| 151 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/NoSQL/RedisRespProtocolStrategy.cs | 39-41 | sdk-audit | `_inTransaction` and `_transactionQueue` accessed without locks in concurrent pipelining scenario. |
| 152 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/MySqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 120,476 | sdk-audit | `_sequenceId` field mutated without sync. Concurrent calls produce duplicate sequence numbers. |
| 153 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/MySqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 296-298 | sdk-audit | Auth response length cast to byte — silently truncates if > 255. |
| 154 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/MySqlProtocolStrategy.cs | 497-498 | sdk-audit | ERR packet in result set `break`s without returning failure. Falls through to success path with partial rows. |
| 155 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/OracleProtocolStrategy.cs | 33-34 | sdk-audit | `_sequenceNumber`, `_sdu`, `_tdu`, `_sessionKey` — mutable fields without sync. Concurrent calls corrupt protocol state. |
| 156 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/OracleProtocolStrategy.cs | 119-121 | sdk-audit | Host/port/service interpolated into TNS string without sanitization. `)(` chars in host enable injection. |
| 157 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/OracleProtocolStrategy.cs | 163-176 | sdk-audit | `ParseAcceptPacket()` offset not advanced past `_tdu` field. SDU negotiation silently fails for non-standard layouts. |
| 158 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/OracleProtocolStrategy.cs | 196-200 | sdk-audit | `new byte[length - 8]` — if `length < 8` from malformed packet, negative array size. No bounds check. |
| 159 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/OracleProtocolStrategy.cs | 315-329 | sdk-audit | `ComputePasswordVerifier()` is stub: SHA1+SHA256 double-hash instead of O5LOGON. Will never auth against real Oracle. Comment: "Simplified Oracle password verification." |
| 160 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/OracleProtocolStrategy.cs | 541-551 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { return false; }` in `PingCoreAsync`. Same in Db2DrdaProtocolStrategy. |
| 161 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/OracleProtocolStrategy.cs | 966-976 | sdk-audit | `ParseQueryData()` stub: all result data dumped into single `"data"` key as raw EBCDIC string. Real query results corrupted. |
| 162 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/PostgreSqlCatalogProvider.cs | 339-360 | sdk-audit | N+1: `GetTableColumnsInternalAsync` called sequentially per table in `foreach`. |
| 163 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/PostgreSqlSqlEngineIntegration.cs | 32-33 | sdk-audit | Transaction state fields plain instance fields, no sync. Torn reads under concurrent async continuations. |
| 164 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/PostgreSqlSqlEngineIntegration.cs | 421-433 | sdk-audit | `CommitTransactionAsync` on failed transaction silently transitions to idle state, returns success. Neither commits nor rolls back. |
| 165 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/PostgreSqlSqlEngineIntegration.cs | 421-433 | sdk-audit | `CommitTransactionAsync` name lies — silently discards failed transaction. |
| 166 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/PostgreSqlSqlEngineIntegration.cs | 489-512 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteDdlAsync`/`ExecuteDmlAsync` return success with hardcoded row counts ("INSERT 0 1", "UPDATE 1") without performing any storage operation. |
| 167 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/TdsProtocolStrategy.cs | 117,1076 | sdk-audit | `_packetId++` without lock, `_envChanges` plain Dictionary updated during concurrent parsing. |
| 168 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/TdsProtocolStrategy.cs | 274 | sdk-audit | `NotifySslUpgradeAsync` is async no-op. Encryption requirement from pre-login never acted upon. |
| 169 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/TdsProtocolStrategy.cs | 498-503 | sdk-audit | Unknown TDS token reads 2-byte length; tokens with 4-byte or fixed headers corrupt all subsequent parsing. |
| 170 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Relational/TdsProtocolStrategy.cs | 1003-1033 | sdk-audit | `ParseColumnValue()` only handles INT/BIGINT/NVARCHAR/VARCHAR. FLOAT, DECIMAL, DATETIME, BIT, MONEY, XML etc. silently return `null`. |
| 171 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Search/AdditionalSearchStrategies.cs | 67 | sdk-audit | `SolrProtocolStrategy` creates new HttpClient without disposing old. Handler leaked on reconnect. |
| 172 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Search/AdditionalSearchStrategies.cs | 70-76 | sdk-audit | SSL bypass `(message, cert, chain, errors) => true` guarded by `_verifySsl` flag with no safe setter — dead code that could be accidentally activated. Same in Elasticsearch/OpenSearch. |
| 173 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Search/ElasticsearchProtocolStrategy.cs | 122-130 | sdk-audit | `JsonDocument.Parse(content)` never disposed. Pooled buffer leak per auth call. Same in OpenSearch. |
| 174 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimeSeriesProtocolStrategies.cs | 174-179 | sdk-audit | `PingCoreAsync` sends HTTP GET without try/catch. Exception propagates instead of returning false. |
| 175 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimeSeriesProtocolStrategies.cs | 273 | sdk-audit | TimescaleDb directly instantiates `PostgreSqlProtocolStrategy` by full class name. Intra-plugin coupling. |
| 176 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimeSeriesProtocolStrategies.cs | 294-295 | sdk-audit | TimescaleDb `PerformHandshakeAsync` performs full connect+auth lifecycle. `AuthenticateAsync` is no-op. Breaks base class contract. |
| 177 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimeSeriesProtocolStrategies.cs | 370,378 | sdk-audit | `SharedHttpClient` static field: `DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", ...)` leaks auth headers between instances. |
| 178 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimeSeriesProtocolStrategies.cs | 377-451 | sdk-audit | `_httpClient = SharedHttpClient` then `CleanupConnectionAsync` calls `_httpClient?.Dispose()` — disposes static shared client. |
| 179 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Virtualization/SqlOverObjectProtocolStrategy.cs | 181 | sdk-audit | Query cache has no invalidation mechanism for `RegisterTable` updates. Stale data served for 5-minute TTL. |
| 180 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Virtualization/SqlOverObjectProtocolStrategy.cs | 379 | sdk-audit | `stream.Position` accessed after `using` block disposes stream. `ObjectDisposedException`. |
| 181 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Virtualization/SqlOverObjectProtocolStrategy.cs | 420-456 | sdk-audit | `ReadToEndAsync` materializes entire JSON file in memory before parsing. |
| 182 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/Strategies/Virtualization/SqlOverObjectProtocolStrategy.cs | 626-635 | sdk-audit | Cache key = full SQL + all params concatenated. Unbounded string keys. Should hash. |
| 183 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/UltimateDatabaseProtocolPlugin.cs | 112-143 | sdk-audit | `DeclaredCapabilities` computed getter enumerates all strategies per call. No caching. |
| 184 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseProtocol/UltimateDatabaseProtocolPlugin.cs | 487-489 | sdk-audit | `PublishStrategyRegisteredAsync` bare `catch { }` swallows all exceptions. |

| 90 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/DatabaseStorageOptimization.cs | 422-437 | sdk-audit | `GetAsync` read-then-put TOCTOU: concurrent misses both invoke expensive fallback and double-fill cache. |
| 91 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/DatabaseStorageOptimization.cs | 482-487 | sdk-audit | LRU eviction `OrderBy().FirstOrDefault()` per eviction = O(M × N log N). |
| 92 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/DistributedGraphProcessing.cs | 27-28,106 | sdk-audit | `_currentSuperstep` and `_isActive` plain fields read concurrently without volatile/Interlocked. |
| 93 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/DistributedGraphProcessing.cs | 173-176 | sdk-audit | `GroupBy(v => v.Partition).ToList()` every superstep materializes O(V) objects. |
| 94 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/GraphAnalyticsStrategies.cs | 638-665 | sdk-audit | `CalculateModularityGain` O(V) per call inside innermost Louvain loop. Total O(V² × iterations). |
| 95 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/GraphAnalyticsStrategies.cs | 670-685 | sdk-audit | Modularity calculation O(V²) iterating all vertex pairs. |
| 96 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/GraphAnalyticsStrategies.cs | 817-819 | sdk-audit | LabelPropagation returns `Modularity = 0` without computing it. Misleading. |
| 97 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/GraphPartitioningStrategies.cs | 318 | sdk-audit | `Math.Abs(GetHashCode()) % PartitionCount` — `int.MinValue` produces negative partition index. |

| 99 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/GraphVisualizationExport.cs | 499-510 | sdk-audit | `ParseHexColor` throws on malformed 6-char hex. No TryParse fallback. |
| 100 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/UltimateDatabaseStoragePlugin.cs | 281-312 | sdk-audit | `HandleStoreAsync` silently returns on missing/invalid parameters — caller receives no error response. |

| 1 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `UltimateDataCatalog/UltimateDataCatalogPlugin.cs | 525,537,549 | sdk-audit | Three `catch { /* corrupted state — start fresh */ }` blocks swallow deserialization errors for assets, relationships, and glossary. Silent data loss on startup with zero diagnostics. |

| 1 | MEDIUM | (DetectFormat path) | — | agent-scan | DetectFormat iterates ALL strategies sequentially — no extension-to-strategy index |

| 4 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/AI/OnnxStrategy.cs | 91-109 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stubs: `ParseAsync` and `SerializeAsync` return `DataFormatResult.Fail(...)` citing absent library dependency. Format detection succeeds but all data operations always fail. |

| 6 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Simulation/CgnsStrategy.cs | 76-86 | sdk-audit | Rule 13 stubs: `ParseAsync` always returns `DataFormatResult.Fail(...)` citing absent native library. | 35 | HIGH | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/AI/SafeTensorsStrategy.cs | 118-119,154 | sdk-audit | `headerLength` read as `long`, cast to `(int)headerLength` for allocation without overflow check. Malicious file with header >2GB causes unchecked integer overflow. Same at line 154 `(int)tensorSize`. |
| 36 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/AI/SafeTensorsStrategy.cs | 152-154 | sdk-audit | O(n) random-access seeks per tensor in `ParseAsync`. Non-seekable streams (network) throw at runtime with no guard. `Capabilities.Streaming = false` mitigates but no explicit check. |
| 37 | HIGH | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Binary/ProtobufStrategy.cs | 7,74-111 | sdk-audit | Rule 13: Class comment says "Stub implementation". `ParseAsync`/`SerializeAsync` return `Fail` citing need for `Google.Protobuf`. `ValidateCoreAsync` returns `Valid` unconditionally when schema provided — no bytes validated. |
| 38 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Binary/ProtobufStrategy.cs | 99-111 | sdk-audit | `ValidateCoreAsync` returns `Valid` when schema provided without reading any bytes. Non-protobuf file with any schema object reported as valid — contract lie. |
| 39 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Columnar/ArrowFlightStrategy.cs | 97 | sdk-audit | `_flights` is plain `Dictionary<string, FlightRegistration>` accessed concurrently from `DoPut` (write) and `GetFlightInfo`/`DoGet`/`ListFlights` (reads). Race condition → data corruption or `InvalidOperationException`. Use `ConcurrentDictionary`. |
| 40 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Columnar/ArrowFlightStrategy.cs | 409 | sdk-audit | `SerializeAsync` calls `output.Write(payload, 0, payload.Length)` synchronously in an async method. Blocks thread pool on large Arrow payloads. Should use `WriteAsync`. |
| 41 | LOW | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Columnar/OrcStrategy.cs | 435 | sdk-audit | Variable `offset` reused as both row offset and byte position. Name collision with `stripeOffset` pattern could cause maintenance bugs. |
| 42 | LOW | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Columnar/OrcStrategy.cs | 477 | sdk-audit | `PostscriptSize = 13` hardcoded constant. Any layout change without updating this constant silently breaks the entire format. Should be computed. |
| 43 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Columnar/OrcStrategy.cs | 723 | sdk-audit | Unsafe `long`→`int` cast: `new MemoryStream(fileBytes, (int)sOffset, sLength)` silently truncates stripe offset. Files >2GB get wrong slices or `ArgumentOutOfRangeException`. |
| 44 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Columnar/OrcStrategy.cs | 760 | sdk-audit | `allColumns.Add(null!)` fills list with null references via null-forgiving operator. If zero stripes, nulls propagate to `ColumnarBatch`. Error-prone initialization pattern. |
| 45 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Columnar/ParquetStrategy.cs | 99 | sdk-audit | `await foreach` over `ReadFromStream(input)` without `.WithCancellation(ct)`. Cancellation only checked between batches via `ct.ThrowIfCancellationRequested()`. Large files delay or ignore cancellation. |
| 46 | HIGH | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Geo/GeoTiffStrategy.cs | 114-150 | sdk-audit | Stub schema extraction: `ExtractSchemaCoreAsync` returns hardcoded placeholder `FormatSchema` with `RawSchema = "Schema extraction requires TIFF library..."` and three fake fields (`crs`, `bounds`, `raster`). Not derived from file data. |
| 47 | LOW | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Simulation/CgnsStrategy.cs | 99-103 | sdk-audit | `ExtractSchemaCoreAsync` returns hardcoded template schema without reading stream. Comment acknowledges "simplified stub". Rule 13 fake data. |
| 48 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Text/CsvStrategy.cs | 163 | sdk-audit | Per-character `c.ToString() == delimiter` allocates on heap every char in every CSV line. Millions of rows = massive GC pressure. Compare as `char` instead. |
| 49 | LOW | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Text/JsonStrategy.cs | 98 | sdk-audit | `(bool)context.Options["indent"]` — direct cast without type guard. String `"true"` throws `InvalidCastException` that propagates unhandled. |
| 50 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Text/TomlStrategy.cs | 57-61 | sdk-audit | Over-permissive detection: returns `true` for any content with `[`, `=`, or `#`. INI files, properties files, shell scripts all match. |
| 51 | LOW | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Text/XmlStrategy.cs | 40 | sdk-audit | `Extensions` includes `.xsd` but parse logic treats all XML identically. XSD has schema-specific semantics requiring different handling. |
| 52 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Text/XmlStrategy.cs | 71,95,99,122 | sdk-audit | `Task.Run` wraps synchronous `XDocument.Load`/`Save` — `CancellationToken` not honored. Large XML loads ignore cancellation. Use `XDocument.LoadAsync`. |
| 53 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormat/Strategies/Text/YamlStrategy.cs | 59-63 | sdk-audit | Over-permissive detection: returns `true` for any content with `: ` (colon-space). HTTP headers, log lines, Python dicts all match. |
| 54 | HIGH | UltimateDataFormat/UltimateDataFormatPlugin.cs | 141-145 | sdk-audit | Silent bare `catch` in `DiscoverAndRegisterStrategies()` swallows all strategy instantiation failures. Misconfigured strategies silently omitted from registry with no diagnostics. |
| 55 | HIGH | UltimateDataFormat/UltimateDataFormatPlugin.cs | 224-229 | sdk-audit | Silent bare `catch` in `DetectFormat()` per strategy swallows all exceptions including `OutOfMemoryException`. Detection falls through to `null` with no logging. |
| 56 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataFormatPlugin.cs | — | agent-scan | _disposed field not volatile |
| 57 | MEDIUM | YamlStrategy.cs | — | agent-scan | Stream.Position access without CanSeek guard |
| 58 | LOW | YamlStrategy.cs | — | agent-scan | Creates new Deserializer/Serializer per call (cacheable) |

### UltimateDataGovernance (64 findings: 2 critical, 13 high, 25 medium, 24 low)

| # | Sev | File | Line(s) | Source | Finding |
|---|-----|------|---------|--------|--------|
| 1 | HIGH | **SYSTEMIC** — `UltimateDataGovernance/Scaling/GovernanceScalingManager.cs | 185,238,290 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `_ = RefreshInBackgroundAsync(...)` in `GetPolicyAsync`, `GetOwnershipAsync`, `GetClassificationAsync`. Unhandled exceptions silently swallowed. No dedup guard — concurrent stale reads launch unbounded parallel refreshes for same key. |
| 2 | LOW | **SYSTEMIC** — AuditReportingStrategies.cs, DataClassificationStrategies.cs, DataOwnershipStrategies.cs, DataStewardshipStrategies.cs | - | sdk-audit | Metadata-only shells with zero behavioral logic. Acceptable only if `DataGovernanceStrategyBase` has complete non-placeholder default. |
| 3 | HIGH | CrossMoonshotWiringRegistrar.cs | 147 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent synchronization on field] The field is sometimes used inside synchronized block and sometimes used without synchronization |
| 4 | LOW | DataClassificationStrategies.cs | 83 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name 'PIIDetectionStrategy' does not match rule 'Types and namespaces'. Suggested name is 'PiiDetectionStrategy'. |

| 34 | LOW | UltimateDataGovernance/Moonshots/HealthProbes/MoonshotHealthAggregator.cs | 108 | sdk-audit | `RunPeriodicHealthChecksAsync` performs immediate full check before entering loop. Name implies periodic-only. Undocumented eager check causes double-checking at startup. |

| 36 | HIGH | UltimateDataGovernance/Moonshots/MoonshotRegistryImpl.cs | 53-71 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU race in `UpdateStatus`: reads existing, checks oldStatus, calls TryUpdate. | 37 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataGovernance/Scaling/GovernanceScalingManager.cs | 185-292 | sdk-audit | No dedup guard on stale-while-revalidate refreshes. N concurrent stale-key reads → N independent backing-store reads for same key. Use in-flight refresh registry. |
| 38 | HIGH | UltimateDataGovernance/Scaling/GovernanceScalingManager.cs | 385-388 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `RefreshInBackgroundAsync` swallows all backing-store read exceptions. Failed refreshes leave stale cache data with no diagnostic signal. |
| 39 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataGovernance/Strategies/GovernanceEnhancedStrategies.cs | 42-45 | sdk-audit | `AddOrUpdate` factory may be called multiple times under contention — sample could be double-inserted into calibration list. Latent defect in hot paths. |
| 40 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataGovernance/Strategies/IntelligentGovernance/AutoArchiveStrategies.cs | 141-152 | sdk-audit | Missing `created_at` metadata → age check skipped entirely. Newly-created objects with no timestamp bypass minimum-age protection. |

| 68 | LOW | UltimateDataIntegration/Strategies/SchemaEvolution/SchemaEvolutionStrategies.cs | 564-572 | sdk-audit | `SchemaMigrationStrategy.ExecuteStepAsync` always returns `Success=true, DurationMs=100` for every step. Migration engine non-functional. |

| 9 | LOW | UltimateDataLineage/Composition/ProvenanceCertificateService.cs | 305 | sdk-audit | `HandleCertificateRequestAsync` accesses `message.Payload["objectId"]` with indexer -- throws KeyNotFoundException if absent. Should use TryGetValue. |
| 10 | LOW | UltimateDataLineage/Composition/ProvenanceCertificateService.cs | 337-351 | sdk-audit | `ComputeCertificateHash` uses SHA256 while rest of system uses SHA-3/Keccak. Bypasses established integrity plugin. Inconsistency. |
| 11 | HIGH | UltimateDataLineage/LineageStrategyBase.cs | 252-253 | sdk-audit | `GetOrAdd` on `_provenance` followed by external `lock(list)` -- TOCTOU race. BoundedDictionary eviction may replace reference. Concurrent Track and read operations on stale list silently drop provenance records. |
| 12 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataLineage/LineageStrategyBase.cs | 272,305 | sdk-audit | `GetUpstreamAsync`/`GetDownstreamAsync` BFS inner loop scans `_edges.Values.Where(...)` on every dequeue -- O(n) per visited node, O(n*v) overall. Needs reverse-index. |
| 13 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataLineage/LineageStrategyBase.cs | 326-343 | sdk-audit | `AnalyzeImpactAsync` same O(n*v) pattern plus `.Contains` on `List<T>` in loop -- O(d) check. Use HashSet. |
| 14 | LOW | UltimateDataLineage/Scaling/LineageScalingManager.cs | 191-202 | sdk-audit | `PutNodeAsync` increments `_totalNodeCount` unconditionally. Overwrites double-count actual distinct nodes. |
| 15 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataLineage/Scaling/LineageScalingManager.cs | 303 | sdk-audit | `TraceLineage` collects all BFS nodes then `Skip(offset).Take(limit)`. Full graph in memory before pagination. |
| 16 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataLineage/Scaling/LineageScalingManager.cs | 371-387 | sdk-audit | `AutoExpandPartition` sets capacity in dict but never creates new BoundedCache with that capacity. Name promises expansion but none occurs. Metrics report inflated capacity. |
| 17 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataLineage/Scaling/LineageScalingManager.cs | 407-413 | sdk-audit | `FilterEdgesByDirection` ignores direction parameter entirely. Returns all edges regardless of Upstream/Downstream. Caller gets incorrect results silently. |
| 18 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataLineage/Strategies/ActiveLineageStrategies.cs | 179-197 | sdk-audit | `GetDownstreamAsync`/`AnalyzeImpactAsync` build reverseIndex by iterating `_provenance` without lock. Concurrent TrackAsync mutates during iteration. |
| 19 | LOW | UltimateDataLineage/Strategies/AdvancedLineageStrategies.cs | 67 | sdk-audit | `CryptoProvenanceStrategy.TrackAsync` comment: "In production, would compute hashes and build chain". BeforeHash and chain linkage absent. |
| 20 | LOW | UltimateDataLineage/Strategies/LineageEnhancedStrategies.cs | 114 | sdk-audit | `CalculateBlastRadius` calls `graph.Nodes.FirstOrDefault(n => n.Id == currentId)` in BFS loop -- O(n^2). Needs pre-built dict. |
| 21 | LOW | UltimateDataLineage/Strategies/LineageEnhancedStrategies.cs | 131-133 | sdk-audit | `graph.Edges.Where(e => e.SourceId == currentId)` O(E) per BFS node -- O(V*E) total. Needs adjacency map. |

| 231 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Lifecycle/LifecyclePolicyEngineStrategy.cs | 521-523 | sdk-audit | `catch { /* Log and continue */ }` no actual logging. Failing policy execution silently swallowed. |
| 232 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Lifecycle/LifecyclePolicyEngineStrategy.cs | 772-793 | sdk-audit | `CalculateNextExecution` cron parser broken. `"*"` minute reuses now.Minute, schedules 24h ahead instead of 1 min for `"* * * * *"`. |
| 233 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Retention/InactivityBasedRetentionStrategy.cs | 112-115,122-128 | sdk-audit | Non-atomic timestamp updates after Interlocked.Increment on counts. Torn reads on concurrent RecordRead/Write. |
| 234 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Retention/LegalHoldStrategy.cs | 120-124 | sdk-audit | `hold.HeldObjects.Add(objectId)` outside lock block. Plain List shared across concurrent callers -- corruption. Same for Custodians. |

| 237 | LOW | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Retention/SmartRetentionStrategy.cs | 116-119 | sdk-audit | `BusinessValueSignals` List accessed concurrently without lock from RecordAccess and RecordBusinessValueSignal. |
| 238 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/AutoShardingStrategy.cs | 141,209 | sdk-audit | `_nextShardIndex` incremented with `++` from concurrent paths without Interlocked. Non-volatile fields. |
| 239 | HIGH | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/AutoShardingStrategy.cs | 442 | sdk-audit | `_ = Task.Run(() => MonitorAndAdjustAsync(CancellationToken.None))` unbounded fire-and-forget with silent inner catch. |
| 240 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/AutoShardingStrategy.cs | 505-508 | sdk-audit | `catch { /* Log but don't throw */ }` no actual logging. Split/merge failures invisible. |

| 242 | HIGH | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/ConsistentHashShardingStrategy.cs | 192-213 | sdk-audit | Lock-ordering inversion: `ShardLock` then `_ringLock.EnterWriteLock()`. Reverse order in another path causes deadlock. |
| 243 | LOW | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/ConsistentHashShardingStrategy.cs | 541 | sdk-audit | `_cacheMaxSize` (100000) inconsistent with BoundedDictionary capacity (1000). No effect on actual memory. |
| 244 | HIGH | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/DirectoryShardingStrategy.cs | 61,145-181 | sdk-audit | `_isDirty` plain bool written from timer thread and others without sync. Should be volatile. |
| 245 | HIGH | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/DirectoryShardingStrategy.cs | 85-90 | sdk-audit | Timer callback `async _ => await PersistDirectoryAsync()` fire-and-forget. Exceptions silently swallowed. |
| 246 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/DirectoryShardingStrategy.cs | 540-565 | sdk-audit | `LookupInDirectory` O(n) linear scan for wildcard/prefix matching on every cache miss. |
| 247 | LOW | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/GeoShardingStrategy.cs | 516-518 | sdk-audit | Unknown country codes default to NorthAmerica. GDPR risk -- EU data routed to non-compliant region silently. |
| 248 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/HashShardingStrategy.cs | 314-324 | sdk-audit | `ClearCacheForShard` O(n) scan of cache per shard add/remove. Needs reverse index. |
| 249 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/RangeShardingStrategy.cs | 125-148 | sdk-audit | Default range start `""` universally matches all keys `>= ""`. Keys before "G" double-route to shard-0001. |
| 250 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/RangeShardingStrategy.cs | 280-326 | sdk-audit | `AddRangeAsync` no validation start <= end. Inverted range creates dead entry that never matches. |

| 254 | LOW | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/TimeShardingStrategy.cs | 118-122 | sdk-audit | Timer in constructor, disposal relies on base class. If init fails before registration, timer leaks. |
| 255 | HIGH | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/TimeShardingStrategy.cs | 391-399 | sdk-audit | `lock(_partitionLock)` where `_partitionLock` is ReaderWriterLockSlim. Locks object itself as monitor, bypasses RWLS semantics. Deadlock risk. |

| 257 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/TimeShardingStrategy.cs | 563 | sdk-audit | `ExtractTimestamp` compiles new Regex on every call. Should cache compiled regex. |
| 258 | LOW | UltimateDataManagement/Strategies/Sharding/VirtualShardingStrategy.cs | 117-124 | sdk-audit | Constructor validates > 0 but field used in modulo. Reflection bypass could cause divide-by-zero. |

| 42 | HIGH | QoSThrottlingManager.cs | 491, 503 | agent-scan | Sync-over-async in Stream.Read/Write overrides — deadlock |
| 43 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Audit/TransitAuditService.cs | 73,168-214 | sdk-audit | `PublishAuditEntryAsync` fire-and-forget `_ = Task.Run(...)` with bare `catch {}`. Audit failures silently dropped with zero observability. |
| 44 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Audit/TransitAuditService.cs | 210-213 | sdk-audit | Catch block inside fire-and-forget Task.Run is completely empty. No logging at all. |
| 45 | LOW | UltimateDataTransit/Layers/CompressionInTransitLayer.cs | 93-107 | sdk-audit | `compressedStream` not disposed if `TransferAsync` throws. Missing using/try-finally. |
| 46 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Layers/CompressionInTransitLayer.cs | 174-178 | sdk-audit | Same pattern: bare catch for message-bus compression call. Silent fallback hides service degradation. |
| 47 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Layers/EncryptionInTransitLayer.cs | 196-199 | sdk-audit | Bare catch falls back from encryption plugin to local AES-GCM silently. Degraded encryption not logged. |
| 48 | LOW | UltimateDataTransit/Layers/EncryptionInTransitLayer.cs | 219 | sdk-audit | Plaintext byte array not zeroed after encryption. Sensitive data remains in GC-reachable memory until collected. |
| 49 | CRITICAL | UltimateDataTransit/Layers/EncryptionInTransitLayer.cs | 241-248 | sdk-audit | AES-256-GCM fallback stores raw encryption key in transit metadata (`"encryption-key": Convert.ToBase64String(key)`). Key travels alongside ciphertext defeating encryption entirely. Comment admits "in production, use key management service". |
| 50 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataTransit/QoS/QoSThrottlingManager.cs | 296-340 | sdk-audit | `TokenBucket.TryConsumeAsync` double-release semaphore guard is fragile. SemaphoreFullException caught silently. |
| 51 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/QoS/QoSThrottlingManager.cs | 490,501 | sdk-audit | `ThrottledStream.Read`/`Write` use `Task.Run(() => ConsumeAsync()).GetResult()`. Sync-over-async blocks thread pool thread. |
| 52 | CRITICAL | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/AirGapTransferStrategy.cs | 117 | sdk-audit | `VerifyPackageSignature` catches all exceptions silently, returns `false`. HMAC comparison uses `==` (not constant-time), vulnerable to timing side-channel. |
| 53 | LOW | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/ChunkedResumableStrategy.cs | 637-646 | sdk-audit | `DetermineChunkSize` no upper bound. `int.MaxValue` (2GB) chunk size accepted, causing massive allocation. |
| 54 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/DeltaDifferentialStrategy.cs | 382 | sdk-audit | `ComputeDeltaInstructions` recomputes `Adler32` over full block per byte position instead of using implemented `RollHash` O(1) update. O(n) degrades to O(n×blockSize). |
| 55 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/GrpcStreamingTransitStrategy.cs | 140-142 | sdk-audit | Pull-mode `HttpResponseMessage` never disposed. Same in `Http3TransitStrategy.cs:136-138`. |
| 56 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/MultiPathParallelStrategy.cs | 735 | sdk-audit | `state.Segments.Count(s => s.Completed)` O(n) LINQ scan on every segment completion in hot concurrent loop. O(n²) aggregate. |
| 57 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/MultiPathParallelStrategy.cs | 755-773 | sdk-audit | Failed segment in `TransferSegmentsOnPathAsync` never re-queued or marked failed. Entire transfer fails after all parallel work wasted. |
| 58 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/MultiPathParallelStrategy.cs | 792 | sdk-audit | `state.Request?.DataStream` null-conditional masks root cause — resume path may not have original stream, not validated before parallel transfer begins. |
| 59 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/P2PSwarmStrategy.cs | 556-557 | sdk-audit | Rarity sort uses nested LINQ `Count(p => p.PieceBitmap[i])` per piece. O(N×M) for N pieces × M peers. |
| 60 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/P2PSwarmStrategy.cs | 611 | sdk-audit | `Task.Run` body: null-ref from `SelectPeer` before inner `try` would propagate without releasing semaphore slot. |
| 61 | LOW | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/P2PSwarmStrategy.cs | 627-628 | sdk-audit | `ActiveDownloads` counter updated by record replacement in BoundedDictionary — not atomic CAS. `ConcurrentDownloadLimitPerPeer` not reliably enforced. |
| 62 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/P2PSwarmStrategy.cs | 711 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `_ = Task.Run(...)` in retry path. Unobserved exception if write loop throws. |
| 63 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/P2PSwarmStrategy.cs | 822-830 | sdk-audit | `RegisterAsSeederAsync` bare `catch { }` swallows all exceptions without logging. |
| 64 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/ScpRsyncTransitStrategy.cs | 126-131 | sdk-audit | Catch block swallows all errors (file not found vs connection refused) during delta download, silently triggers full upload. |
| 65 | MEDIUM | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/ScpRsyncTransitStrategy.cs | 172-173 | sdk-audit | `TransferAsync` computes `dataToTransfer` via delta but uploads `sourceData` (full source) instead. Delta detection completely useless — logic bug. |
| 66 | CRITICAL | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/ScpRsyncTransitStrategy.cs | 374 | sdk-audit | Default username is literal `"anonymous"` when no credentials supplied. SSH connections silently attempt to authenticate as anonymous with empty password. Same issue in `SftpTransitStrategy.cs:265`. |
| 67 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/Strategies/StoreAndForwardStrategy.cs | 392 | sdk-audit | `IngestPackageAsync` uses `entry.RelativePath` from deserialized manifest JSON to construct file path without path traversal validation. Crafted `../../../etc/passwd` escapes `dataDir`. |
| 68 | HIGH | UltimateDataTransit/UltimateDataTransitPlugin.cs | 761 | sdk-audit | `PublishTransferEventAsync` bare `catch { }` silently swallows message-bus publish failures. Audit data gaps invisible. |
| 69 | LOW | UltimateDataTransit/UltimateDataTransitPlugin.cs | 789-793 | sdk-audit | `TransferAsync(string key, ...)` returns hardcoded `"delegated-to-strategy"` without delegating. Rule 13 placeholder. |
| 70 | LOW | UltimateDataTransitPlugin.cs | 261 | agent-scan | Cross-plugin transfers use CancellationToken.None — uncancellable |

| 72 | CRITICAL | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/CICD/CiCdStrategies.cs | 95-645 | sdk-audit | ALL seven CI/CD strategies (GitHubActions, GitLabCi, Jenkins, AzureDevOps, CircleCi, ArgoCd, FluxCd, Spinnaker) are complete stubs — every private method returns hardcoded success (`Task.FromResult(12345L)`, `Task.FromResult(123)`, etc.). No real HTTP calls, no authentication, no CI/CD integration. |
| 73 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/ConfigManagement/ConfigurationStrategies.cs | 439 | sdk-audit | `int.Parse(targetVersion)` without validation — `FormatException` on semantic versions or SHAs. Same in `SecretsStrategies.cs:102`. |
| 74 | MEDIUM | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/ContainerOrchestration/KubernetesCsiDriver.cs | 120-122 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU: capacity check `_usedCapacityBytes + capacityBytes > _totalCapacityBytes` then `Interlocked.Add` not atomic. |
| 75 | MEDIUM | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/ContainerOrchestration/KubernetesCsiDriver.cs | 168-171 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU: `nodes.Count` check outside `lock`, then `nodes.Add` inside lock — concurrent publish can bypass SingleNodeWriter guard. |
| 76 | MEDIUM | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/ContainerOrchestration/KubernetesCsiDriver.cs | 237 | sdk-audit | `ListVolumes` pagination: `NextToken = _volumes.Count` instead of `skip + maxEntries` — second page skips too far. |
| 77 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/DeploymentPatterns/BlueGreenStrategy.cs | 9, | sdk-audit | `_environmentPairs` and `_canaryStates` are plain `Dictionary` on singleton strategies — concurrent deployments race on reads/writes. |
| 78 | MEDIUM | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/DeploymentPatterns/BlueGreenStrategy.cs | 122 | sdk-audit | Rollback reads `"environment"` key from Metadata but Deploy writes `"blueEnvironment"/"greenEnvironment"/"activeEnvironment"` — always resolves to `"default"`. |
| 79 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/DeploymentPatterns/BlueGreenStrategy.cs | 216 | sdk-audit | `break; // Simulated completion` — deployment declared complete with no verification on first loop iteration. |
| 80 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/DeploymentPatterns/BlueGreenStrategy.cs | 229 | sdk-audit | `new HttpClient()` per health-check invocation — socket exhaustion in TIME_WAIT. |
| 81 | MEDIUM | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/DeploymentPatterns/RollingUpdateStrategy.cs | 191-198 | sdk-audit | Health checks iterate all instances sequentially with `await` per instance — O(n) serial delay. Should use `Task.WhenAll`. |
| 82 | MEDIUM | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/DeploymentPatterns/RollingUpdateStrategy.cs | 638-884 | sdk-audit | ABTesting/ShadowDeployment share singleton health-check cache across all deploymentIds — returns stale results from wrong deployment. |
| 83 | MEDIUM | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/EnvironmentProvisioning/EnvironmentStrategies.cs | - | sdk-audit | `workingDir` from config passed to terraform commands without path validation — traversal risk when real execution wired in. |
| 84 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/HotReload/HotReloadStrategies.cs | 86 | sdk-audit | Path traversal risk: `previousAssemblyPath` from Metadata passed unvalidated to `LoadAssemblyAsync` — assembly injection vector when real loading wired in. |
| 85 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/HotReload/HotReloadStrategies.cs | 286 | sdk-audit | `LoadPluginAsync` return value discarded in rollback — continues to `ActivatePlugin` with potentially broken assembly. |
| 86 | LOW | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/Rollback/RollbackStrategies.cs | 16 | sdk-audit | `BoundedDictionary<string, List<DeploymentSnapshot>>` — outer dict bounded to 1000 keys but inner lists unbounded, memory leak per deployment. |
| 87 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/Rollback/RollbackStrategies.cs | 59-215 | sdk-audit | Background monitoring task calls `TriggerAutomaticRollbackAsync` concurrently with manual `RollbackCoreAsync` — double-rollback race, lost snapshot entries. |
| 88 | CRITICAL | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/Rollback/RollbackStrategies.cs | 60 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget: `_ = MonitorDeploymentAsync(...)` — unobserved exceptions in automatic rollback permanently lost. Uses deploy-call CancellationToken that expires when deploy returns. |
| 89 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/Rollback/RollbackStrategies.cs | 111-114 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { }` in `MonitorDeploymentAsync` loop — all exceptions during rollback evaluation masked. |
| 90 | LOW | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/SecretManagement/SecretsStrategies.cs | 19-686 | sdk-audit | All 7 secret management strategies typed as `DeploymentType.FeatureFlag` — wrong classification corrupts strategy discovery. |
| 91 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/SecretManagement/SecretsStrategies.cs | 165,774 | sdk-audit | Hardcoded credential stubs: `"hvs.token123"` (Vault), `"token123"` (Conjur), `"app123"/"env123"` (AwsAppConfig) — fake tokens in metadata trigger false security alerts. |
| 92 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/Strategies/VMBareMetal/InfrastructureStrategies.cs | 92-99 | sdk-audit | Ansible rollback ignores `RunPlaybookAsync` result — failed rollback returns `Healthy` with no error indication. |

| 94 | HIGH | UltimateDeployment/UltimateDeploymentPlugin.cs | 163-191 | sdk-audit | Every `GetStateCoreAsync` returns `Version="unknown", Health=Unknown` — plugin state recovery path always fails, RollbackAsync throws "Deployment not found". |

| 55 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/BaremetalBootstrap.cs | 139-140 | sdk-audit | `ScanForPoolsAsync` called with `Array.Empty<IPhysicalBlockDevice>()` — always returns zero pools. Bootstrap can never restore pools; all devices classified as unpooled. |
| 56 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/BaremetalBootstrap.cs | 162-167 | sdk-audit | Journal recovery (Step 4) is entire stub — `recoveredIntents` always empty, no journal entries read/replayed. Comment says "deferred." Crash recovery non-functional. |
| 57 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/BaremetalBootstrap.cs | 280-299 | sdk-audit | Journal area initialization loop only logs a debug message — no I/O issued. Catch block catches exception that can never be thrown. No-op masquerading as initialization. |
| 58 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/DeviceJournal.cs | 252-256 | sdk-audit | `_nextSequenceNumber` TOCTOU: `Interlocked.Read` then `Interlocked.Exchange` — concurrent thread may increment between, and Exchange regresses to stale `maxSeq`. Should use CompareExchange loop. |
| 59 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/DeviceJournal.cs | 442-468 | sdk-audit | `UpdateEntryPhaseAsync` silently succeeds if entry not found (evicted by circular buffer). Caller believes commit/rollback happened but no operation occurred. Dangling Intent on next recovery. |
| 60 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/DevicePoolManager.cs | 322-340 | sdk-audit | `DeletePoolAsync` comment says "Clear metadata from all member devices (write zeros to block 0)" but implementation is `await Task.CompletedTask`. Device metadata never cleared — deleted pools reappear on bootstrap. |
| 61 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/DevicePoolManager.cs | 407-411 | sdk-audit | `ScanForPoolsAsync` bare `catch (Exception) { }` swallows all device read errors during critical bootstrap — no logging. Transient errors, permissions, corruption invisible to operator. |
| 62 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/DevicePoolManager.cs | 584-594 | sdk-audit | `UpdateExistingMemberMetadataAsync` is complete stub (`await Task.CompletedTask`). Called from Add/Remove/UpdateLocality — existing members' block 0 metadata never updated. Stale descriptors break bootstrap. |
| 63 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/DeviceTopologyMapper.cs | 63-68 | sdk-audit | NVMe namespace grouping LINQ chain is O(n^2) nested inside two outer foreach loops. Should precompute once before outer loops. |
| 64 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/DeviceTopologyMapper.cs | 381-386 | sdk-audit | `DiscoverLinuxCpuCores` bare `catch { return Array.Empty<int>(); }` — no logging. NUMA scheduling decisions affected by silent sysfs failures. |
| 65 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/FailurePredictionEngine.cs | 266-270 | sdk-audit | `HigherRisk` allocates new array and does `Array.IndexOf` per call (3-4x per prediction). Should use static Dictionary for O(1) lookup. |
| 66 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/HotSwapManager.cs | 158-159,390 | sdk-audit | Three fire-and-forget async handlers. Internal try/catch mitigates but future code changes could produce unobserved TaskUnobservedException. |
| 67 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/HotSwapManager.cs | 339,408 | sdk-audit | `_activeRebuilds` check-then-act: `Values.Count(...)` then conditional write not atomic. Two simultaneous device failures can double-trigger rebuild. |
| 68 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/NumaAwareIoScheduler.cs | 163-183,208-219 | sdk-audit | `GetCurrentThreadNumaNode` and `GetLinuxNumaNodeForProcessor` bare `catch { return null; }` in hot-path scheduling code. No diagnostics for NUMA detection failures. |
| 69 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/NumaAwareIoScheduler.cs | 270-275 | sdk-audit | Windows thread affinity fallback matches `ThreadState.Running` which could be any thread, not the caller. May set affinity on wrong thread. |
| 70 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/PhysicalDeviceManager.cs | 217-219,304-305,322-323 | sdk-audit | Multiple bare `catch { }` blocks suppress all callback exceptions (OnStatusChange, OnDeviceDiscovered, OnDeviceRemoved, OnFailurePrediction). Silent suppression prevents debugging. |
| 71 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/SmartMonitor.cs | 165 | sdk-audit | `isHealthy` threshold of 100 uncorrectable errors is a magic number. Any nonzero count is typically critical in storage monitoring. Should be configurable, default 0 or 1. |
| 72 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/SmartMonitor.cs | 213-215,247-249,273-275,560-595 | sdk-audit | Six+ bare `catch { }` blocks in sysfs/hwmon reading utilities. Health metrics silently fall back to "healthy" defaults, potentially masking failing devices. |
| 73 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/DeviceManagement/SmartMonitor.cs | 299-312 | sdk-audit | `ReadWindowsSmartAsync` wraps WMI calls in `Task.Run` without timeout. Hung WMI query blocks thread pool thread indefinitely; polling loop accumulates blocked threads. |
| 74 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/FilesystemStrategyBase.cs | 74 | sdk-audit | `BlockIoOptions.Priority` (int 0-7) conflicts with `IoPriority` enum in ScalingManager. Two siloed priority concepts with no mapping. |
| 75 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/FilesystemStrategyBase.cs | 236-243 | sdk-audit | `AutoDiscover` uses `Activator.CreateInstance` on all concrete types. Strategies with constructor parameters fail silently. No deduplication. |
| 76 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/FilesystemStrategyBase.cs | 242,245 | sdk-audit | Multiple bare `catch { }` blocks: AutoDiscover skips errors, dispatch loop swallows all non-cancellation errors, bus communication failures all silently suppressed. |
| 77 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Scaling/FilesystemScalingManager.cs | 153-158 | sdk-audit | Constructor starts timer with `TimeSpan.Zero` dueTime — callback fires before constructor returns. `_disposed` may be uninitialized. |
| 78 | CRITICAL | UltimateFilesystem/Scaling/FilesystemScalingManager.cs | 385-386 | sdk-audit | `DispatchLoopAsync` fires `_ = ExecuteIoOperationAsync(op, ct)` with no concurrency cap. Unbounded parallel tasks spawn from channel, starving ThreadPool. Unhandled exceptions silently lost. |
| 79 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/Scaling/FilesystemScalingManager.cs | 465-470 | sdk-audit | io_uring detection via `"Linux version 5."` string match returns true for 5.0 (no io_uring, added 5.1) and false for 7+. |
| 80 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Scaling/FilesystemScalingManager.cs | 489-502,509-525 | sdk-audit | `IsCallerThrottled` check-then-`IncrementCallerQuota` TOCTOU race. Concurrent threads all pass check at `MaxOps-1`, then all increment — quota exceeded by thread count. |
| 81 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/Scaling/FilesystemScalingManager.cs | 569-583 | sdk-audit | `Dispose` cancels CTS but never awaits `_dispatchTask`. In-flight operations reference disposed objects. |
| 82 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/DetectionStrategies.cs | 47-58,125-136 | sdk-audit | `AutoDetectStrategy`/`NtfsStrategy` `ReadBlockAsync` use synchronous `fs.Read()` inside async method with `Task.FromResult`. Blocks threadpool thread during I/O. |
| 83 | CRITICAL | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/DevicePoolStrategy.cs | 114 | sdk-audit | `GetMetadataAsync` calls `.GetAwaiter().GetResult()` on async method — sync-over-async deadlock risk. Additionally `poolCount` is computed but never used in returned metadata — dead code that blocks a thread. |
| 84 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/DriverStrategies.cs | 113-152 | sdk-audit | `IoUringDriverStrategy` claims `SupportsKernelBypass = true` but uses plain `FileStream`. Comment confirms "fallback to async file I/O." Naming/capability lie. |
| 85 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/DriverStrategies.cs | 139,229 | sdk-audit | `IoUringDriverStrategy`/`WindowsNativeDriverStrategy` use `ReadExactlyAsync` which throws on partial reads — inconsistent with other strategies that resize buffer. |
| 86 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemAdvancedFeatures.cs | 21-22 | sdk-audit | CAS `_blockStore` bounded to 1000 entries with no auto-GC. Under sustained writes, blocks silently dropped or evicted while still referenced. |
| 87 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemAdvancedFeatures.cs | 55,98 | sdk-audit | `CasBlock.ReferenceCount` modified via `++`/`--` without synchronization in ContentAddressableStorageLayer described as thread-safe for multi-writer. Non-atomic read-modify-write. |
| 88 | CRITICAL | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemAdvancedFeatures.cs | 407-410,438-441 | sdk-audit | `EncryptBlockAsync`/`DecryptBlockAsync` fall through to XOR-with-IV when bus unavailable. XOR provides zero confidentiality. Comment says "In production with bus, UltimateEncryption would perform actual AES-XTS." Data written is not encrypted. |
| 89 | CRITICAL | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemAdvancedFeatures.cs | 449-459 | sdk-audit | `CreatePerFileEncryption` returns raw 256-bit key in `FileKeyWrapped`. Comment: "In production: wrapped by master key." Raw key material exposed to callers/serialization/logging. |
| 90 | CRITICAL | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemAdvancedFeatures.cs | 585-588 | sdk-audit | Raft leader election uses `Random.Shared.NextDouble() > 0.3` for votes. Two simultaneous candidates both see majority with different random draws. Guarantees nothing about split-brain prevention. |
| 91 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemAdvancedFeatures.cs | 613-619,627-634 | sdk-audit | `DistributedHaFilesystemManager` node mutations (IsHealthy, UsedBytes, LastHeartbeat) outside any lock. `_electionLock` only protects election, not node state. |
| 92 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemAdvancedFeatures.cs | 653-665 | sdk-audit | `Rebalance` uses `underloaded.FirstOrDefault()` repeatedly without removing — one node gets all movements, likely becoming overloaded itself. |
| 93 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemOperations.cs | 547 | sdk-audit | `WriteSuperblockAsync` uses `FileMode.OpenOrCreate` without truncating. Old superblock bytes beyond written range persist, may confuse `e2fsck`. |
| 94 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FilesystemOperations.cs | 562-564 | sdk-audit | Comment says "ext4 inline data: files <= 60 bytes stored directly in inode" but implementation writes to regular storage. Sets ExtendedAttribute flag that misleads ext4 readers. |
| 95 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FormatStrategies.cs | 508-510 | sdk-audit | `Hammer2Strategy` detects on `OSPlatform.FreeBSD` but HAMMER2 is DragonFly BSD only. Returns fake metadata for any path on FreeBSD. |
| 96 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/FormatStrategies.cs | 511-521 | sdk-audit | `Hammer2Strategy.DetectAsync` unconditionally returns metadata on FreeBSD without checking path existence. Hardcoded zero TotalBytes/AvailableBytes. |
| 97 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/NetworkFilesystemStrategies.cs | 19 | sdk-audit | `NfsStrategy` claims `MaxFileSize = 8TB` but NFSv3 without LFS limited to 4GB. Should separate v3/v4 or detect version. |
| 98 | MEDIUM | UltimateFilesystem/Strategies/SuperblockDetectionStrategies.cs | 126-134 | sdk-audit | `ResolveDevicePath` returns raw Windows device path (`\\.\C:`) opened with `FileShare.ReadWrite`. In elevated context with user-supplied path, could expose raw device data. |
| 99 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/UltimateFilesystemPlugin.cs | 244-247 | sdk-audit | `HandleDetectAsync` bare `catch { }` swallows all detection strategy exceptions with no logging. Broken strategies silently skipped. |
| 100 | HIGH | UltimateFilesystem/UltimateFilesystemPlugin.cs | 458-463 | sdk-audit | `HandleQuotaAsync` is a no-op that always returns `success = true` without performing any quota work. |
| 101 | LOW | UltimateFilesystem/UltimateFilesystemPlugin.cs | 924-929 | sdk-audit | `ListAsync` silently yields nothing instead of throwing NotSupportedException. Callers believe there is no data. |
