| 343 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Capabilities/ChatCapabilities.cs | 329-333 | sdk-audit | `FunctionCall.ParsedArguments` silently returns null on bad JSON. Malformed function calls proceed with empty arguments. |
| 344 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Capabilities/ChatCapabilities.cs | 432 | sdk-audit | `HandleChatAsync` calls `messages.Last()` without checking non-empty. Throws InvalidOperationException if BuildMessages returns only system messages. |
| 345 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Capabilities/ChatCapabilities.cs | 547 | sdk-audit | `EmbeddingResponse.TotalTokens` is `inputs.Sum(s => s.Length / 4)` — rough estimate, not actual token count. Name implies accuracy. |
| 346 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Capabilities/ChatCapabilities.cs | 683-699 | sdk-audit | `ConversationManager.GetOrCreate` eviction uses `.OrderBy(...).FirstOrDefault()` — O(n) full scan on every call when count exceeds max. |
| 347 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Capabilities/ChatCapabilities.cs | 857-866 | sdk-audit | `BuildMessages` history trimming inserts at fixed index in reverse loop — produces reversed message order when context is trimmed. |
| 348 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Capabilities/ChatCapabilities.cs | 1077-1096 | sdk-audit | `StreamingHandler.StreamAsync` fakes streaming — retrieves full response then emits 20-char chunks with `Task.Delay(10)`. Artificial latency, not real streaming. |
| 349 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Channels/ConcreteChannels.cs | 204-209 | sdk-audit | `ChannelRegistry.BroadcastAsync` catch discards channel send errors with only Debug.WriteLine. Malfunctioning channels invisible in production. |
| 350 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/EdgeNative/AutoMLEngine.cs | 204 | sdk-audit | CSV column access `r[header]` without ContainsKey check. Throws KeyNotFoundException when CSV row has fewer values than headers. |
| 351 | CRITICAL | UltimateIntelligence/EdgeNative/AutoMLEngine.cs | 219-234 | sdk-audit | `ExtractParquetSchemaAsync` is full stub — returns hardcoded `column_0` with zero rows. Any Auto-ML pipeline on Parquet source silently produces garbage model. |
| 352 | CRITICAL | UltimateIntelligence/EdgeNative/AutoMLEngine.cs | 237-254 | sdk-audit | `ExtractDatabaseSchemaAsync` same stub — returns `id`/`data` with zero rows. Database connection string silently produces degenerate model. |
| 353 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/EdgeNative/AutoMLEngine.cs | 293-294 | sdk-audit | `AnonymizeValue` phone detection heuristic too broad — matches zip codes, order numbers, numeric IDs as `[PHONE]`. |
| 354 | CRITICAL | UltimateIntelligence/EdgeNative/InferenceEngine.cs | 399-401,437-441 | sdk-audit | `WasiNnGpuBridge._gpuAvailable` (bool) and `_gpuFailureCount` (int) are plain fields written concurrently without synchronization. GPU lock-out mechanism unreliable under concurrent inference. |
| 355 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/EdgeNative/InferenceEngine.cs | 592 | sdk-audit | `WasiNnModelCache` described as "zero-copy" but uses `File.ReadAllBytesAsync` — full copy on every cache miss. |
| 356 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/EdgeNative/InferenceEngine.cs | 594-638 | sdk-audit | `WasiNnModelCache.GetOrAddAsync` check-then-act window: TryGetValue and write not in same lock. Concurrent callers load same model twice. |
| 357 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Federation/FederationSystem.cs | 341-361 | sdk-audit | `InstanceRegistry.RegisterAsync` TOCTOU race: `ContainsKey` then index-assign. Concurrent registrations leak HTTP clients and semaphores. |
| 358 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Federation/FederationSystem.cs | 527-530 | sdk-audit | `PerformHealthCheckAsync` catch discards JSON parse error with Debug.WriteLine only. |
| 359 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Federation/FederationSystem.cs | 608-611 | sdk-audit | `ValidateServerCertificate = false` bypasses all TLS validation. Full bypass accessible via config on untrusted networks. |
| 360 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Federation/FederationSystem.cs | 651-658 | sdk-audit | Health check timer callback is `async _ => await ...` (fire-and-forget async void lambda). Unobserved exceptions crash process or leave stale health. |
| 361 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/IntelligenceStrategyBase.cs | 158,168 | sdk-audit | `_lastOperationTime = DateTime.UtcNow` written from multiple threads without synchronization. All other stats use Interlocked but this field does not. |

| 481 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/PersistentMemoryStore.cs | 860 | sdk-audit | `DistributedMemoryStore.StoreAsync` writes `_entryToShardMap` before `Task.WhenAll` — concurrent reads see uncommitted shard index. |
| 482 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/PersistentMemoryStore.cs | 867 | sdk-audit | `StoreBatchAsync` fans out `Task.WhenAll` without concurrency bound. Unbounded parallel I/O for large batches. |
| 483 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/PersistentMemoryStore.cs | 966,975 | sdk-audit | `GetEntryCountAsync`/`GetTotalBytesAsync` divide by `_replicationFactor` which can be 0. DivideByZeroException. |
| 484 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/PersistentMemoryStore.cs | 1043-1056 | sdk-audit | `GetPrimaryShardIndex` returns 0 when `_shards` empty → `IndexOutOfRangeException` in `StoreAsync`. |
| 485 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/AccuracyVerifier.cs | 363-383 | sdk-audit | `CalculateLevenshteinDistance` allocates O(m×n) matrix on unbounded strings. Called per verification on megabyte contexts. |
| 486 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/AccuracyVerifier.cs | 447-465 | sdk-audit | `CalculateLCSLength` same O(m×n) allocation alongside Levenshtein — triple O(n²) per verification. |
| 487 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/AccuracyVerifier.cs | 522-529 | sdk-audit | `CalculateHashSimilarity` compares hex chars of SHA-256 — no meaningful content similarity. Misleading metric. |
| 488 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/BinaryFormatRegenerationStrategies.cs | 493 | sdk-audit | Parquet `structuralIntegrity = 0.9` hardcoded magic number. Always reports 0.9 regardless of reconstruction quality. |
| 489 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/CodeRegenerationStrategy.cs | 151 | sdk-audit | All `AssessCapabilityAsync` return hardcoded `0.9999999` base accuracy regardless of content quality. Misleads pipeline strategy selection. |
| 490 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/CodeRegenerationStrategy.cs | 685-686,744-745,795-796,846-847 | sdk-audit | JS/Go/Rust/Java handlers create `new CSharpHandler()` per call for `NormalizeIndentation`/`StripComments`. Defeats handler cache, unnecessary allocations. |
| 491 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/GraphDataRegenerationStrategy.cs | 225-234,320-323,405-408 | sdk-audit | `graph.Nodes.Any(n => n.Id == id)` inside loop over all matches — O(n²) for graphs with many nodes. Should use `HashSet<string>`. |
| 492 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/IAdvancedRegenerationStrategy.cs | 276 | sdk-audit | `Interlocked.Exchange(ref _cumulativeAccuracy, _cumulativeAccuracy + accuracy)` — read of `_cumulativeAccuracy` not atomic with the exchange. Concurrent calls lose accumulation values. |
| 493 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/JsonSchemaRegenerationStrategy.cs | 75-77 | sdk-audit | Second `JsonDocument.Parse` after `RepairJson` can throw. `doc` remains null, subsequent `doc.RootElement` throws `NullReferenceException`. |
| 494 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/JsonSchemaRegenerationStrategy.cs | 232-252 | sdk-audit | `JsonDocument.Parse(json)` return value discarded without dispose in `ExtractJsonContent`. Leaks pooled memory per validity probe. |
| 495 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/JsonSchemaRegenerationStrategy.cs | 357-368 | sdk-audit | `MemoryStream(65536)` never disposed in `ReconstructJsonAsync`. Leaks 64KB backing buffer per call until GC. |
| 496 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/RegenerationMetrics.cs | 372-376 | sdk-audit | `_eventLog.Count` (O(n) on ConcurrentQueue) not atomic with `TryDequeue`. Under concurrency queue grows past limit or over-dequeues. |
| 497 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/RegenerationMetrics.cs | 604-609 | sdk-audit | `CalculateRecentTrend()` reads `_recentAccuracies` list without holding `_lock`, while `RecordSuccess()` mutates same list under `_lock`. Data race: trend calculation observes half-written/resized list. |
| 498 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/RegenerationStrategyRegistry.cs | 62-78,97-107 | sdk-audit | `Unregister` mutates `List<string>` under `_registrationLock` but `GetStrategiesForFormat` reads same list without lock. Data race on concurrent unregister+read. |
| 499 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/Regeneration/TimeSeriesRegenerationStrategy.cs | 475-479 | sdk-audit | `labelKeys` recomputed via `SelectMany`/`Distinct` per data point inside loop — O(n²) reconstruction. |
| 500 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/TieredMemoryStrategy.cs | 118-127 | sdk-audit | `RecallAsync` mutates `entry.AccessCount++` and `entry.LastAccessedAt` on shared `TieredMemoryEntry` without synchronization. Races with concurrent readers. |
| 501 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/TieredMemoryStrategy.cs | 193-203 | sdk-audit | `FlushAsync`/`RestoreAsync` on `InMemoryTieredMemorySystem` return `Task.CompletedTask`. Tiers configured with `MemoryPersistence.Persistent` — contract promises persistence but delivers none. |
| 502 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/AzureAISearchVectorStore.cs | 96-103 | sdk-audit | Constructor validates `ApiKey` but not `Endpoint`. Null/empty endpoint produces malformed URL with cryptic `HttpRequestException` at call time. |
| 503 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/ChromaVectorStore.cs | 85 | sdk-audit | Empty `X-Chroma-Token` header sent unconditionally when ApiKey is null. Some proxy configs reject empty auth headers. |
| 504 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/ChromaVectorStore.cs | 89-128 | sdk-audit | `EnsureCollectionAsync` TOCTOU race: checks `_collectionId != null` then performs HTTP call and writes `_collectionId` — no lock/semaphore. Concurrent callers can double-create. |
| 505 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/ChromaVectorStore.cs | 102-104,125-126 | sdk-audit | `EnsureCollectionAsync` does not validate `_collectionId` was populated. If server returns null id, subsequent calls send requests to `/api/v1/collections/` with null path segment. |
| 506 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/ChromaVectorStore.cs | 179 | sdk-audit | `UpsertBatchAsync` records `Metrics.RecordUpsert(TimeSpan.Zero, batch.Count - 1)`. Off-by-one: for batch of 1 records 0 upserts. |
| 507 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/ChromaVectorStore.cs | 411-416 | sdk-audit | All `CollectionExistsAsync` implementations swallow all exceptions with bare `catch {}` and return `false`. Config errors indistinguishable from "collection does not exist." |
| 508 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/ChromaVectorStore.cs | 463-467 | sdk-audit | All `IsHealthyAsync` methods swallow every exception via bare catch + `Debug.WriteLine`. Systematic failures (wrong URL, expired cert) completely unobservable in production. |
| 509 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/HybridVectorStore.cs | 150-162,199-210 | sdk-audit | `PrimaryWithAsyncReplication` write strategy launches `_ = Task.Run(...)` fire-and-forget. Replication exceptions silently swallowed via `Debug.WriteLine`. Silent data divergence between primary and secondary. |
| 510 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/HybridVectorStore.cs | 313-315 | sdk-audit | `.Result` after `Task.WhenAll` — if one task faulted, `.Result` throws `AggregateException` instead of unwrapping. Should `await` instead. |
| 511 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/HybridVectorStore.cs | 471-483 | sdk-audit | `PromoteToColdAsync` actually demotes from hot to cold store. Name is inverted from standard tiering terminology. |
| 512 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/PgVectorStore.cs | 88-91,119-455 | sdk-audit | Entire `PgVectorStore` backed by in-memory `Dictionary`. SQL commented with "In production:" markers. `IsHealthyAsync` returns `true` unconditionally. Full stub masquerading as production. |
| 513 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/PgVectorStore.cs | 113-134 | sdk-audit | Same TOCTOU pattern: `_initialized` read without synchronization, set at line 130 with no lock/volatile. Concurrent init runs multiple times. |
| 514 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/PineconeVectorStore.cs | 300-304 | sdk-audit | `CollectionExistsAsync` checks if namespace has vectors, not if namespace exists. Empty but valid namespace returns `false`. |
| 515 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/RedisVectorStore.cs | 198-204 | sdk-audit | `UpsertBatchAsync` issues one HTTP request per record. Redis supports pipelining/MULTI-EXEC. |
| 516 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/VectorStoreFactory.cs | 51 | sdk-audit | Multiple `static readonly HttpClient` fields without `SocketsHttpHandler` + `PooledConnectionLifetime`. No DNS refresh, no socket pooling coordination. |
| 517 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/VectorStoreFactory.cs | 83-116 | sdk-audit | `_instances` Dictionary read under lock, async health check outside lock, write under second lock. Two threads can both create+install, one instance leaks undisposed. |
| 518 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/VectorStoreFactory.cs | 248-262 | sdk-audit | `CreatePgVectorAsync` passes `connectionString` without null guard. Null flows to Npgsql producing confusing exception. |
| 519 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/VectorStoreFactory.cs | 354-363 | sdk-audit | `CreateOptions` deserializes via reflection. `required` properties (ConnectionString, ApiKey) are compile-time only — `JsonSerializer` silently produces invalid options objects. |
| 520 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/VectorStoreFactory.cs | 413-421 | sdk-audit | `DisposeAsync` swallows disposal exceptions silently. |
| 521 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/VectorStoreRegistry.cs | 343-349,408-412 | sdk-audit | `GetHealthyInstancesAsync` and `GetAllStatisticsAsync` silently swallow all exceptions. Crashing store disappears from results with no indication. |
| 522 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VectorStores/WeaviateVectorStore.cs | 210-217 | sdk-audit | `DeleteBatchAsync` issues one HTTP request per record. Weaviate supports batch delete endpoint. O(n) round-trips. |
| 523 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VolatileMemoryStore.cs | 119-121 | sdk-audit | `GetAsync` mutates `entry.AccessCount++` and `entry.LastAccessedAt` on shared `TieredMemoryEntry` with no lock. Class claims "Thread-safe for concurrent access patterns." Lost increments and torn writes. |
| 524 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VolatileMemoryStore.cs | 308-357 | sdk-audit | `ConsolidateSimilarAsync` O(n²) nested loop over all entries with cosine similarity. Up to 500K comparisons on full 1000-entry store. |
| 525 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VolatileMemoryStore.cs | 337,340 | sdk-audit | `ConsolidateSimilarAsync` directly modifies `AccessCount` on live shared entries without synchronization. Races with concurrent `GetAsync` calls on same objects. |
| 526 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Memory/VolatileMemoryStore.cs | 603-617 | sdk-audit | `SemanticVectorIndex.Remove` O(n) over all buckets, replaces `ConcurrentBag` non-atomically — concurrent adds lost during replacement. |
| 527 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Providers/AdditionalProviders.cs | 88,135 | sdk-audit | Gemini API key appended to URL as query parameter `?key={apiKey}`. Query strings appear in server/proxy logs in plaintext. Should use Authorization header. |
| 528 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Providers/AdditionalProviders.cs | 88,135 | sdk-audit | Gemini model name from user input interpolated into URL without sanitization. Path traversal possible with `../../admin`. |
| 529 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Providers/AwsBedrockProviderStrategy.cs | 75-78 | sdk-audit | User-controlled `model` interpolated into URL path `/model/{model}/invoke` without sanitization. Path traversal possible. Same in `HuggingFaceProviderStrategy.cs:75`, `OllamaProviderStrategy.cs:71`, `AzureOpenAiProviderStrategy.cs:72`, `OpenAiProviderStrategy.cs:75`. |
| 530 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Providers/AwsBedrockProviderStrategy.cs | 281-298 | sdk-audit | `ParseStreamChunk` treats Bedrock stream as flat JSON lines. AWS Bedrock uses binary event-stream format (vnd.amazon.eventstream). Returns null for all real frames. |
| 531 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Providers/EmbeddingProviders.cs | 70-98 | sdk-audit | `GetEmbeddingsAsync` accepts null/empty text without validation. Empty strings sent to APIs return 400/422 that may leak billing/quota info. |
| 532 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/Providers/EmbeddingProviders.cs | 279-285 | sdk-audit | `UnifiedEmbeddingProvider` fallback chain uses `catch { continue; }`. If all providers fail, caller gets "All providers failed" with zero diagnostic about which failed or why. |
| 533 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/SemanticStorage/SemanticStorageStrategies.cs | 241-242 | sdk-audit | `ClassifyDataAsync` decodes `byte[]` to UTF-8 string before read lock. Large payload allocation held for entire lock duration. |
| 534 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/SemanticStorage/SemanticStorageStrategies.cs | 541-543 | sdk-audit | `BuildHierarchyNode` scans all `_instances.Values` per node — O(D×N) under read lock. Should maintain per-class count index. |
| 535 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/SemanticStorage/SemanticStorageStrategies.cs | 677-700 | sdk-audit | `SemanticDataLinkingStrategy.CreateLinkAsync` calls `.Add()` on `HashSet<string>` values in `BoundedDictionary`. HashSet not thread-safe — concurrent calls corrupt data. |
| 536 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/SemanticStorage/SemanticStorageStrategies.cs | 682,723 | sdk-audit | `bool.Parse`/`float.Parse` on user config values without TryParse. `FormatException` on misconfigured values (locale comma, "yes" for bool). |
| 537 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/TabularModels/LargeTabularModelStrategies.cs | 183-921 | sdk-audit | All 6 tabular model strategies (TabPfn, TabNet, Saint, TabTransformer, AutoMl, XgBoostLlm) return hardcoded `"ClassA"`/`"ClassB"` with fixed confidence 0.85/0.92. `TrainAsync` sets `IsModelTrained = true` with `await Task.CompletedTask`. No real ML inference. |
| 538 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/VectorStores/MilvusQdrantChromaStrategies.cs | 466-590 | sdk-audit | `PgVectorStrategy` declares `ConnectionString` required and tagged `production` but uses only in-memory `BoundedDictionary`. All data lost on restart. Contract lie. |
| 539 | LOW | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/VectorStores/MilvusQdrantChromaStrategies.cs | 484 | sdk-audit | `PgVectorStrategy` declares `ConnectionString` as `Required = true` but never reads it. Config validation demands value that code ignores. |
| 540 | MEDIUM | UltimateIntelligence/Strategies/VectorStores/WeaviateVectorStrategy.cs | 172-189,248-260 | sdk-audit | GraphQL query built via string interpolation. `className` injected without escaping — `}`/`{` characters can inject arbitrary GraphQL operations. |

| 542 | HIGH | UltimateIntelligence/UltimateIntelligencePlugin.cs | 331-342 | sdk-audit | `DiscoverAndRegisterStrategies` bare `catch {}` swallows all strategy instantiation failures. Broken strategies silently dropped from registry with no diagnostic. |

| 145 | MEDIUM | WebSocketInterfaceStrategy.cs | 395 | semantic-search | [CW-08] RFC 6455 Section 4.2.2 mandates SHA-1 for the WebSocket opening handshake Sec-WebSocket-Accept header. This is not an algorithm choice -- it cannot be changed without breaking all WebSocket clients. This should be documented as a protocol constraint rather than an algorithm vulnerability.

| 80 | CRITICAL | UltimateIoTIntegration/Strategies/Security/SecurityStrategies.cs | 24-31 | sdk-audit | `EncryptAsync` generates new AES key+IV per call then discards both. Ciphertext is immediately unrecoverable — caller cannot decrypt. |
| 81 | MEDIUM | UltimateIoTIntegration/Strategies/SensorFusion/ComplementaryFilter.cs | 14-16 | sdk-audit | `_roll`/`_pitch`/`_yaw` plain doubles mutated by `Update` and read by `GetOrientation` without sync. Torn reads on 32-bit. |
| 82 | MEDIUM | UltimateIoTIntegration/Strategies/SensorFusion/ComplementaryFilter.cs | 40 | sdk-audit | `dt <= 0` not rejected in `Update`. Zero/negative dt from clock skew produces wrong orientation. |

| 223 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Features/KeyDerivationHierarchy.cs | 214-229 | sdk-audit | `DeriveChildKeyAsync` ignores caller-provided `salt` parameter entirely. Derivation loop uses hardcoded per-component salts. Stored `SaltUsed` doesn't match actual salt. |
| 224 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Features/KeyEscrowRecovery.cs | 185-193 | sdk-audit | `EscrowKeyAsync` stores key shares unencrypted ("simplified" comment). `EncryptedShares` property name is a lie. M-of-N security model defeated. |
| 225 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Features/KeyEscrowRecovery.cs | 338-367 | sdk-audit | `ApproveRecoveryAsync` checks expiry + duplicate-approval OUTSIDE `_escrowLock`. Two concurrent approvals from same agent bypass dedup → threshold bypass. |

| 229 | MEDIUM | UltimateKeyManagement/Features/ZeroDowntimeRotation.cs | 260-279 | sdk-audit | `StartReEncryptionAsync` captures key byte arrays in lambda closures. No `CryptographicOperations.ZeroMemory` after Task.WhenAll. Key residency risk. |
| 230 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/KeyRotationScheduler.cs | 213-246 | sdk-audit | `DetermineKeysToRotateAsync` bare catch swallows all exceptions, silently falls back to rotating current key. Config errors trigger unintended rotation. |
| 231 | MEDIUM | UltimateKeyManagement/Migration/ConfigurationMigrator.cs | 286-318 | sdk-audit | Migration writes `Token`, `ClientSecret`, `SecretAccessKey` as plaintext to output config file. |

| 233 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Migration/DeprecationManager.cs | 303-307 | sdk-audit | `EmitWarning` calls `Console.WriteLine` + `Console.ForegroundColor` mutation. Not thread-safe. `EmitToConsole=true` by default. |
| 234 | MEDIUM | UltimateKeyManagement/Migration/PluginMigrationHelper.cs | 113-115 | sdk-audit | `ScanForDeprecatedReferencesAsync` fans out unlimited parallel file I/O via `Task.WhenAll`. Can exhaust thread pool + file handles. |

| 346 | LOW | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/MultiPartyComputationStrategy.cs | 382-386 | sdk-audit | `CreatePartialSignatureAsync` formula `s_i = k + r * lambda_i * x_i` does not match ECDSA (requires `k^-1 * (m + r * lambda_i * x_i)`). |
| 347 | MEDIUM | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/MultiPartyComputationStrategy.cs | 383-384 | sdk-audit | Message hash `m` computed but never used in partial signature formula. Omission makes partial sigs message-independent. |
| 348 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/MultiPartyComputationStrategy.cs | 762 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `LoadKeysFromStorage`. Corrupted storage → strategy starts empty, all key IDs silently lost. |
| 349 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/ShamirSecretStrategy.cs | 562-565 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `LoadSharesFromStorage`. Corrupted file → all Shamir shares silently lost at startup. |
| 350 | MEDIUM | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/SsssStrategy.cs | 416-419 | sdk-audit | `expectedHash` falls back to `Array.Empty<byte>()` when `ShareHash` is null. `FixedTimeEquals` on two empty arrays returns true — any share value passes hash check for legacy shares without hashes. |
| 351 | LOW | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/SsssStrategy.cs | 749-751 | sdk-audit | Share export concatenates IV + Key + encrypted data without length tags. Parsing requires hardcoded field lengths — brittle. |
| 352 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/SsssStrategy.cs | 960 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `LoadFromStorage`. All guardian and key data lost on corrupted file. |
| 353 | MEDIUM | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/ThresholdBls12381Strategy.cs | 228-229 | sdk-audit | `BlsDkgRound1.ShareForRecipient` exposes all shares to all parties. Comment: "In real impl, encrypt for each recipient." Broadcast of all shares breaks DKG security. |
| 354 | CRITICAL | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/ThresholdBls12381Strategy.cs | 401-407 | sdk-audit | `VerifySignatureAsync` returns `true` whenever `signature.Length == 96 && publicKey.Length == 48`. Comment: "For now, verify structure and return true if well-formed / Real implementation would use a pairing library." Any 96-byte blob passes. Zero BLS12-381 security. |
| 355 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/ThresholdBls12381Strategy.cs | 840 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `LoadKeysFromStorage`. I/O or deserialization error → all BLS keys silently vanish. |
| 356 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/Strategies/Threshold/ThresholdEcdsaStrategy.cs | 973 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `LoadKeysFromStorage`. Same pattern. |
| 357 | MEDIUM | UltimateKeyManagement/UltimateKeyManagementPlugin.cs | 197-218 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget async lambda in `SubscribeToKeyRotationRequests`. `async` lambda registered as `Action<PluginMessage>` — exceptions silently swallowed by `async void` equivalent. |
| 358 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/UltimateKeyManagementPlugin.cs | 325-327 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `DiscoverAndRegisterStrategiesAsync`. `assembly.GetTypes()` failures silently discarded — strategies may fail to register with no log entry. |
| 359 | HIGH | UltimateKeyManagement/UltimateKeyManagementPlugin.cs | 575-589 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `PublishEventAsync`. All message bus publish errors silently swallowed — security audit events (rotation, startup, shutdown) can be lost. |
| 360 | LOW | UltimateKeyManagement/UltimateKeyManagementPlugin.cs | 641-645 | sdk-audit | `OnHandshakeAsync` has dead empty `if` block: `if (request.Context != null) { }`. |

| 262 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/BadBlockRemapping.cs | 258-271 | sdk-audit | `ReadBlockFromDiskAsync` returns `new byte[512]`. `WriteToSpareBlockAsync` returns `Task.CompletedTask`. `TestBlockAsync` always returns `Good`. Core RAID block I/O entirely simulated. |
| 263 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/Deduplication.cs | 50-83 | sdk-audit | `DeduplicateInline` mutates shared `DedupEntry` (`ReferenceCount++`, `LastReferenced`) without synchronization. Concurrent callers lose increments. |
| 264 | CRITICAL | UltimateRAID/Features/Deduplication.cs | 383-384 | sdk-audit | `AllocateStorageAddress` returns `DateTime.UtcNow.Ticks`. Comment: "Simulated storage allocation." Collisions under high throughput; all references meaningless. |
| 265 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/Deduplication.cs | 393-408 | sdk-audit | `ReadBlockFromRaidAsync` returns `new byte[BlockSize]` (zeroed). `UpdateBlockReferenceAsync` and `FreeStorageAddressAsync` are no-ops. Post-RAID dedup "deduplicates" all-zero blocks. |
| 266 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/GeoRaid.cs | 127-132 | sdk-audit | `.Max()`/`.Min()` on `DataDiskAssignments` without empty check. `dataChunks = 0` → `InvalidOperationException`. |
| 267 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/GeoRaid.cs | 317-328 | sdk-audit | `CalculateParityForBlock` copies input as parity (no XOR computation). `SendParityUpdateAsync` simulates with `Task.Delay`. No real parity. |
| 268 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/Monitoring.cs | 339-426 | sdk-audit | `RaidCliCommands` and `RaidRestApi` return hardcoded strings/JSON (`"Status: Healthy"`, `"IOPS: 15000"`, `"arrays": ["array-1"]`). No interaction with actual RAID state. |
| 269 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/Monitoring.cs | 447 | sdk-audit | `samples.Average()` on ConcurrentQueue — O(n) snapshot allocation per call. Running sum would avoid allocations. |
| 270 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/Monitoring.cs | 474-477 | sdk-audit | `CalculateNextRun` ignores `cronExpression`, always returns "2 AM tomorrow". All scheduled operations fire at wrong times. |
| 271 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/Monitoring.cs | 503-512 | sdk-audit | `AuditLogger.Log` trims with `while (_entries.Count > MaxEntries)` — non-atomic on ConcurrentQueue. Entries can be lost under high throughput. |
| 272 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/Monitoring.cs | 579-606 | sdk-audit | Compliance checks (`CheckSoc2Compliance`, `CheckHipaaCompliance`, `CheckGdprCompliance`, `CheckPciCompliance`) all hard-return `Passed = true`. Compliance reports are always "compliant" regardless of actual state. |
| 273 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/Monitoring.cs | 667-671 | sdk-audit | `IntegrityProof.SignData` uses SHA-256 as "signing" — no secret key. Anyone can compute the same hash. Not a signature. |
| 274 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/PerformanceOptimization.cs | 84,107 | sdk-audit | Two fire-and-forget `_ = _prefetcher.PrefetchAheadAsync(...)`. Exceptions silently discarded. |
| 275 | LOW | UltimateRAID/Features/PerformanceOptimization.cs | 237-240 | sdk-audit | `FlushToDiskAsync` stub using `Task.Delay(1)`. WriteThrough/WriteAround modes believe they're persisting — nothing written. |
| 276 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/PerformanceOptimization.cs | 296-303 | sdk-audit | `WriteCoalescer.GetStatistics` — `CoalesceRatio` formula uses pending batch count, not coalesced writes. Always near 1.0. |
| 277 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/PerformanceOptimization.cs | 382-390 | sdk-audit | `PrefetchAheadAsync` allocates zeroed byte arrays as "prefetched data." Cache hits return all-zeros instead of actual data. |
| 278 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/PerformanceOptimization.cs | 425-429 | sdk-audit | `WriteBackCache.CacheWrite` — `EvictOldest` may evict nothing when all entries dirty. Check not repeated → cache grows unboundedly. |
| 279 | LOW | UltimateRAID/Features/QuantumSafeIntegrity.cs | 56-63 | sdk-audit | Invalid `Algorithm` enum falls through to default `CalculateSHA3_256`. Mismatched algorithms silently verify as equal. |
| 280 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/QuantumSafeIntegrity.cs | 232-265 | sdk-audit | `CreateAttestation` calls `SimulateBlockchainTransaction` (SHA-256 of payload). `VerifyAttestationAsync` always sets `IsValid = true`. Blockchain attestation entirely simulated. |
| 281 | CRITICAL | UltimateRAID/Features/QuantumSafeIntegrity.cs | 293-341 | sdk-audit | All six "quantum-safe" hash methods use classical SHA-256/SHA-512. `CalculateSHA3_256` uses SHA-256, `CalculateSHAKE256` fabricates from two SHA-256 calls, `CalculateBLAKE3` uses XOR of two SHA-256. `DilithiumHash`/`SPHINCSHash` use SHA-512. API claims post-quantum security but delivers none. |
| 282 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/RaidLevelMigration.cs | 229-264 | sdk-audit | `PrepareNewLayoutAsync`, `MigrateBlockAsync`, `FinalizeLayoutAsync`, `RollbackMigrationAsync` all return `Task.CompletedTask`. Migration reports `Success = true` without moving any data. |
| 283 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/RaidLevelMigration.cs | 237-240 | sdk-audit | `disks.Min(d => d.Capacity)` without empty check. Empty disks → unhandled exception. |
| 284 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/RaidPluginMigration.cs | 33,364 | sdk-audit | `_adapters` plain Dictionary and `MigrationRegistry._entries` plain List — both mutated without locking. Concurrent access races. |
| 285 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/RaidPluginMigration.cs | 180-221 | sdk-audit | Entire migration pipeline is stubs. `MigrateArrayMetadataAsync` returns hardcoded `["array-1", "array-2"]`. Reports success without performing work. |
| 286 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/Snapshots.cs | 192-204 | sdk-audit | `WriteToCloneAsync` mutates `clone.SharedBlocks--`, `clone.UniqueBlocks++` without lock. Concurrent writes produce wrong counts. |
| 287 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Features/Snapshots.cs | 495-523 | sdk-audit | `EnforceRetentionAsync` calls `DeleteSnapshot` in loop that modifies `SnapshotTree` concurrently. No error handling if deletion fails. |
| 288 | CRITICAL | UltimateRAID/Features/Snapshots.cs | 527-548 | sdk-audit | `RestoreBlockAsync`, `CompressBlock`, `EncryptBlock`, `SendBlockToRemoteAsync` all stubs. `ReplicateSnapshotAsync` calls `EncryptBlock`/`CompressBlock` believing data is protected — silently sends plaintext uncompressed data. |
| 289 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Features/Snapshots.cs | 560-609 | sdk-audit | `CowBlockManager` hardcodes `BlockCount = 1000000`, `GetModifiedBlocks` returns `Range(0, 1000)`, `GetSharedBlocks` returns `Range(0, 100)`, `GetDeltaBlocks` returns 50. All CoW logic on fake data. |
| 290 | LOW | UltimateRAID/Features/Snapshots.cs | 648-651 | sdk-audit | `SnapshotTree.AddSnapshot` unconditionally sets `ActiveSnapshotId` without thread safety. Concurrent create + clone race on field. |
| 291 | LOW | UltimateRAID/RaidStrategyBase.cs | 188-190 | sdk-audit | `VerifyAsync` calls `Task.Delay(10)` per disk and reports no errors. No actual data verification. |
| 292 | LOW | UltimateRAID/RaidStrategyBase.cs | 279-292 | sdk-audit | `VerifyBlockAsync`/`CorrectBlockAsync` base implementations are `Task.CompletedTask`. Scrub always reports zero errors. No `abstract` enforcement. |

| 294 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Adaptive/AdaptiveRaidStrategies.cs | 220-267 | sdk-audit | `WriteWithCurrentStrategy` disk write bodies commented out (`// In production, would write...`). Write operations are no-ops. Same for `ReadWithCurrentStrategy` (271-353). |
| 295 | LOW | UltimateRAID/Strategies/ErasureCoding/ErasureCodingStrategies.cs | 369-371 | sdk-audit | `InvertMatrix` with singular matrix — `pivot == 0` breaks without throwing. Resulting "inverse" is garbage → `DecodeReedSolomon` silently corrupts data. |

| 300 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Nested/AdvancedNestedRaidStrategies.cs | 737-739 | sdk-audit | Raid60 `ReadAsync` returns zeroed buffers for all groups. Always returns zeros. |
| 301 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Standard/StandardRaidStrategies.cs | 799-800,1229-1230,1539-1540 | sdk-audit | `speed = bytesRebuilt / elapsed.TotalSeconds` with no zero-guard. | 302 | LOW | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Vendor/VendorRaidStrategiesB5.cs | 100,146 | sdk-audit | `WriteAsync` increments `_cacheHits` — a write is not a cache hit. Metrics lie. |
| 303 | LOW | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Vendor/VendorRaidStrategiesB5.cs | 163-165 | sdk-audit | `GetFromCache` iterates entire ConcurrentQueue on every read — O(n) scan. |

| 305 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Vendor/VendorRaidStrategiesB5.cs | 347-352 | sdk-audit | StorageTekRaid7 double-failure reconstruction replaces failed chunks with `new byte[_chunkSize]`. No actual reconstruction — silent data corruption. |
| 306 | HIGH | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Vendor/VendorRaidStrategiesB5.cs | 707-711,750-758 | sdk-audit | `RecordDirtyBlock` is empty ("In production, would persist"). `UpdateParityForDirtyBlocksAsync` does `Task.Yield()`. FlexRaidFr snapshot/dirty-block system never tracks or repairs. |
| 307 | MEDIUM | UltimateRAID/Strategies/Vendor/VendorRaidStrategiesB5.cs | 707-711 | sdk-audit | `RecordDirtyBlock` empty — data written between snapshots never tracked. Disk failure before snapshot → silently unrecoverable. |

| 80 | LOW | UltimateReplication/Features/BandwidthAwareSchedulingFeature.cs | 312-325 | sdk-audit | `HandleBandwidthReportAsync` silently ignores messages with null/empty sourceNode. No logging. |
| 81 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Features/CrossCloudReplicationFeature.cs | 104-115 | sdk-audit | `GetProviderStatus` returns null for unknown providers → silently treated as healthy. |
| 82 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Features/CrossCloudReplicationFeature.cs | 139-140 | sdk-audit | `Interlocked.Exchange(ref _totalEgressCostEstimate, Volatile.Read(...) + egressCost)` — read-modify-write without CAS retry loop. Under contention, overwrites another thread's update. |
| 83 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Features/CrossCloudReplicationFeature.cs | 255-259 | sdk-audit | Broad `catch { return false }` swallows `OperationCanceledException`. Cancellation silently returns false instead of propagating. |
| 84 | LOW | UltimateReplication/Features/GeoDistributedShardingFeature.cs | 350 | sdk-audit | `dataShards[0].Length` without empty check. Empty list → `IndexOutOfRangeException`. |
| 85 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Features/GeoDistributedShardingFeature.cs | 403-404 | sdk-audit | When all geofence checks fail (compliance service down), falls back to ALL regions including non-compliant ones. Data-residency/regulatory violation with no alerting. |
| 86 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Features/GeoDistributedShardingFeature.cs | 470-474 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `CheckGeofenceForShardAsync` swallows all exceptions. Returns `true` on failure — security-relevant optimistic fallback with no logging. |
| 87 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Features/GeoDistributedShardingFeature.cs | 484 | sdk-audit | `correlationId = $"shard-write-{shardId}"` not sanitized. Predictable/injectable if shardId is attacker-controlled. |
| 88 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Features/GeoDistributedShardingFeature.cs | 519-522 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in `WriteShardToRegionAsync`. Storage write failures invisible to operators. |
| 89 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Features/GeoWormReplicationFeature.cs | 373-376,427-430 | sdk-audit | Silent catches in `WriteToWormStorageAsync` and `VerifyWormIntegrityAsync`. WORM write failures and integrity failures both invisible. |
| 90 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Features/GlobalTransactionCoordinationFeature.cs | 126-128 | sdk-audit | `TransactionState.Phase` is non-volatile mutable property modified concurrently. `GetTransactionState` can observe torn state. |
| 91 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Features/GlobalTransactionCoordinationFeature.cs | 333-354 | sdk-audit | `WaitForVotesAsync` uses busy-wait polling with 50ms sleep instead of `TaskCompletionSource`. CPU churn and latency. |
| 92 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Features/GlobalTransactionCoordinationFeature.cs | 410 | sdk-audit | `state.Votes[nodeId] = vote` uses direct indexing on `BoundedDictionary`. `Clear()` at line 208 then written concurrently → race. |
| 93 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Features/IntelligenceIntegrationFeature.cs | 547-560 | sdk-audit | `_messageBus.PublishAsync(...)` called without `await`. Task discarded — anomaly detection responses never reliably sent. |
| 94 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Features/PartialReplicationFeature.cs | 219 | sdk-audit | `Regex.IsMatch` without compiled regex or timeout on every `ShouldReplicate` call. ReDoS vulnerable with complex patterns. |
| 95 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Features/ReplicationLagMonitoringFeature.cs | 118-130 | sdk-audit | `LagNodeStatus` fields (`CurrentLagMs`, `MaxLagMs`, `SampleCount`, etc.) are plain non-volatile properties mutated concurrently without sync. Rolling stats corrupted. |
| 96 | LOW | UltimateReplication/ReplicationStrategyBase.cs | 573,578 | sdk-audit | Method named `ResolveBytMergeAsync` (typo: "Byt" → "By"). |
| 97 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/ReplicationStrategyBase.cs | 687-689,808-810,931-933 | sdk-audit | Three `catch { }` blocks in prediction/lag/conflict reporting. "Best-effort" but no logging at all. |
| 98 | LOW | UltimateReplication/ReplicationStrategyRegistry.cs | 209-222 | sdk-audit | `DiscoverFromAssembly` with bare `catch {}` silently skips failed strategy instantiations. |
| 99 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Scaling/ReplicationScalingManager.cs | 255-258 | sdk-audit | `lock (_walLock)` around `Interlocked.Increment` is redundant. Same `_walSequence` read via `Interlocked.Read` outside lock elsewhere. Confusing but not broken. |
| 100 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Scaling/ReplicationScalingManager.cs | 393-400 | sdk-audit | `PurgeExpiredWalEntriesAsync` — `cutoff` variable computed but never used in condition. Only checks `seq <= minOffset`. Entries older than retention never purged if not yet acknowledged → unbounded growth. |
| 101 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Scaling/ReplicationScalingManager.cs | 808-841 | sdk-audit | `DeserializeWalEntry` has bare `catch { return null; }`. Corrupted WAL entries silently skipped — data loss masked. |
| 102 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/ActiveActive/ActiveActiveStrategies.cs | 354-355 | sdk-audit | NWayActive `_writeQuorum`/`_readQuorum` plain `int` fields settable without sync. Torn reads during concurrent replication. |
| 103 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/ActiveActive/ActiveActiveStrategies.cs | 536-539 | sdk-audit | 2PC prepare phase stub: `var vote = true; // Simulated: all regions vote YES`. No actual region communication. |
| 104 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/ActiveActive/ActiveActiveStrategies.cs | 580-583 | sdk-audit | 2PC commit phase stub: `state.CommitAcks[region] = true` without sending COMMIT message. Fabricated acks. |
| 105 | LOW | UltimateReplication/Strategies/ActiveActive/ActiveActiveStrategies.cs | 782 | sdk-audit | `CheckTargets` RTO hardcoded `true` — "RTO requires actual failover measurement." Contract lies about RTO checking. |
| 106 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/ActiveActive/ActiveActiveStrategies.cs | 869-876 | sdk-audit | `RouteWriteConflictFree` uses `dataId.GetHashCode()` — non-deterministic across processes. Different processes route same key to different regions. |
| 107 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/AI/AiReplicationStrategies.cs | 262,422,633,849 | sdk-audit | All four AI strategies (`Predictive`, `Semantic`, `Adaptive`, `Intelligent`) implement `ReplicateAsync` as `Task.Delay(30-40ms)` — no actual replication. Data only stored in-memory `_dataStore`. |
| 108 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/AI/AiReplicationStrategies.cs | 283,442,654,877 | sdk-audit | `VerifyConsistencyAsync` in all four AI strategies only checks local `_dataStore`. No cross-node verification. Method name claims consistency but only reflects local writes. |
| 109 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/AI/AiReplicationStrategies.cs | 570-604 | sdk-audit | `AdaptConfiguration` does `.Sum()` and `.Average()` across all metrics on every `RecordMetrics` call. O(n) per write. |
| 110 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/AI/AiReplicationStrategies.cs | 899-900 | sdk-audit | `_episodes` plain `List<TuningEpisode>` appended from concurrent `ReplicateAsync` tasks. No lock. |
| 111 | LOW | UltimateReplication/Strategies/AI/AiReplicationStrategies.cs | 1018 | sdk-audit | `_episodes.Average()` iterates unbounded history. Grows without cap. |
| 112 | CRITICAL | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Asynchronous/AsynchronousReplicationStrategy.cs | 148-162 | sdk-audit | `VerifyConsistencyAsync` returns `Random.Shared.Next(0,2) == 0 ? "hash-v1" : "hash-v2"` — randomized fake hashes. Always returns `true` regardless of actual replica state. |
| 113 | LOW | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Asynchronous/AsynchronousReplicationStrategy.cs | 165-173 | sdk-audit | `GetReplicationLagAsync` adds `Random.Shared.Next(50, 200)` noise. Monitoring/alerting gets unstable telemetry. |
| 114 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Asynchronous/AsynchronousReplicationStrategy.cs | 231-235 | sdk-audit | `ProcessReplicationQueueAsync` catch: "Log replication failure in production" — no logging, no counter. Failed replications vanish silently. |
| 115 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Cloud/CloudReplicationStrategies.cs | 845 | sdk-audit | `_pendingSyncs` is plain `Queue<T>` (not `ConcurrentQueue<T>`) accessed concurrently from Replicate/Sync. Data race. |
| 116 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Core/CoreReplicationStrategies.cs | 268-276 | sdk-audit | CRDT merge is payload-size heuristic: "take the larger payload". Not a real CRDT merge despite CRDT types existing in same file. |
| 117 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Core/CoreReplicationStrategies.cs | 482-497 | sdk-audit | `StartStreamAsync` fire-and-forget `_ = Task.Run(...)`. Non-cancellation exceptions escape unobserved. Streaming channel silently dies on fault. |
| 118 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Core/CoreReplicationStrategies.cs | 671-699 | sdk-audit | `_versionChains` unbounded growth per dataId. No cap or compaction. Memory exhaustion on long-lived deployments. |
| 119 | LOW | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Core/CoreReplicationStrategies.cs | 679-680 | sdk-audit | Delta computation XORs previous delta vs new data instead of previous full data vs new data. ApplyDelta produces wrong output. |
| 120 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Federation/FederationStrategies.cs | 294-299 | sdk-audit | `CommitTransactionAsync` catch transitions to Aborted without logging exception. Distributed transaction failures silent. |
| 121 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/GeoReplication/PrimarySecondaryReplicationStrategy.cs | 162-181 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget `_ = Task.Run(...)` for secondary replication. No error surfacing, no completion tracking. |
| 122 | LOW | UltimateReplication/Strategies/GeoReplication/PrimarySecondaryReplicationStrategy.cs | 164 | sdk-audit | `Task.Delay(Random.Shared.Next(10, 30))` replaces real primary write. Comment: "In production, this would..." — stub. |
| 123 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/GeoReplication/PrimarySecondaryReplicationStrategy.cs | 173-177 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in fire-and-forget — comment "Log replication failure" but does nothing. Failed secondary replication invisible. |
| 124 | CRITICAL | UltimateReplication/Strategies/GeoReplication/PrimarySecondaryReplicationStrategy.cs | 204-221 | sdk-audit | `VerifyConsistencyAsync` — `primaryHash = "primary-hash-value"` hardcoded; secondaries return it or `"stale-hash"` randomly. Fabricated 80% match. |
| 125 | CRITICAL | UltimateReplication/Strategies/GeoReplication/PrimarySecondaryReplicationStrategy.cs | 283-293 | sdk-audit | `CheckPrimaryHealthAsync` returns `Random.Shared.Next(0,10) > 0` (90% chance). Auto-failover decisions on random data. |
| 126 | CRITICAL | UltimateReplication/Strategies/GeoReplication/PrimarySecondaryReplicationStrategy.cs | 308-317 | sdk-audit | `SelectBestSecondaryForPromotionAsync` — secondary lag is `Random.Shared.Next(100, 1000)`. Failover target randomly chosen. |
| 127 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Specialized/SpecializedReplicationStrategies.cs | 457 | sdk-audit | `_masterKey = new byte[32]` — encryption key all zeros. No security if `SetMasterKey`/`GenerateMasterKey` never called. |
| 128 | HIGH | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Specialized/SpecializedReplicationStrategies.cs | 512-516 | sdk-audit | `GenerateMasterKey` returns reference to internal `_masterKey` field. Caller can corrupt key; stale refs after rotation. |
| 129 | CRITICAL | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Synchronous/SynchronousReplicationStrategy.cs | 146-158 | sdk-audit | `VerifyConsistencyAsync` returns hardcoded `"consistent-hash-value"` for every node. `distinctHashes == 1` always true. Strong consistency guarantee is a lie. |
| 130 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplication/Strategies/Topology/TopologyStrategies.cs | 970-975 | sdk-audit | `GetNodeLevel` uses `nodes.Contains(nodeId)` on `List<string>` per level. O(levels × nodes) per call. Need reverse lookup. |
| 131 | LOW | UltimateReplication/UltimateReplicationPlugin.cs | 86 | sdk-audit | KafkaConnectCdcStrategy `_bootstrapServers = "localhost:9092"` hardcoded. Fails silently in non-local deployments. |
| 132 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplicationPlugin.cs | 240 | inspectcode | [MethodHasAsyncOverload] Method has async overload |
| 133 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplicationPlugin.cs | 249 | inspectcode | [ConditionIsAlwaysTrueOrFalseAccordingToNullableAPIContract] Expression is always false according to nullable reference types' annotations |
| 134 | MEDIUM | UltimateReplicationPlugin.cs | 265 | inspectcode | [ConditionIsAlwaysTrueOrFalseAccordingToNullableAPIContract] Expression is always true according to nullable reference types' annotations |
| 135 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Features/RaidIntegrationFeature.cs | 120 | sdk-audit | `CalculateTotalCapacity` hardcodes 1TB per backend. Never queries actual capacity. |
| 136 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Features/RaidIntegrationFeature.cs | 255-259 | sdk-audit | `MarkBackendFailedAsync` — `array.FailedBackends.Add` and `array.BackendIds.Remove/Add` on plain collections without lock. Concurrent race. |
| 137 | CRITICAL | UltimateStorage/Features/RaidIntegrationFeature.cs | 314-315,434-437 | sdk-audit | `RebuildArrayAsync` = `Task.Delay(100)` stub. RAID 6 delegates to RAID 5 ("Simplified"). Dual-parity never computed — arrays silently behave as RAID 5. |
| 138 | CRITICAL | UltimateStorage/Features/RaidIntegrationFeature.cs | 398-431 | sdk-audit | `WriteRaid5Async` copies data stripe as parity verbatim (no XOR). Comment: "simplified — real RAID 5 would calculate XOR parity". Recovery from failure produces corrupt data. |
| 139 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Features/RaidIntegrationFeature.cs | 610-613 | sdk-audit | `HandleRaidStatusMessageAsync` = `await Task.CompletedTask`. RAID status messages subscribed but never acted on. Same in ReplicationIntegration (510-513). |

| 38 | MEDIUM | UltimateResourceManager/Strategies/ContainerStrategies.cs | 549-550 | sdk-audit | `ProcessGroupStrategy` PGID = `ProcessId + handle.GetHashCode()`. Negative GetHashCode → invalid PGID on Unix. Hash collisions → duplicate PGIDs. |

| # | Sev | File | Line(s) | Source | Finding |
|---|-----|------|---------|--------|--------|
| 1 | CRITICAL | DeterministicIoStrategies.cs | 36 | agent-scan | Single shared Stopwatch across concurrent RTOS I/O operations — meaningless timing |
| 2 | MEDIUM | DeterministicIoStrategies.cs | 246 | agent-scan | IoChannel.DataReady SemaphoreSlim never disposed |
| 3 | MEDIUM | DeterministicIoStrategies.cs | 254-258 | agent-scan | Min/MaxLatency non-atomic updates |

| 7 | LOW | IRtosStrategy.cs | 97 | inspectcode | [Collection is never updated: Non-private accessibility] Content of collection 'Parameters' is never updated |
| 8 | HIGH | RtosProtocolAdapters.cs | 237, 447, 621, 801, 1014, 1150 | agent-scan | Multiple SemaphoreSlim never disposed |
| 9 | MEDIUM | RtosProtocolAdapters.cs | 424 | agent-scan | PulseCount++ non-atomic increment |
| 10 | HIGH | RtosProtocolAdapters.cs | 768-769 | agent-scan | WatchdogIntegration calls Environment.FailFast — kills entire process |
| 11 | HIGH | UltimateRTOSBridge/Strategies/DeterministicIoStrategies.cs | 144,159,174,647 | sdk-audit | `IoChannel.ReadCount++`, `WriteCount++`, `KickCount++` — non-atomic `++` on `long` fields without Interlocked. Data races on multi-core. |
| 12 | HIGH | UltimateRTOSBridge/Strategies/DeterministicIoStrategies.cs | 729-734 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteRecoveryAction` (WatchdogIntegration): "For simulation, just record event." Recovery on watchdog expiry does nothing. |
| 13 | LOW | UltimateRTOSBridge/Strategies/DeterministicIoStrategies.cs | 877-879 | sdk-audit | `taskId` defaults to 0 — all tasks without explicit ID share same `TaskInfo`, priority inheritance bleeds. |
| 14 | MEDIUM | UltimateRTOSBridge/Strategies/RtosProtocolAdapters.cs | 162-163 | sdk-audit | VxWorks queue has no backpressure. Unbounded growth violates RTOS bounded-latency guarantee. |
| 15 | LOW | UltimateRTOSBridge/Strategies/RtosProtocolAdapters.cs | 179 | sdk-audit | VxWorks `SynchronizeAsync` body is `Task.Delay(1)` — "Simulated critical section." |
| 16 | HIGH | UltimateRTOSBridge/Strategies/RtosProtocolAdapters.cs | 203-207 | sdk-audit | `ResetWatchdogAsync` (VxWorks) is stub: "Watchdog reset simulation." Safety-critical DO-178C/IEC 61508 code does nothing. |
| 17 | MEDIUM | UltimateRTOSBridge/Strategies/RtosProtocolAdapters.cs | 354-379 | sdk-audit | QNX `SemaphoreSlim` per message never disposed on timeout path. Resource leak. |
| 18 | HIGH | UltimateRTOSBridge/UltimateRTOSBridgePlugin.cs | 219-223 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in strategy discovery. Critical errors silently discarded. |
| 19 | LOW | UltimateRTOSBridgePlugin.cs | 50 | inspectcode | [Inconsistent Naming] Name 'UltimateRTOSBridgePlugin' does not match rule 'Types and namespaces'. Suggested name is 'UltimateRtosBridgePlugin'. |
| 20 | HIGH | UltimateRTOSBridgePlugin.cs | 219-226 | agent-scan | Empty catch swallows strategy failures |
| 21 | HIGH | UltimateRTOSBridgePlugin.cs | 458-462 | agent-scan | PublishAsync no-op, SubscribeAsync yields nothing |

| 763 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Analytics/ClickHouseStorageStrategy.cs | 309-327 | sdk-audit | `CheckHealthCoreAsync` bare catch returns false. Infrastructure vs health failures indistinguishable. Pattern repeated across 6 strategies. |

| 766 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Analytics/DruidStorageStrategy.cs | 242-251 | sdk-audit | `DeleteCoreAsync` stub: returns size but performs no deletion. Caller told delete succeeded when data remains. |
| 767 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Analytics/DruidStorageStrategy.cs | 316-319 | sdk-audit | `Created`/`Modified` always `DateTime.UtcNow` instead of parsed from `__time`. Timestamps meaningless. |

| 769 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Analytics/PrestoStorageStrategy.cs | 262-263 | sdk-audit | `DefaultRequestHeaders.Add` called per query — duplicate headers accumulate. After N queries, N catalog/schema headers sent. |
| 770 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/CloudNative/CosmosDbStorageStrategy.cs | 65 | sdk-audit | `Enum.Parse<ConsistencyLevel>` without `ignoreCase: true` or try/catch. Case mismatch throws. |
| 771 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/CloudNative/SpannerStorageStrategy.cs | 99-113 | sdk-audit | `EnsureSchemaCoreAsync` builds DDL then discards with `Task.CompletedTask`. Table never created. |
| 772 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/CloudNative/SpannerStorageStrategy.cs | 99-234 | sdk-audit | `_tableName` interpolated into DDL/DML without validation. |
| 773 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Embedded/DerbyStorageStrategy.cs | 143-196 | sdk-audit | Non-atomic upsert (UPDATE then INSERT). Concurrent INSERT between causes PK violation. |
| 774 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Embedded/DuckDbStorageStrategy.cs | 313 | sdk-audit | `filePath` interpolated into `COPY ... TO '{filePath}'`. Path traversal + single-quote injection. |
| 775 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Embedded/H2StorageStrategy.cs | 83-97 | sdk-audit | `CreateH2Connection` returns `NpgsqlConnection` claiming H2 PostgreSQL wire protocol. DDL uses H2 CLOB syntax incompatible with Npgsql. |
| 776 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Embedded/LiteDbStorageStrategy.cs | 293-294 | sdk-audit | ETag uses `HashCode.Combine` (non-deterministic across restarts). Not collision-resistant. |
| 777 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Embedded/LiteDbStorageStrategy.cs | 370-374 | sdk-audit | `MemoryStream` in `RetrieveLargeFileAsync` never disposed if `DownloadAsync` throws. |
| 778 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/ArangoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 164-175 | sdk-audit | PUT fail silently falls through to POST regardless of error type. Should check 404 only. |
| 779 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/ArangoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 232-251 | sdk-audit | AQL injection: `_collection` interpolated directly into `FOR doc IN {_collection}`. User-configurable value. |
| 780 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/ArangoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 461-468 | sdk-audit | `CommitAsync`/`RollbackAsync` don't call `EnsureSuccessStatusCode`. Failed commit goes undetected. |
| 781 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/JanusGraphStorageStrategy.cs | 83-88 | sdk-audit | `ConnectCoreAsync` submits test query but discards result. Connectivity not actually verified. |
| 782 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/JanusGraphStorageStrategy.cs | 104-141 | sdk-audit | `_vertexLabel` interpolated into Gremlin queries. Data values use bindings but label doesn't. |
| 783 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/JanusGraphStorageStrategy.cs | 113-121 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { }` in `EnsureSchemaCoreAsync`. Auth/network errors silently swallowed. |
| 784 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/Neo4jStorageStrategy.cs | 98-124 | sdk-audit | Two bare `catch { }` blocks in schema creation. Any error type silently ignored. |
| 785 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Graph/Neo4jStorageStrategy.cs | 302-306 | sdk-audit | `SingleAsync()` throws on zero results. Null check is dead code. Misleading exception type. |
| 786 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/ConsulKvStorageStrategy.cs | 159-163 | sdk-audit | `DeleteCoreAsync` doesn't check transaction result. Failed delete reported as success. |
| 787 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/ConsulKvStorageStrategy.cs | 342 | sdk-audit | `Task.Run(() => _lock.Release())` wraps sync call unnecessarily. |
| 788 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/EtcdStorageStrategy.cs | 151-158 | sdk-audit | `DeleteCoreAsync` bare `catch { }` on metadata retrieval. Size returned as 0. |
| 789 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/EtcdStorageStrategy.cs | 266-272 | sdk-audit | `GetRangeEnd` byte increment wraps 0xFF→0x00 without carry. Empty results for keys ending 0xFF. |
| 790 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/FoundationDbStorageStrategy.cs | 59 | sdk-audit | `Fdb.Start()` called every init. Must be once-per-process. |
| 791 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/LevelDbStorageStrategy.cs | 109-129 | sdk-audit | TOCTOU: metadata read outside `lock`, write inside lock. Concurrent writer corrupts `CreatedAt`. |
| 792 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/LevelDbStorageStrategy.cs | 213-220 | sdk-audit | `ListCoreAsync` early-exit logic redundant and potentially wrong. Falls through when should break. |
| 793 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/MemcachedStorageStrategy.cs | 192,259-281 | sdk-audit | Entire key index deserialized/serialized on every store/delete. O(n) per mutation. |
| 794 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/MemcachedStorageStrategy.cs | 259-281 | sdk-audit | Index read-modify-write without CAS. Concurrent stores produce lost updates. |
| 795 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/RedisStorageStrategy.cs | 224 | sdk-audit | `SortedSetRangeByScoreAsync` loads ALL keys. Unbounded allocation. No pagination. |
| 796 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/KeyValue/RocksDbStorageStrategy.cs | 127-144 | sdk-audit | Same TOCTOU: metadata read outside lock, `WriteBatch` has no lock at all. |

| 798 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NewSQL/CockroachDbStorageStrategy.cs | 112-125 | sdk-audit | UPSERT always overwrites `created_at`. Original creation time lost on update. Same in YugabyteDb. |
| 799 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NewSQL/TiDbStorageStrategy.cs | 80-93 | sdk-audit | Identical SQL injection via `_tableName` interpolation in all queries. |

| 802 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NewSQL/YugabyteDbStorageStrategy.cs | 62-67 | sdk-audit | Version check for "YugabyteDB" has empty `if` body (comment only). Silently connects to non-YugabyteDB. |

| 804 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/CouchDbStorageStrategy.cs | 11 | sdk-audit | Entire file wrapped in `#if FALSE`. Strategy is dead code — zero runtime capability. |
| 805 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/CouchDbStorageStrategy.cs | 127-134,206-215 | sdk-audit | `StoreCoreAsync` bare catch treats all errors as "not found". `ExistsCoreAsync` catches all → returns false. |
| 806 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DocumentDbStorageStrategy.cs | 152-162 | sdk-audit | `StoreCoreAsync` always sets both Created/Modified to now. Original creation time lost on update. |
| 807 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DocumentDbStorageStrategy.cs | 309-312 | sdk-audit | `BeginTransactionCoreAsync` hardcoded partition key `"default"`. Transactions on other partitions silently wrong. |
| 808 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DocumentDbStorageStrategy.cs | 380-383 | sdk-audit | `RollbackAsync` is no-op returning Task.CompletedTask. After CommitAsync, second Rollback silently succeeds. |
| 809 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DynamoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 177-229 | sdk-audit | Chunked store: chunks written before metadata. Process death = orphaned chunks consuming capacity forever. No rollback. |
| 810 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DynamoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 278 | sdk-audit | `TotalSize` field name mismatch — metadata stores `"Size"` but retrieval reads `"TotalSize"`. Pre-allocation capacity always 0. |
| 811 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DynamoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 282-298 | sdk-audit | Chunked retrieval: missing chunks silently skipped. Caller receives truncated/corrupted data. |
| 812 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DynamoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 303-334 | sdk-audit | Delete doesn't paginate Query. >1MB/1000 chunks leaves orphans. |
| 813 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/DynamoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 353-413 | sdk-audit | `ListCoreAsync` performs full-table `Scan` instead of `Query`. Reads every partition. |
| 814 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/MongoDbStorageStrategy.cs | 349-372 | sdk-audit | `ExecuteQueryCoreAsync` passes raw user string to `BsonDocument.Parse` then `AggregateAsync`. NoSQL injection via `$out`/`$merge`/`$lookup`. |
| 815 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/RavenDbStorageStrategy.cs | 71-75 | sdk-audit | TLS certificate loaded then discarded. Mutual TLS silently non-functional. Comment: "Certificate is read-only in newer versions." |
| 816 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/NoSQL/RavenDbStorageStrategy.cs | 212-232 | sdk-audit | `IAsyncEnumerator` from `StreamAsync` not in `await using`. Server-side cursor leak on early dispose. |
| 817 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Relational/MySqlStorageStrategy.cs | 88-106 | sdk-audit | Table/database names backtick-quoted but no identifier validation. Backtick doubling not handled. |
| 818 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Relational/OracleStorageStrategy.cs | 84 | sdk-audit | `_schemaName`/`_tableName` interpolated without validation. Oracle double-quote quoting exploitable. |
| 819 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Relational/OracleStorageStrategy.cs | 325-330 | sdk-audit | `BeginTransactionCoreAsync` calls `conn.BeginTransaction()` synchronously. Not async variant. |
| 820 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Relational/SqliteStorageStrategy.cs | 107-122 | sdk-audit | `_tableName` from config interpolated into all DDL/DML. No identifier validation. |

| 822 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Relational/SqlServerStorageStrategy.cs | 381-391 | sdk-audit | `CommitAsync`/`RollbackAsync` call sync `Commit()`/`Rollback()`. Ignore CancellationToken. Same pattern in Oracle:348-352 and Sqlite:472-474. |
| 823 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Search/ElasticsearchStorageStrategy.cs | 139-142 | sdk-audit | `.Refresh(Refresh.True)` on every write. 10x indexing throughput reduction. Should be configurable. Same in OpenSearch. |
| 824 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Search/ElasticsearchStorageStrategy.cs | 199-211 | sdk-audit | `ListCoreAsync` hardcodes `.Size(10000)`. Silently truncates at 10K docs. No scroll/search-after. Same in OpenSearch:197. |
| 825 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Search/MeilisearchStorageStrategy.cs | 79-88 | sdk-audit | `EnsureSchemaCoreAsync` bare catch to detect index existence. Network/auth errors silently swallowed. |
| 826 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Search/MeilisearchStorageStrategy.cs | 174 | sdk-audit | `ListCoreAsync` hardcodes `Limit = 1000`. No pagination. Silently truncates. |
| 827 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Search/MeilisearchStorageStrategy.cs | 180-193 | sdk-audit | `ListCoreAsync` uses full-text search (typo-tolerant) instead of prefix filter. Unreliable results. |
| 828 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Search/TypesenseStorageStrategy.cs | 189 | sdk-audit | `q=key:{prefix}*` is keyword search not structural filter. Unreliable for special characters. |
| 829 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Search/TypesenseStorageStrategy.cs | 191 | sdk-audit | `per_page=250` hardcoded. No pagination. Silently truncates beyond 250 docs. |
| 830 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Spatial/PostGisStorageStrategy.cs | 87-98 | sdk-audit | `_tableName` interpolated into DDL without `ValidateIdentifier`. Inconsistent with PostgreSql strategy. |
| 831 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Streaming/KafkaStorageStrategy.cs | 133-140 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { }` in `EnsureSchemaCoreAsync` swallows all Kafka topic creation errors including auth/network/replication failures. |
| 832 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Streaming/KafkaStorageStrategy.cs | 195-324 | sdk-audit | `RetrieveCoreAsync`/`ListCoreAsync` scan all messages from Offset.Beginning on partition 0 only — O(n) per call, other partitions invisible. |
| 833 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Streaming/PulsarStorageStrategy.cs | 51 | sdk-audit | `SupportsSql => true` but no SQL execution path exists in strategy. |
| 834 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/Streaming/PulsarStorageStrategy.cs | 93-101 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { }` in namespace creation swallows all HTTP errors including auth failures. |

| 836 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/TimeSeries/QuestDbStorageStrategy.cs | 98-272 | sdk-audit | SQL injection: `_tableName` from user config interpolated into all SQL/DDL. `ListCoreAsync` also builds regex prefix filter with no sanitisation. |
| 837 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/TimeSeries/QuestDbStorageStrategy.cs | 188-194 | sdk-audit | `DeleteCoreAsync` is a no-op — returns size as if deleted but QuestDB has no DELETE. Callers believe delete succeeded. |
| 838 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimescaleDbStorageStrategy.cs | 91-360 | sdk-audit | SQL injection: `_tableName` and `_chunkInterval` interpolated into DDL, `create_hypertable`, `ALTER TABLE`, `add_compression_policy` — all from user config with no validation. |
| 839 | HIGH | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimescaleDbStorageStrategy.cs | 112-119 | sdk-audit | Bare `catch { }` in hypertable creation — swallows all PostgreSQL errors, not just "already a hypertable". |
| 840 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/TimeSeries/TimescaleDbStorageStrategy.cs | 140-152 | sdk-audit | `StoreCoreAsync` plain INSERT with UNIQUE constraint — rapid same-key stores at same millisecond throw constraint violation. Needs ON CONFLICT. |
| 841 | CRITICAL | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/TimeSeries/VictoriaMetricsStorageStrategy.cs | 85-157 | sdk-audit | `StoreCoreAsync` posts JSON to `/api/v1/import` (wrong endpoint for blobs); `RetrieveCoreAsync` tries to read binary from Prometheus metric label which cannot work. Every retrieve throws `FileNotFoundException`. |
| 842 | LOW | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/WideColumn/BigtableStorageStrategy.cs | 35 | sdk-audit | `DatabaseCategory => NoSQL` — should be WideColumn (SDK gap). |
| 843 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/WideColumn/CassandraStorageStrategy.cs | 107-109 | sdk-audit | Keyspace created with `SimpleStrategy` — not production-safe for multi-DC clusters. ScyllaDb correctly uses `NetworkTopologyStrategy`. |
| 844 | MEDIUM | UltimateDatabaseStorage/Strategies/WideColumn/HBaseStorageStrategy.cs | 265,325 | sdk-audit | `DateTime.Parse` without `CultureInfo.InvariantCulture` — throws on non-invariant locale hosts. |
| 845 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Features/AutoTieringFeature.cs | 59-63 | sdk-audit | Timer started in constructor captures `this` before fully initialized. |
| 846 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Features/AutoTieringFeature.cs | 109,122 | sdk-audit | `RecordAccess` — `LastAccess`/`Temperature` updated without sync after concurrent `GetOrAdd`. Torn state possible. |
| 847 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Features/AutoTieringFeature.cs | 391-399 | sdk-audit | `AccessesInPeriod` checks total lifetime accesses, not windowed. Hot-to-cold based on all-time count is logically wrong. |
| 848 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Features/AutoTieringFeature.cs | 395-399 | sdk-audit | `SizeGreaterThan` condition is no-op (`break` only). Size-based policies silently match everything. |
| 849 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Features/CostBasedSelectionFeature.cs | 32,322-332 | sdk-audit | `_costHistory` plain `List<CostEntry>` never pruned. Unbounded growth until OOM. |
| 850 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Features/CrossBackendMigrationFeature.cs | 128-136 | sdk-audit | `GetMetadataAsync` called before `ExistsAsync`. Non-existent object → exception or garbage metadata used for `.Size`. |
| 851 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Features/CrossBackendMigrationFeature.cs | 139-162 | sdk-audit | `ProgressTrackingStream` never disposed — double-dispose on inner `sourceStream`. |
| 852 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Features/CrossBackendMigrationFeature.cs | 264 | sdk-audit | Batch job stored in `_activeJobs` before validation. Failed jobs visible via `GetActiveJobs()`. |
| 853 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Features/CrossBackendMigrationFeature.cs | 393-398 | sdk-audit | `VerifyMigrationAsync` — ETag comparison uses `OrdinalIgnoreCase`. Case-insensitive match on opaque hashes → false positives. |

| 1102 | CRITICAL | UltimateStorage/Strategies/OpenStack/SwiftStrategy.cs | 174-176 | sdk-audit | MD5.HashData(content) used for object ETag sent to Swift server. MD5 is broken — violates security policy. |
| 1103 | CRITICAL | UltimateStorage/Strategies/OpenStack/SwiftStrategy.cs | 235 | sdk-audit | MD5 used for segment ETag computation in SLO uploads. Same MD5 violation. |
| 1104 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/OpenStack/SwiftStrategy.cs | 725-729 | sdk-audit | Silent catch in EnsureContainerExistsAsync — container creation failure silently swallowed, strategy reports healthy without container. |
| 1105 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/S3Compatible/BackblazeB2Strategy.cs | 105 | sdk-audit | InitializeCoreAsync does entirely synchronous work (160+ lines config parsing) returning Task.CompletedTask. Same in CloudflareR2Strategy. |
| 1106 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/S3Compatible/BackblazeB2Strategy.cs | 336-337 | sdk-audit | SemaphoreSlim created in StoreMultipartAsync without using/try-finally — leaked on exception or cancellation. |
| 1107 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/S3Compatible/CloudflareR2Strategy.cs | 120-123 | sdk-audit | HttpClient created in InitializeCoreAsync — prior instance never disposed on re-initialization. |
| 1108 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/S3Compatible/WasabiStrategy.cs | 178-182 | sdk-audit | Endpoint validation uses Contains("wasabisys.com") — bypassable with `evil.com/wasabisys.com`. Should check Uri.Host ends with domain. |
| 1109 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/ExascaleIndexingStrategy.cs | 16,21 | sdk-audit | BoundedDictionary 1000-entry cap is in-memory stub. IsProductionReady => false present but health message falsely claims "trillion-object capacity". |
| 1110 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/ExascaleIndexingStrategy.cs | 52-57 | sdk-audit | ListAsyncCore iterates BoundedDictionary without locking — concurrent delete can throw InvalidOperationException. |
| 1111 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/ExascaleMetadataStrategy.cs | 28-34 | sdk-audit | Uses Path.GetTempPath() with GUID subdirectory as data dir. Temp dirs wiped on reboot — metadata strategy claiming persistence should use configurable path. |
| 1112 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/ExascaleMetadataStrategy.cs | 37-39 | sdk-audit | No IsProductionReady override — LSM-Tree to temp path makes this unfit for production. |
| 1113 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/ExascaleMetadataStrategy.cs | 193-211 | sdk-audit | ListAsyncCore loads all matching KV pairs into SortedDictionary before yielding — unbounded memory for large datasets. |
| 1114 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/ExascaleShardingStrategy.cs | 69 | sdk-audit | GetAvailableCapacityAsyncCore returns 1 Exabyte. Actual backend is 1000-entry in-memory BoundedDictionary. Contract lie on capacity. |
| 1115 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/GlobalConsistentHashStrategy.cs | 16,67 | sdk-audit | BoundedDictionary 1000-entry cap — NO IsProductionReady => false override. Health message claims "global consistent hashing" — Rule 13 violation with no guard. |
| 1116 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/HierarchicalNamespaceStrategy.cs | 16 | sdk-audit | BoundedDictionary stub, 1000-entry cap, no IsProductionReady => false. Health message falsely claims capability. |
| 1117 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/BloomFilter.cs | 149,165 | sdk-audit | stream.ReadAsync does not guarantee all bytes read in single call — no loop for short reads. Use ReadExactlyAsync. |
| 1118 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/CompactionManager.cs | 47 | sdk-audit | DateTime.UtcNow.Ticks for SSTable filename uniqueness — rapid compaction bursts can produce same filename, overwriting data. |
| 1119 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/CompactionManager.cs | 75-83 | sdk-audit | IAsyncEnumerator created in try block — partial initialization failure leaks enumerators not yet added to disposal list. |
| 1120 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/CompactionManager.cs | 86-87 | sdk-audit | KWayMergeAsync builds unbounded in-memory List of all merged entries before writing SSTable. Should stream via IAsyncEnumerable. |
| 1121 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/CompactionManager.cs | 103 | sdk-audit | `heap.First()` on SortedDictionary is O(log n) — in K-way merge hot path accumulates to O(n log k * log k). Use PriorityQueue. |
| 1122 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 26-27 | sdk-audit | `_disposed` and `_initialized` plain bool read/written across threads without volatile or Interlocked. Background flush sets _disposed=true with no memory barrier. |
| 1123 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 43-44 | sdk-audit | _writeLock and _flushLock SemaphoreSlim disposed in DisposeAsync but no synchronous IDisposable path — GC without await leaks. |
| 1124 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 52-57 | sdk-audit | InitializeAsync not thread-safe — concurrent calls both pass guard, replay WAL and load SSTables, duplicate SSTableReader entries. |
| 1125 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 86-88 | sdk-audit | LoadExistingSSTables sorts by File.GetCreationTimeUtc — unreliable on some filesystems. Should sort by filename-embedded timestamp. |
| 1126 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 87 | sdk-audit | Directory.GetFiles (sync I/O) inside async method. Should use enumeration or Task.Run wrapper. |
| 1127 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 108-113 | sdk-audit | ScanAsync checks _initialized but reads _memTable without lock — concurrent DisposeAsync can leave ScanAsync using disposed MemTable. |
| 1128 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 135-139,218-222,337-342 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget Task.Run for background flush/compaction — if flush panics after acquiring _flushLock, lock never released and all future writes deadlock. |
| 1129 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 135,218,337 | sdk-audit | Fire-and-forget Task.Run for flush/compaction — background task continues against disposed WalWriter/SSTableReader after engine DisposeAsync. |
| 1130 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 289-348 | sdk-audit | Lock-order inversion: FlushMemTableAsync acquires _flushLock then _writeLock, but PutAsync acquires _writeLock then triggers flush which acquires _flushLock. Deadlock risk. |
| 1131 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeEngine.cs | 432-435 | sdk-audit | Silent bare catch in DisposeAsync swallows all exceptions during final MemTable flush. No logging — corruption during shutdown invisible. |
| 1132 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/LsmTreeOptions.cs | - | sdk-audit | No validation of option values — BlockSize=0 or MaxLevels=0 crash downstream code. |
| 1133 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/MemTable.cs | 148-155 | sdk-audit | Size accounting asymmetric for tombstones — repeated deletes of non-existent keys drift size upward, causing premature flushes. |
| 1134 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/MetadataPartitioner.cs | 19 | sdk-audit | partitionCount <= 0 returns 0 silently. Should throw ArgumentOutOfRangeException. |
| 1135 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/SSTableReader.cs | 98 | sdk-audit | LastKey set to first key of last block, not actual last key. Range queries using LastKey for bloom filtering miss valid records. |
| 1136 | HIGH | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/SSTableReader.cs | 182 | sdk-audit | Block end offset uses `stream.Length - 28` instead of indexOffset for last block. ScanBlock parses index+bloom bytes as data — keys in last block silently missed. |
| 1137 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/SSTableReader.cs | 317 | sdk-audit | Silent yield break on read failure — partial results returned with no indication scan was truncated. |
| 1138 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/SSTableReader.cs | 339 | sdk-audit | Task.Yield() called per entry — millions of scheduler round-trips for large SSTables. Catastrophic throughput. |
| 1139 | MEDIUM | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/SSTableWriter.cs | 71,101 | sdk-audit | MemoryStream blocks not disposed when replaced in foreach loop. |
| 1140 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/WalEntry.cs | - | sdk-audit | No null check on Key in positional record — null Key causes NRE in WalWriter.AppendAsync at Key.Length. |
| 1141 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/WalWriter.cs | 76 | sdk-audit | _disposed read without volatile — stale cache possible on concurrent thread. |
| 1142 | LOW | UltimateStorage/Strategies/Scale/LsmTree/WalWriter.cs | 81-83 | sdk-audit | Double-checked OpenAsync without re-checking _disposed after semaphore — concurrent DisposeAsync can null _fileStream causing NRE. |
